title: Video Ad Editor (Meta Ads) | Remote | Long Term
description:
We are a fast growing European e-commerce company looking for a Video Ad Editor who can turn raw footage and product clips into high converting social media ads.

This role will start as part time during a trial period so we can see how well we work together. If the collaboration is successful, the position can grow into a long term role and eventually full time with additional responsibilities.

We are looking for someone reliable who wants to build a long term working relationship, not just short term freelance work.



Your main task

Your main responsibility will be editing short form video ads for platforms like:

•

• Instagram

You will receive raw footage, product videos, scripts or creative direction, and your job is to transform this into high performing ad creatives.

Typical ads will be 15 to 45 seconds long and optimized for performance marketing.



Responsibilities

• Edit short form video ads for Meta platforms

• Create engaging hooks in the first 3 seconds

• Add subtitles, captions and motion graphics

• Cut content to improve pacing and watch time

• Follow ad creative trends

• Export in correct formats for Meta ads

Later responsibilities may include:

• Uploading ads to Meta Ads Manager

• Organizing creative testing

• Supporting marketing tasks



Requirements

• Strong video editing skills

• Portfolio showing ad style videos

• English level C1 or higher

• Experience with short form advertising content

• Ability to follow creative direction



Big advantage if you have experience with

• Meta Ads Manager

• Editing ads for European markets (very different from US style ads)

• AI voice tools like ElevenLabs (For creating ads in multiple language)



Work structure

This role will start as part time during a trial period so we can get to know each other and see how well we work together.

If the collaboration is successful, the role can grow into a long term position and eventually full time with additional responsibilities within our marketing team.

We are looking for someone who is interested in building a stable, long term working relationship, not just short term freelance work.

Hourly rate: $4 to $6 depending on experience



About our team

We currently work with a small international team including tea
mbers in Europe and the Philippines, and we are looking to expand our creative team.

Our goal is to build a small group of talented people we can work with long term.



To apply

Please send:

* Your portfolio or examples of ads you edited

* A short description of your editing workflow

* Your availability per week



Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.



If you are creative, reliable, and interested in long term work, we would love to hear from you.

title: Amazon PPC Manager
description:
Job Title: Amazon PPC Manager

Job Type: Full-Time / Remote

Work Schedule: Monday to Friday, flexible with overlap for team communication

Salary Range: Depends on experience



We are hiring an Amazon PPC Manager to manage and optimize Amazon ad campaigns for seller accounts. We are looking for someone who can take ownership of performance, identify growth opportunities, and execute a clear optimization process.



Key Responsibilities:

• Manage Amazon PPC campaigns across Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and Sponsored Display

• Perform keyword research, campaign launches, bid adjustments, and search term harvesting

• Monitor performance and optimize campaigns based on targets

• Improve efficiency while supporting revenue growth

• Audit campaign structures and recommend improvements

• Provide regular reporting with action items and strategic recommendations

• Coordinate with the team on promotions, launches, and listing strategy



Minimum Qualifications:

• At least 2 years of Amazon PPC experience

• Strong understanding of Amazon Ads metrics and optimization workflows

• Experience managing campaigns with measurable results

• Strong spreadsheet and reporting skills

• Good communication and time management



Success Metrics / KPI Expectations:

• Maintain or improve target ACoS and TACoS based on account goals

• Increase ad-attributed revenue while controlling wasted spend

• Improve CTR, CVR, and campaign efficiency over time

• Deliver timely reports and clear optimization actions

• Help support account growth through structured PPC execution



Who We Want:

Someone who is not just pressing buttons, but understands strategy. We need a team member who can analyze, decide, and execute with accountability.



To Apply:

Please include the following in your application:

Updated resume

Summary of Amazon PPC experience

Tools and reports you regularly use

Sample account results or case studies

Expected salary

Weekly availability

title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter (AU + US) — Excellent English + Confident
description:
— About the Role



We are looking for a confident Cold Caller / Appointment Setter to help us book demo calls with businesses in Australia and the United States.



You will be responsible for calling business owners, asking a few quick qualification questions, and scheduling demo appointments for our team.



We provide leads, a script, and a dialer, your job is to confidently speak with prospects and book meetings.





— About Our Company



EcoInk builds AI voice receptionist systems that help service businesses automatically answer calls and book appointments using AI.



We are growing quickly and need someone reliable who is comfortable speaking with business owners.



— Schedule



5 days per week (Monday–Friday)



Australia Calling Hours

10:00 AM – 1:00 PM PH Time (flexible)



United States Calling Hours

8:00 PM – 12:00 AM PH Time (flexible depending on region)



Exact schedule will be confirmed after hiring.



— Responsibilities



• Cold call businesses in Australia and the United States

• Speak confidently with business owners or managers

• Ask 2–3 quick qualification questions

• Book demo appointments in our calendar

• Log call outcomes and notes into Google Sheets or CRM

• Follow up with prospects who ask to be called later



— Requirements



• Excellent spoken English (clear, confident, natural)

• 1–2+ years experience in cold calling or appointment setting

• Comfortable handling objections and rejection

• Reliable internet connection

• Quiet workspace for calling

• Good quality headset

• Able to consistently work some US evening hours



— Performance Targets



• 100–150 dials per day

• Track and report daily:

- Dials, Connects, Meetings booked, Shows, Call notes



—  Bonuses

Performance bonuses for:

• Booking 3–5+ meetings per week

• Meetings that convert into paying clients





— How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:

1. A 60–90 second voice recording introducing yourself and your cold calling experience

2. Your latest call statistics (if available):

- Dials per day

- Meetings booked per week

3. Confirm you can work both AU daytime and US evening hours

4. Confirm you have a headset and quiet calling environment

title: YouTube Yoyo Tutorial Editor - Retention Editing Style
description:
We make yo-yo tutorials that teach people tricks - from beginner to pro.



Check out our pre-existing video tutorials here as examples:











Our videos are short (3-5 min), punchy, and easy to follow. We need an editor who can take raw footage and turn it into something people actually want to watch all the way through.



This isn't slow, boring tutorial editing. This is retention editing - fast cuts, zooms, text overlays, slow-mo at the right 
nts. The kind of editing that keeps viewers hooked.



WHAT YOU'LL BE EDITING:



Each video teaches one yo-yo trick. The structure is usually:

- Quick hook showing the trick

- Step-by-step breakdown

- Slow-mo replays of key 
nts

- Tips and common mistakes

- Final demo



We film everything. You edit it into something clean and engaging.



EDITING STYLE WE NEED:



- Jump cuts to remove dead air and keep pacing tight

- Zoom cuts / punch-ins on hands and yo-yo for detail

- Slow-motion replays when demonstrating tricks

- Text overlays for steps, tips, and key points

- Clean transitions (nothing flashy - just smooth)

- Audio cleanup and music/sound balancing



Watch our channel to see the style: OFFSET Yoyo



WHAT "GOOD" LOOKS LIKE:



- Viewer watches the whole video (retention editing done right)

- Tricks are easy to follow (zooms and slow-mo at the right 
nts)

- Text overlays help, not distract

- Pacing feels energetic but not rushed

- Audio is clean and balanced



Essentially, just watch our current tutorials on our YouTube channel. That is the quality that we expect, nothing less. 



WHAT WE DON'T WANT:



- Slow, boring edits with no energy

- Over-the-top effects that distract from the trick

- Missing the key 
nts that need slow-mo or zoom

- Sloppy text placement or timing

- "Good enough" mentality



REQUIREMENTS:



- Experience with retention-style editing (show me examples)

- Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve proficiency

- Understanding of YouTube pacing (you watch YouTube, you get it)

- Can turn around a 2-5 min video in 24 hours (preferably pumping out multiple tutorials a day)

- Reliable communication and consistent availability

- Eye for detail (timing, text placement, audio levels)



- Most importantly, I need you to be hard-working and dedicated. I don't care if you have the most talent for video editing. If you're lazy, this job won't cut it for you.



I'd rather train a person with good work ethic and average video editing skills than a person with poor work ethic and excellent video editing skills. 



NICE TO HAVE:



- Experience editing youtube videos: short forms, long forms

- Motion graphics skills (After Effects)

- Understanding of YouTube analytics/retention

- Genuine interest in learning yo-yo, as these are yo-yo tutorials 



COMPENSATION:



Starting at $15-20 USD per video (3-8 min length)

Rate can increase as you prove consistent quality.



We're building up volume over time - starting with a few videos per week, scaling as we grow.



Editors that we like working with & yield quality videos will get offered more projects we have in the pipeline!



TRAINING:



I'll personally train you on:

- Our specific editing style and pacing (You'll be trained by a YouTuber & senior editor with 1.3 million subscribers)

- What 
nts need slow-mo vs. zoom vs. text

- How we structure tutorials for retention

- Feedback on every video until you've got it



You'll get paid to learn retention editing that works for any YouTube channel.





WHY THIS ROLE:



I want someone who wants to get better at editing. If that's you, I'll help you build skills that work beyond just this channel.



You crush it here? There's more work and better rates as we grow.





HOW TO APPLY:



1. Send your portfolio (YouTube edits, tutorial edits, shorts/reels edits or retention-style work)



2. Answer these:

   - What editing software do you use?

   - What's your turnaround time for a 3-4 min video like our tutorials?

   - What makes retention editing different from regular editing?



3. Watch one of our videos and tell me: What would you do differently?



(You can use AI to answer these questions; however, I want your real, sincere answers, not AI bullshit please)



Serious candidates will do a test:

- We send raw footage (10-20 min of filming)

- You edit it into a finished tutorial

- 24 hours to complete with comprehensive training



We respond within 48 hours.



REAL TALK:



I want someone who actually cares about getting better at this. Not just clocking in.

title: Real Estate Operations Virtual Assistant
description:
Overview:   I’m a real estate agent looking for a reliable virtual assistant to help manage the operational side of my business so I can focus on clients and negotiations.

This role is ideal for someone who is organized, detail-oriented, and enjoys building and maintaining systems.

Responsibilities:

-Transaction Support

-Review incoming offers for completeness

-Ensure required documents are signed and included

-Help organize buyer and seller transaction files

-CRM Management

-Maintain and update contact records in the CRM

-Improve contact profile completeness

-Apply tags, notes, and activity updates



Operational Support:

-Maintain checklists for listings and transactions

-Organize workflows and task tracking

-Help manage property searches for buyers



Working Style:  My business systems are continually refined and improved over time. I’m looking for someone who is comfortable working in an environment where processes evolve and improve rather than remaining static.

You should enjoy organizing systems, implementing adjustments, and helping refine workflows as the business grows.



Requirements:

-Strong attention to detail

-Excellent written English

-Comfortable with spreadsheets and CRM systems

-Able to follow structured instructions and checklists

-Real estate experience is not required if you enjoy learning.



Hours: Full Time after trial period of one week.



Application please include:

- your experience or resume with relevant experience

- hourly rate

- time zone and preferred working hours



* I am flexible about working hours but require a regular working schedule for communication and task completion.

I require at least three regular times each week when we work synchronously for coordination, planning, or working sessions.

I begin my workday early (around 5:30 AM Eastern Time), so candidates must be able to maintain reliable overlap with early morning U.S. Eastern Time hours.



I value people who take pride in doing good work and who enjoy helping systems run smoothly. If you’re someone who likes organizing information, improving processes, and supporting a growing business behind the scenes, I’d be glad to hear from you.

title: Financial Assistant (Bookkeeper) Role
description:
About Us

Kinara International is a fast-growing, multi-entity group with operations across the UK, Germany, Hong Kong, New Zealand, Australia, and the UAE. We specialise in international trade and distribution. Our German entity handles significant cross-border transactions and supplier/customer activity. We’re now looking for a dynamic and detail oriented Financial Assistant (Bookkeeper) to join our growing team.





We are looking for a bookkeeper to maintain our German entity's books in Xero and coordinate with our external German tax consultants. You will work remotely from South Africa, report to our Group Finance Controller in Dubai, and serve as the liaison between our internal finance team and our German tax advisors.



Core Responsibilities: 

Maintain accurate accounting records in Xero for the German entity

Process invoices and payments

Perform monthly bank reconciliations

Prepare monthly management accounts

Code transactions correctly for VAT and reporting purposes

Provide clean, timely data to external tax consultants

Respond to queries from consultants and track deadlines



Day-to-Day Responsibilities: 



Bookkeeping:

- Maintain accurate accounting records in Xero for our German entity

- Process accounts payable and receivable

- Monthly bank reconciliations across EUR and multi-currency accounts

- Post journals, accruals, and prepayments

- Keep the chart of accounts clean and organized



Coordination with External Tax Consultants:

- Provide transaction data, reports, and supporting documentation

- Answer questions about specific transactions

- Track submission deadlines and ensure timely delivery

- Flag any issues or discrepancies to the Group Finance Controller



Month-End & Reporting: 

- Execute month-end close on time

- Prepare monthly management accounts for Group Finance review

- Assist with intercompany reconciliations



Skills & Qualifications:

Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field

2+ years of bookkeeping or accounting experience

Proficient in Xero (this is critical and non-negotiable)

Understanding of VAT principles and transaction coding

Strong Excel skills (reconciliations, pivot tables)

Fluent in English (all communication is in English)

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and deadline-driven



Preferred:

Experience working with a German entity or German accounting requirements

Working knowledge of German VAT (Umsatzsteuer)

Familiarity with DATEV (helpful but not required)

German language skills (helpful but not required)

title: Head of Marketing & Lead Generation
description:
Compensation: $2,000–$2,500/month USD (based on experience)

Location: Remote — US time zone overlap required

Type: Full-time independent contractor

Reports to: Founder / CEO

Start: Immediately



About the Role

We run two brands under one roof. The first sells PR and media services to personal injury law firms. The second sells backlinks on real news sites to SEO agencies. Both are profitable. Both need a dedicated marketing engine. You're that engine.

This is the most important hire we're making this year. Every client, every dollar of new revenue, every booked call starts with what you build. The sales team is ready. The offers convert. What we need is the person who fills the pipeline. If that pipeline dries up, the company feels it immediately. You need to be comfortable with that weight.



What You'll Own

Two brands, two audiences, two funnels — one person running it all. You are the entire marketing department. There is no graphic designer. There is no implementation person. There is no content team. You build the ads, the landing pages, the automations, and the creative assets yourself. You work directly with the sales team to make sure the leads you generate actually close. If they don't, you dig into why and fix the funnel. The KPI is simple: minimum 2X ROAS across both brands. That's the floor, not the ceiling.



What You'll Actually Do Day to Day

You'll run Meta ad campaigns for both brands end to end — strategy, audience research, creative production, copywriting, media buying, and daily optimization. You'll build and maintain all landing pages in GoHighLevel. You'll set up and manage the full automation backend — workflows,
 sequences, SMS follow-ups, pipeline stages, calendar booking, trigger links, and reporting dashboards. You'll produce all ad creative yourself using AI tools — static images, short-form video, and whatever else the campaigns need. You'll write all copy — ads, landing pages,
s, and follow-up sequences. You'll meet with the sales team regularly to review lead quality, close rates, and revenue attribution, then adjust campaigns based on what's actually turning into money.



These are two very different buyers. One is a personal injury attorney who doesn't know what media placements are and needs to be educated before they'll spend. The other is an SEO agency owner who already knows what DA means and wants to see the specs and buy without a phone call. You need to understand both buying psychologies and build funnels that match how each one makes decisions.



The Pace & Pressure

This is not a role where you get a week to think about a campaign. You build fast, launch fast, read the data fast, and iterate fast. Some weeks you'll be spinning up new creatives for both brands, rebuilding a landing page that isn't converting, fixing an automation that broke, and jumping on a call with the sales team to figure out why lead quality dropped — all before Friday.

The company's revenue depends directly on your output. When you're producing, the pipeline is full and the sales team is closing. When you're not, everyone feels it. If that kind of pressure paralyzes you, this isn't the right role. If it energizes you, keep reading.



You'll need to manage your own time, prioritize ruthlessly, and execute without anyone checking in on you every day. Nobody is going to hand you a task list. You see what needs to happen, you decide what matters most, and you get it done. Speed and quality at the same time — that's the standard.



Required Skills — No On-the-Job Training Provided

GoHighLevel — Master Level: Funnels, workflows, automations, pipeline management, calendar booking,
 and SMS sequences, form builders, trigger links, custom values, conditional logic, and reporting dashboards. You should be able to build a complete funnel with full automation in GHL without asking anyone how. If you need to watch a tutorial on how to set up a workflow, this isn't the right fit.



Meta Ads Manager — Real Budget Experience: Campaign architecture, ad set testing frameworks, audience building, lookalike audiences, retargeting sequences, pixel configuration, conversion API, budget scaling rules, and creative testing methodology. You've managed real ad spend and can point to real ROAS numbers from campaigns you personally built and optimized.

Landing Page Design & Build — No Designer Involved: You design and build high-converting landing pages yourself in GoHighLevel. You understand direct response principles: headline hierarchy, offer structure, risk reversal, social proof placement, urgency, and CTA optimization. You don't hand a wireframe to someone else. You build the page, publish it, and test it.



Ad Creative Production — Using AI Tools: You use AI image generators, video tools, and design platforms to produce static and video ad creatives at speed. Midjourney, Runway, Canva, CapCut, or whatever gets the job done. You don't wait on a designer because there isn't one. You create scroll-stopping visuals that match the copy and the funnel.



Copywriting — Ads, Funnels & Follow-Up Sequences: You write ad copy that stops the scroll, landing page copy that converts cold traffic, and
 and SMS sequences that nurture leads to a booked call or a purchase. You understand frameworks like StoryBrand, direct response, and problem-agitation-solution. You test hooks and headlines methodically, not randomly.

Analytics, Attribution & Optimization: You read the data and make decisions fast. You track cost per lead, cost per acquisition, ROAS, and lead-to-close rate across both brands. You connect what happens in the ad account to what happens on the sales call. When something breaks, you find it in the numbers before anyone tells you.



Who This Is For

A senior-level marketer who has built and scaled paid acquisition funnels before — ideally for service businesses or agencies — and wants full ownership of the marketing function across two brands. You've been in high-pressure environments where your work directly determined whether the company hit its numbers. You don't need a manager telling you what to test next. You see the numbers, you make the calls, you execute the work, and you optimize based on results. You're comfortable being the only marketing person because you move faster without a committee.



Who This Is NOT For

This is not an entry-level or mid-level role. Not for someone who is "learning" media buying, GoHighLevel, or funnel building. Not for someone who needs a team to delegate to or a manager to set priorities. Not for someone who knows GoHighLevel at a surface level. Not for someone who can run ads but can't build the landing page. Not for someone who can build the page but can't write the copy. Not for someone who can write the copy but can't produce the creative. Not for someone who has never been the person directly responsible for whether leads came in or didn't. No on-the-job training will be provided for any tool or skill listed above.

title: Project Manager – SEO Agency (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
Senior SEO Project Manager (Remote – Philippines)

Salary: $1,800 – $2,200 USD (based on experience)

Type: Full-Time

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Working Hours: 9 AM – 6 PM Philippine time with some London Overlap

Project Management Tool: ClickUp (required experience preferred)

Time Tracking: Required (Hubstaff – non-negotiable)



IMPORTANT

Do not apply if you do not have hands-on SEO project management experience.

You must be able to understand SEO workflows and assist with light strategic decisions.

This is not a training role.



Role Overview

We are a high-performance SEO agency seeking a rigorous, detail-oriented Senior Project Manager who takes time budgets, resource allocation, and delivery accountability seriously.



This role requires someone who is comfortable enforcing standards, protecting margins, and holding teams accountable, while still collaborating effectively across departments.



If you avoid hard conversations, overlook numbers, or prefer a loose, unstructured environment, this role will not be a fit.



Core Responsibilities

• Own time budgets and resource allocation per client and ensure hours are planned and used intentionally

• Track planned vs actual hours weekly and immediately flag underutilization or overages

• Manage and oversee task execution across SEO, content, link building, client success, and automation teams

• Assign, monitor, and enforce task completion in ClickUp

• Identify bottlenecks early and take corrective action before delivery timelines or margins are impacted

• Enforce SOP adherence and process discipline across teams

• Provide clear, numbers-driven weekly project and utilization reports to the Head of Operations

• Hold tea
mbers accountable to timelines, estimates, and quality standards

• Assist with structured onboarding of new clients into ClickUp and internal systems



Required Experience & Skills

• Minimum 5 years of Project Management experience in a digital or agency environment

• Demonstrated experience managing large, cross-functional teams

• Proven use of ClickUp, Teamwork, 
, or similar PM platforms

• Strong command of time tracking, budget awareness, and utilization management

• Excellent written and verbal English communication

• Exceptionally organized, detail-oriented, and process-driven

• Comfortable enforcing standards, pushing back when needed, and escalating issues

• SEO project management experience is required

• Ability to understand SEO deliverables, dependencies, and execution timelines



Behavioral & Work Style Fit (Important)

This role strongly favors candidates with the following behavioral profile:

• High Conscientiousness (High C): precise, structured, detail- and metrics-focused

• Moderate Dominance (Moderate D): able to enforce standards and hold teams accountable

• Low–Moderate Influence (I): direct, not overly people-pleasing

• Moderate Steadiness (S): reliable, consistent, calm under pressure



If you are highly relationship-driven, avoid enforcement, or dislike working with numbers, budgets, and metrics, this role will not be a fit.



Benefits

• Company-paid benefits and performance incentives after 90 days

• Paid vacation leave after 3 months

• 13th-month bonus after 6 months (contingent on full-year employment)

• Stable, long-term role with a growing international agency



Screening Questions (Required)

Please answer all questions clearly and specifically. Incomplete or vague answers will not be considered.

1) Automation & Leverage

In a perfect scenario, what automations or systems would you implement as a Project Manager so you can focus on high-value work such as planning, enforcement, and optimization rather than manual coordination? Be specific.



2) Time Budget & Utilization Scenario

A client has a 40-hour monthly budget. After reviewing the last two months, you notice the team is consistently using only 28–30 hours, but tasks are being completed “on time.” Walk us through exactly how you would identify the issue and what actions you would take.



3) Behavioral Profile (DISC)

Please provide your most recent DISC assessment results (D, I, S, C). If you do not have an updated DISC, take one and include your results. Briefly explain how your DISC profile shows up in how you manage projects, time budgets, and accountability.



4) SEO Project Management Experience

Describe how you have managed SEO deliverables across multiple clients at the same time. How did you prioritize work, track progress, and ensure the correct SEO activities were executed each month? Include examples of deliverables you were responsible for overseeing.



To Apply

• Include “PMFOCUSED” in your subject line

• Briefly describe:

– The largest team you’ve managed

– How you tracked time, budgets, or utilization

– The PM tools you used

• Attach your resume or a link to your OnlineJobs profile



Final Note

This role is for disciplined operators who value structure, clarity, and accountability.

If that describes you, we want to hear from you.

title: Marketing Manager  – Viral Content & Social Media Growth
description:
We Create Videos That Hit 1M+ Views. Now We Need the Person Who Finds Them.



We're a UGC management agency that builds massive reach on Instagram and TikTok. Our content regularly crosses 1 million views. We manage multiple UGC creators, handle their entire marketing strategy, and we're scaling fast.



We're hiring a Marketing Manager who lives and breathes short-form content, someone who spots trends before they peak, understands why certain videos explode, and can turn that insight into actionable content strategies for our creators.



This is not a VA role. This is a strategic position with real ownership and a clear path to growth.



---



YOUR ROLE



- Research trending content, sounds, and formats on TikTok and Instagram Reels — before they go mainstream

- Identify viral video patterns and translate them into content ideas our creators can use

- Develop weekly content strategies based on real-time platform data

- Collaborate with our content and creative team to refine scripts and concepts

- Track content performance and report on what's working (and what's not)

- Monitor algorithm changes and platform updates that affect reach



---



WHO YOU ARE



- You scroll TikTok and Reels obsessively — and you can explain WHY certain videos go viral

- You have experience in social media marketing, content strategy, or digital marketing

- You're fluent in English (C1+) — written and spoken

- You're self-motivated, reliable, and take ownership without being micromanaged

- You have a stable internet connection (100+ Mbps)



---



WHAT YOU'LL EARN



Starting Base: $700–$800/month

Performance Bonus: Up to $300/month for viral content wins

6-Month Target: $1200-$1800/month for top performers (more possible!)

Growth Path: Senior Marketing Manager role as we scale

$1000+/month easily possible within the first few months thanks to our bonus system



We pay for results. If you consistently deliver viral content strategies, your compensation grows with your impact. No cap on performance bonuses.



---



WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT



- You're not posting content for a random brand — you're shaping the strategy for creators who already get millions of views

- You'll work directly with an experienced marketer who'll help you level up fast

- Flexible hours — we care about output, not hours logged

- Real growth opportunity: we're building a team, and early hires get the most responsibility



---



HOW TO APPLY



Step 1: Fill out our application form:






We review every application within 48 hours.



--



Looking forward to talk to you soon!

title: Junior Channel Manager
description:
Junior Channel Manager | Simple History



About Simple History

Simple History is one of the world’s leading animated history channels on YouTube, bringing battles, disasters, wars, political events and untold stories to life through engaging storytelling and distinctive animation.

We create content for a global audience of millions and continue to scale our output, expand into new formats, and grow internationally.

We are looking for a Channel Manager / Production Coordinator to lead channel growth and oversee production operations, ensuring our content performs at the highest level and workflows run efficiently from idea to upload.



The Role



This is a hybrid strategic and operational role combining:

YouTube growth and performance strategy

Production workflow coordination

Sponsorship management and marketing support

Publishing and post-production oversight

You will sit at the centre of the channel, balancing creativity, analytics, and organisation.



Channel Management Responsibilities



Management 

Support day-to-day management of the Simple History YouTube channel

Support the uploading of videos and ensure adherence to platform best practices

Take part in team reviews and perform quality checks before publishing



Creative ideation 

Identify content trends and audience opportunities within history and military topics

Work closely with the creator and the creative team to feed performance insights into future content decisions

Support expansion into YT Shorts, social platforms, and new platforms (Microsoft Start, Snapchat, etc)

Sponsorships



Edit and refine CTAs within videos, Work with creator to write sponsorship call-to-action segments (human-written, not AI-generated)

Support outreach and relationship management with sponsors

Help secure repeat brand partnerships through strong delivery and communication

Manage brand integrations and sponsorship workflow







Optimise



Optimise titles, thumbnails, descriptions, tags and metadata for SEO and CTR

Conduct detailed analysis of YouTube Analytics and performance metrics

Provide regular performance reports with actionable insights to the wider company team.

Continuously optimise back catalogue content (titles, thumbnails, overall packaging)

Develop and execute growth strategies



Production Coordination Responsibilities

Support video-level budgeting aligned with channel targets

Process invoices and manage contractor documentation

Organise and host meetings, documentation and cloud storage (through Iconik)

Track production costs and freelancer payments via Talentdesk Finance software 

Manage video production timelines from ideation to upload

Assist recruitment and onboarding of freelancers



Support the Creator and Video Directors with….

Maintaining and optimise project management systems (
 and Google Sheets)

Tracking scripts, assets and deliverables across production stages

Coordinating video directors, writers, artists, animators, editors and voiceover artists

Maintain clear communication across a distributed team



Requirements



experience in YouTube channel management and digital content production

Passion for history, with a particular interest in military history

Deep understanding of YouTube analytics, content packaging, and platform performance drivers

Excellent project management and organisational skills, with the ability to manage multiple workflows simultaneously

Experience using production or project management tools (e.g. 
, Airtable or similar)

Proven ability to coordinate creative teams, freelancers, and external collaborators

Fluent English, with strong written and verbal communication skills

Ability to work within UK/European time zone hours

Self-motivated with a strong work ethic and the ability to operate independently in a remote environment

Strong copywriting skills, including clear and engaging written communication



Bonus

Experience working on educational, documentary, or knowledge-based YouTube channels

Familiarity with animation production workflows and creative pipelines

Experience managing brand sponsorships, partnerships, or commercial integrations

Understanding of YouTube monetisation strategies, including sponsorships, memberships, and diversified revenue streams



What We’re Looking For

Strong analytical mindset combined with creative awareness

Entrepreneurial approach, with a proactive and solutions-focused attitude

Highly detail-oriented with the ability to manage deadlines effectively

Clear and confident communicator with strong decision-making skills

Process-driven thinker who identifies opportunities to improve systems and workflows

Genuine passion for educational content and storytelling

This is a key role with significant impact on the growth and direction of a global educational brand.

title: Experienced Credit Repair VA Needed | Dispute Processing | Remote
description:
Credit Repair Operations Virtual Assistant

Company

Einstein Capital

Division

Credit Repair - Funding Optimization



Job Title

Experienced Credit Repair VA Needed | Dispute Processing | Remote





Position Type

Part-Time (20 hours per week to start)



Location

Remote (Overseas candidates welcome)



Reports To

Funding Director



Role Overview



Einstein Capital helps business owners access business funding. Some clients require credit profile optimization before qualifying for traditional funding. We are hiring a detail-oriented Credit Repair Operations Virtual Assistant to manage the back-end credit optimization and dispute workflow inside our credit repair software platform. This is an operations-focused role supporting our funding pipeline.



Primary Objective

Maintain organized and on-time credit optimization workflows so clients stay on track toward funding eligibility.

Core Responsibilities



1. Credit File Management

- Review three-bureau credit reports

- Identify negative accounts eligible for dispute

- Document findings in CRM



2. Dispute Workflow Management

- Generate dispute letters using software

- Track dispute rounds (Round 1, Round 2, etc.)

- Monitor bureau response timelines

- Update dispute tracking dashboard

- Prepare next round dispute files



3. Timeline & Calendar Management

- Track dispute send dates

- Monitor 30–45 day response windows

- Ensure no client file falls behind



4. CRM & Documentation

- Maintain organized client notes

- Upload documents properly

- Track progress milestones

- Update funding team when profile improves



5. Quality Control Preparation

- Prepare files for final review by Funding Director

- Ensure dispute letters are properly formatted

- Flag potential compliance concerns



What This Role Does NOT Do

- No giving legal advice

- No guaranteeing deletions

- No making funding decisions

- No negotiating settlements

- No discussing commissions or funding strategy

- No client sales calls



Required Skills

- Extremely detail-oriented

- Strong English writing skills

- Organized and deadline-driven

- Comfortable working with repetitive processes

- Familiar with credit report structure (late payments, collections, charge-offs)

- Comfortable using CRM systems and Google Sheets



Preferred Experience (Not Required)

- Prior credit repair experience

- Familiarity with FCRA dispute process

- Experience reading personal credit reports



Performance Metrics

- 100% of active files updated weekly

- No missed dispute timelines

- Accurate CRM documentation

- Minimal file errors requiring correction



Compensation

$4 per hour depending on experience. Performance bonuses possible based on reliability and file management accuracy.



Application Instructions

To apply, please answer the following questions:



1. Explain the difference between a charge-off and a collection.

2. What is credit utilization and why does it matter?

3. What systems or tools do you use to stay organized when managing multiple clients?

4. Describe any experience you have with credit repair or dispute management?



Shortlisted candidates may be asked to complete a small skills test involving a sample credit report.

title: Content & Media Assistant for BOOTH Training
description:
About BOOTH Training

BOOTH Training is a coaching and content business in the performance, paddling and ocean sports space. The brand is built around high performance, athlete development, coaching insight and real world experience at the top level of the sport.



I am looking for a highly organised and capable Content & Media Assistant to help manage the flow of content behind the scenes and improve consistency across social platforms.



This is not just a basic admin role. I want someone who can take raw content, podcast recordings, ideas and notes, and turn them into polished, organised and publish ready media.



A key part of this role is helping create instructional content that teaches, builds trust and reaches a wide audience. The purpose of the content is to help people learn, improve and better understand the sport, while also supporting the growth of the business through coaching packages, clinics, technique analysis and related services.



This role will begin with BOOTH Training, but may expand over time into supporting the Michael Booth personal brand and BOOTH Watersports, depending on the strengths of the person hired.



About the Role

You will help manage content production and content admin across the business. This includes social media scheduling, short form video editing, podcast editing in Riverside, content organisation, and supporting the weekly output of the brand.



A major focus of the role is helping shape and present educational content in a clear and engaging way. The goal is to create content that is useful and instructional for a broad audience, while positioning BOOTH Training as a trusted coaching brand and creating interest in paid offers such as online coaching, clinics and technique analysis.



The ideal person is organised, efficient, creative within clear boundaries, and understands how to make content look clean, professional and consistent.



Key Responsibilities

 • Organise raw content, footage, podcast recordings and media assets

 • Edit podcast episodes using Riverside

 • Export podcast audio and video files ready for publishing

 • Repurpose podcast and long form content into short form clips for social media

 • Create simple, clean reels from existing footage

 • Help package instructional and educational content so it is clear, engaging and valuable to the audience

 • Add subtitles, captions and basic branded elements to videos

 • Build Canva graphics, carousels and story assets

 • Schedule and publish content across Instagram and

 • Format captions from voice notes, transcripts, prompts or rough ideas

 • Help keep content planned, organised and moving ahead of schedule

 • Assist with light admin related to content, media and online operations

 • Potentially support content across BOOTH Training, Michael Booth personal brand and BOOTH Watersports as the role develops



What I’m Looking For

 • Strong written and spoken English

 • High attention to detail

 • Strong organisational skills

 • Experience with short form video editing

 • Experience using Riverside for podcast editing and export

 • Confident with Canva

 • Comfortable working with Instagram and
 content workflows

 • Able to follow clear direction and maintain brand consistency

 • Reliable, responsive and proactive

 • Able to work independently once expectations are clear

 • Understands how to present content in a way that is educational, clear and useful to the audience



Highly Regarded

 • Experience working with a coach, athlete, sports brand or personal brand

 • Experience turning long form podcasts into short, engaging clips

 • Familiarity with CapCut, Premiere Pro or similar editing software

 • Understanding of clean, modern social media presentation

 • Basic copywriting skills for captions and post formatting

 • Experience with Meta Business Suite or other scheduling tools

 • Experience with educational, instructional or conversion focused content



Who This Role Would Suit

This role would suit someone who enjoys being the person behind the scenes making everything run smoothly. Someone who likes systems, clean execution, polished content and helping a brand show up consistently.



It would be especially suited to someone with experience supporting a founder, coach, creator or personal brand who needs help keeping content flowing without lowering quality.



Hours and Pay

 • Part time to begin

 • Flexible hours

 • Potential for long term ongoing work

 • Please include your hourly rate in your application



How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:

 • A short introduction about yourself

 • Your relevant experience in content support, media assistance, social media or VA work

 • Examples of short form video edits, podcast edits, Canva graphics or social media work you have created

 • Your experience using Riverside

 • Your hourly rate

 • Your availability each week

 • Please put the word BOOTH at the top of your application so I know you have read the full post



Shortlisted applicants may be asked to complete a short paid trial task.
salary: US$5 to $8 ph depending on experience

title: MULTIMEDIA ARTIST
description:

title: Graphic Designer (Canva Specialist)
description:
We are an Australian-based Digital Marketing Agency supporting health professionals with growing their businesses online, and we're looking for a creative and detail-driven Graphic Designer to join our fast-growing team.



All our staff work remotely, and the ideal candidate has a strong aesthetic eye, moves fast, and knows how to create scroll-stopping social media content that looks cohesive, professional, and on-brand. You will work closely with both our internal team and directly with clients to bring their brand vision to life.



About the Role:

This is a design-forward role where creativity meets strategy. The majority of your work will be creating Instagram content and Canva presentation slides for health professionals who're creating online courses, alongside supporting clients with their branding. If you have a natural eye for design, understand what works visually on social media, and can translate a brief into something beautiful, we want to hear from you.



Responsibilities:

- Design engaging, on-brand Instagram content (carousels, static posts, story templates, Reels covers)

- Create polished Canva presentation slides for client programs, courses, and handouts

- Develop branding assets for clients including colour palettes, font pairings, logos, and brand kits in Canva

- Collaborate with clients directly to understand their brand and execute their vision

- Work with the internal team to deliver content that aligns with client messaging and audience

- Maintain brand consistency across all design deliverables

- Manage multiple client projects simultaneously and meet deadlines without compromising quality

- Stay current on design trends, especially within the health, wellness, and online coaching space



Requirements:

- Proven experience in graphic design with a strong portfolio (please do not apply without this)

- Advanced proficiency in Canva is a must (Brand Kit setup, custom templates, presentations)

- Experience designing Instagram content that performs & you understand what stops the scroll

- Eye for typography, colour, layout, and visual storytelling

- Experience working with personal brands or online businesses, ideally in health, wellness, or coaching

- Ability to take a brief and execute independently with minimal back-and-forth

- Comfortable communicating and collaborating directly with clients in a professional manner

- Reliable, trustworthy, and strong work ethic

- Fluent in English with C1 Proficiency (Advanced)

- Highly organised with strong attention to detail

- Able to manage multiple projects and prioritise effectively



Hours & Availability:

We are looking for someone who can start at 5–8 hours per week, Monday to Friday, and must be available between 9am–6pm Philippines Time. Hours and responsibilities will increase quickly for the right candidate.



How to Apply:

If this sounds like you, please submit your application here:

???? 



Please attach your portfolio and at least two to three examples of Instagram content or branded Canva work in your application. Only applications submitted via the link above will be reviewed.

No agencies please.

title: Junior / Mid / Senior Sales & Order Support Specialist (B2B Solar Wholesale – AU Time Zone)
description:
Company: Renewables Warehouse (Australia)

Location: Work from home (Philippines)

Work Hours: Full?time, Monday–Friday, Australian business hours (Canberra/Sydney time)



About the Role

We’re a fast?growing solar / batteries / EV / electrical wholesaler based in Australia. We supply local solar installers who need stock fast and hate dealing with big, slow chains.



We’re hiring a Sales & Order Support Specialist based in the Philippines to:



Talk to our installer customers

Take and enter orders accurately

Do simple outbound follow?up calls/messages to win more orders

Support our warehouse and delivery team so trucks leave full and on time

You’ll start at the Junior level, and if you perform, you can progress to Core Specialist and then Senior / Team Lead with higher pay and more responsibility every 3–6 months.



Key Responsibilities

Order Taking & Entry



Answer inbound calls, messages, and
s from installer customers

Take down order details and enter them into our system (Odoo) accurately

Confirm products, quantities, delivery address, and delivery type

Add our Standard Install Pack (consumables bundle) to every eligible order unless the customer specifically removes it

Double?check details before finalizing orders to avoid mistakes

Outbound Follow?up & Reactivation



Call, text, or
 existing customers to:

Check what jobs they have coming up

Help them plan and place orders in advance

Reactivate customers who haven’t ordered recently

Follow simple scripts and processes (no “hard selling”)

Log every contact and outcome in the system

Scheduling Support



Work with our local dispatcher/driver to group deliveries efficiently

Confirm delivery details (address, access instructions, phone numbers)

Send simple updates/ETAs to customers when needed

Admin & Data Accuracy



Keep customer records and product details up to date in Odoo

Prepare simple daily reports:

Number of calls / messages

Orders taken

Errors found and corrected

Wins / issues from the day

Requirements

Excellent spoken and written English

At least 1 year experience in customer service, inside sales, or order processing

Comfortable making and receiving calls (B2B customers, not B2C telemarketing)

Strong attention to detail and enjoys working with checklists

Fast learner with new software (CRMs, ERPs, spreadsheets)

Nice to have:



Experience in wholesale, logistics, construction, electrical, or solar

Experience with Odoo or similar systems

Pay & Career Progression (AUD)

We believe in clear levels and fast progression for high performers.



Level 1 – Junior Sales & Order Support



Typical starting range: AUD $1,000 – $1,300 per month

Focus: learn products, systems, scripts, and achieve high accuracy

Promotion target: after 3–6 months of hitting KPIs

Level 2 – Sales & Order Support Specialist (Core Role)



Typical range: AUD $1,400 – $1,600 per month (base)

Plus performance bonus based on:

Orders processed

Accuracy

Attach rate of our Install Pack and Premium Delivery

Promotion target to Senior: after 6–12 months of consistent high performance

Level 3 – Senior Sales & Order Support / Team Lead



Typical range: AUD $1,700 – $2,000 per month (base)

Higher bonus potential based on:

Team results

Key account performance

Helping train and manage junior tea
mbers

We review performance and progression opportunities every 3–6 months. If you hit your numbers and show you can take more responsibility, you move up.



How to Apply

Subject line: Sales & Order Support – [Your Name]

Include:

Short intro and why this role fits you

Your internet speed and PC specs

A short voice recording (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself

Your previous experience with customer service / order taking / sales support

We’re looking for people who are hungry to grow, reliable every day, and care about getting the details right.

title: Podcast Video Editor & Content / Graphic Design
description:
We are hiring a Podcast Video Editor to own long-form podcast editing and publishing for ThePod.fm, plus short-form clips and supporting assets.



We provide clear guides, templates, and specs. Your job is to execute consistently, QA everything, and hit deadlines.



***READ NEXT STEPS BELOW ***



Key responsibilities:

 • Edit long-form podcast episodes (primarily online recordings, occasional in-person)

 • Multi-cam edits, clean pacing, professional polish, strong attention to detail

 • QA on audio, video, captions, framing, and brand guidelines

 • Use our AI tools to clean up and professionalise audio (training provided)

 • Create short-form clips using Opus Clip, then QA for brand consistency and quality

 • Create artwork using Canva templates (we provide guidelines and templates)

 • Create show notes to our specification

 • Prepare and distribute final assets as per our publishing checklist



Work volume:

 • Weekly volume varies. Some weeks may be 5 episodes, other weeks may be 20+.

 • When podcast volume is lighter, you will support with ad-hoc tasks such as:

 • Internal marketing graphics

 • Editing internal marketing videos for YouTube or LinkedIn



Availability and calls:

 • Must be available for 4-8 hours per day (we are flexible on schedule)

 • We measure performance on quality and meeting deadlines

 • Mandatory team calls:

 • Monday 12PM UK time

 • Thursday 12PM UK time



Requirements:

 • Clear spoken English

 • High-quality webcam for internal calls

 • High-speed, reliable WiFi

 • A computer capable of handling video editing workloads



***HOW TO APPLY***



 • Send a Loom (loom(dot)com) video (maximum 5 minutes)



In your Loom, cover:

 • Who you are

 • Your editing and creative experience 

 • Why you are a fit for this role

 • Your long-term goals and what you want to learn next so we can see how we can support you



Next step:

 • If shortlisted, you will be invited to complete a paid editing task ($10).



Applications close: 20th January 2026

title: ELITE Ecom Ads Video Editor
description:
I'm not hiring you. Let me explain why that's a good thing.



I'm a creative strategist managing multiple 7-figure monthly ad budgets across DTC ecommerce brands. My clients span premium tech accessories (100K+ customers worldwide), outdoor recreation gear, lingerie, fitted apparel, fragrance, supplements, music performance tools, home renovation services, and more. These brands operate across the US, Europe, Singapore, and Australia.



Every single one of them needs A-player editors.



They keep asking me again and again if I know anyone. And I have nobody to refer them to.



Finding editors who actually understand performance marketing is borderline impossible.



So here's what I'm doing: building a shortlist of elite editors I can refer directly to my clients whenever they need production support. You skip the client acquisition grind entirely. I send work your way because I trust your output.



What "elite" means to me



You're not just cutting clips. You understand WHY an ad works. You know what hook rate and hold rate mean. You can look at a brief and immediately see how the script maps to the viewer's emotional journey.



I'm looking for editors who check most of these boxes:

You've trained through Ecom Talent (Karlo's program on Whop), Evolve (on Skool), or similar elite-level performance marketing education. You know the difference between "pretty videos" and "videos that get spend."



You're AI-first. You use tools like Runway, Kling, Pika, Sora, or ElevenLabs to generate hyper-realistic UGC-style B-roll, voiceovers, and content that nobody can clock as synthetic.



You're not dabbling. You're deep in it.



You understand direct response fundamentals. You've at least heard of Eugene Schwartz, awareness levels, and Breakthrough Advertising. You know that every frame has a job to do.



You can read a brief and elevate it. When a strategist sends you a hook, bridge, hold section, and CTA, you bring visual storytelling instincts that make the script hit harder.



You know what it means to iterate on winners. You understand ideation vs. iteration vs. imitation. You've produced variations that isolate single variables so we can learn from test results.



Your output gets spend. Not impressions. Not compliments. Actual ad spend allocation fro
ta's algorithm because the creative is performing.



What's in it for you

You're walking into accounts that already have strategy, sub-avatars, creative roadmaps, and structured briefs ready to go.



The briefs follow a structured format: hook variations with visual context, inspiration examples,
 copy, headlines, and clear concept direction. Your job is to bring it to life.





How to apply

Important: Start your proposal with the word "Schwartz" so I know you've read this entire post. Proposals that don't include this will be skipped.



You can charge whatever you want. I will give your offer to my clients and they will pay you directly through Upwork.



Then cover the following:



Your experience editing performance ads for ecom brands (not brand films, not music videos, not wedding reels. Actual direct response ads that ran on Meta or TikTok).



Whether you've gone through Ecom Talent, Evolve, or any structured training on performance creative.



Your AI toolkit. What tools do you use and how deep are you? I want specifics.



A link to 2-3 ads you've edited that actually got significant spend. Bonus points if you can share the hook rate or ROAS.

Your availability and hourly rate.



I'm building a roster of the best editors in ecom performance. If that's you, let's connect.

title: Google Ads Specialist
description:
Apply here: 



About the Company

Join a leading UK performance-marketing agency running two fast-growing brands—one focused on scalable paid media for e-commerce and service businesses, and the other specializing in local lead generation for home-improvement and trade clients. With over 10 years of trusted client partnerships and bold growth plans to double revenue within 24 months, this agency is built on ownership, reliability, and proactive problem-solving.



Key Responsibilities:

- Manage, optimise, and scale multiple Google Ads accounts for e-commerce and lead-gen clients.

- Maintain strong performance against CPA, ROAS, and conversion targets.

- Audit accounts regularly to identify new growth opportunities.

- Lead client calls, presenting actionable insights and clear performance updates.

- Implement effective funnel strategies to improve lead quality and conversion efficiency.

- Set up, monitor, and troubleshoot GA4 tracking and GTM tags to ensure accurate attribution.

- Collaborate with the internal creative and strategy teams to enhance campaign performance.

- Proactively recommend process improvements and contribute to the agency’s growth strategy.



Requirements

- 3–5+ years of hands-on Google Ads management (agency experience strongly preferred).

- Proven expertise in lead-generation and e-commerce campaigns.

- Proficiency in GA4 and Google Tag Manager (GTM), including event tracking and conversion setup.

- Strong data interpretation and analytical reporting skills.

- Excellent spoken and written English; confident presenting to clients.

- Ability to juggle multiple accounts independently and maintain consistent quality.

- Reliable internet connection and availability for UK business-hour overlap (4–5 hours daily).

- Personality fit: proactive, detail-oriented, transparent, and driven to improve systems and processes.

title: Sales Development Representative (4+ years experience)
description:
Join Huzzle’s Talent Pool as an Appointment Setter! 



Apply here: 



At Huzzle, we connect top-tier Appointment Setters & SDRs with leading companies across the UK, US, and Europe. Whether it’s a startup, scale-up, agency, or enterprise, our clients trust us to find the best talent. We only admit the top 3% of candidates into our talent pool, ensuring they are matched with exclusive, long-term opportunities. Unlike an outsourcing agency, we place you directly with a client where you’re hired in-house to work full-time as a valued member of their team.



WHO THIS IS FOR:

You're looking to:

• Work with top-tier clients in the industry and secure long-term, stable opportunities.

• Advance your career through access to exclusive roles and ongoing professional development.

• Be valued and respected for your skills and contributions in a supportive work environment.

• Earn a competitive salary with regular pay increases and success-based bonuses.

• Stop fighting for opportunities across different platforms, and let us match you with roles where we believe you'll excel.



And if you're:

• Tired of job-hopping and want a stable, long-term position.

• Frustrated by lack of support or training in previous roles.

• Looking for meaningful work where your contributions are recognized and rewarded.

• Eager to work full-time for a reputable company that values your expertise.



What We Offer:

Competitive Pay: Starting at 37K PHP/month with regular pay raises and success-based bonuses:

• Month 1: 37K PHP/month + bonus

• Month 3: 40.7K PHP/month + bonus

• Month 6: 44.4K PHP/month + bonus

• Month 9: 46.25K PHP/month + bonus 

Exclusive Access: Work with top companies and enjoy long-term client relationships.

Work from Anywhere: Enjoy the flexibility of working remotely, from the comfort of your home.



Your Role as an Appointment Setter:

• Proactive Outreach: Engage potential clients and partners through phone,
, and social media platforms.

• Seamless Scheduling: Coordinate meetings and manage calendars for the sales teams, ensuring a smooth experience for both the team and potential clients.

• CRM Mastery: Keep meticulous records of all interactions, appointments, and follow-up activities in a CRM system.

• Database Management: Regularly update and review the contact database to maintain accuracy and relevancy.

• Active Communication: Collaborate with sales and marketing to understand offerings and effectively communicate the value proposition.

• Optimize & Succeed: Monitor appointment success rates and work closely with the team to refine strategies for higher conversions.

• Industry Savvy: Stay updated on industry trends to engage clients effectively and address their needs.





Who We're Looking For:

• Experience: At least 4  years of experience with Appointment Setting, Cold Calling, and Outbound Messaging (LinkedIn, Cold
s).

• Sales Tools Proficiency: Familiarity with relevant sales and outreach tools (CRMs, Prospecting Tools, Automation Tools, etc).

• Communication Skills: Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to build rapport with clients.

• Organizational Skills: Excellent time management and the ability to juggle multiple schedules.

• Tech-Savvy: Proficiency in Google Docs, Google Sheets, CRM systems, and communication tools like Slack, ChatGPT, Zoom, and LinkedIn.

• Remote Ready: Able to work effectively in a remote environment with a reliable laptop and internet connection.

• Detail-Oriented: A keen eye for detail and a commitment to maintaining high-quality data in systems.



 Our Hiring Process:

• Step 1: Screening Interview

• Step 2: Take-home Task

• Step 3: Successful candidates are admitted to our talent pool, gaining access to exclusive opportunities.

• Step 4: We match you with a client for a final interview.





Application Requirements:

1. Make sure the Subject of the application is the name of the Capital City of Canada otherwise your application won't be reviewed.

2. Share your Resume/CV and any relevant experience / projects you've worked on.

3. Send anything else that can set you apart!

WHO THIS IS FOR:

You're looking to:

• Work with top-tier clients in the industry and secure long-term, stable opportunities.

• Advance your career through access to exclusive roles and ongoing professional development.

• Be valued and respected for your skills and contributions in a supportive work environment.

• Earn a competitive salary with regular pay increases and success-based bonuses.

• Stop fighting for opportunities across different platforms, and let us match you with roles where we believe you'll excel.



And if you're:

• Tired of job-hopping and want a stable, long-term position.

• Frustrated by lack of support or training in previous roles.

• Looking for meaningful work where your contributions are recognized and rewarded.

• Eager to work full-time for a reputable company that values your expertise.



What We Offer:

Competitive Pay: Starting at 37K PHP/month with regular pay raises and success-based bonuses:

• Month 1: 37K PHP/month + bonus

• Month 3: 40.7K PHP/month + bonus

• Month 6: 44.4K PHP/month + bonus

• Month 9: 46.25K PHP/month + bonus

Exclusive Access: Work with top companies and enjoy long-term client relationships.

Work from Anywhere: Enjoy the flexibility of working remotely, from the comfort of your home.



Your Role as an Appointment Setter:

• Proactive Outreach: Engage potential clients and partners through phone,
, and social media platforms.

• Seamless Scheduling: Coordinate meetings and manage calendars for the sales teams, ensuring a smooth experience for both the team and potential clients.

• CRM Mastery: Keep meticulous records of all interactions, appointments, and follow-up activities in a CRM system.

• Database Management: Regularly update and review the contact database to maintain accuracy and relevancy.

• Active Communication: Collaborate with sales and marketing to understand offerings and effectively communicate the value proposition.

• Optimize & Succeed: Monitor appointment success rates and work closely with the team to refine strategies for higher conversions.

• Industry Savvy: Stay updated on industry trends to engage clients effectively and address their needs.





Who We're Looking For:

• Experience: At least 4 years of experience with Appointment Setting, Cold Calling, and Outbound Messaging (LinkedIn, Cold
s).

• Sales Tools Proficiency: Familiarity with relevant sales and outreach tools (CRMs, Prospecting Tools, Automation Tools, etc).

• Communication Skills: Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to build rapport with clients.

• Organizational Skills: Excellent time management and the ability to juggle multiple schedules.

• Tech-Savvy: Proficiency in Google Docs, Google Sheets, CRM systems, and communication tools like Slack, ChatGPT, Zoom, and LinkedIn.

• Remote Ready: Able to work effectively in a remote environment with a reliable laptop and internet connection.

• Detail-Oriented: A keen eye for detail and a commitment to maintaining high-quality data in systems.



Our Hiring Process:

• Submit Your Application

• Screening AI Video Interview (15 min max)

• Final Face-to-Face Interview

• Successful candidates are admitted to our talent pool, gaining access to exclusive opportunities.

• We match you with a client for a final interview

1. Make sure the Subject of the application is the name of the Capital City of Canada otherwise your application won't be reviewed.

2. Share your Resume/CV and any relevant experience / projects you've worked on.

3. Send anything else that can set you apart!

title: Macro Influencer Outreach Specialist (Fashion Brand)
description:
We’re seeking an experienced, analytical, and creative Macro Influencer Outreach Specialist to help scale our fast-growing

streetwear brand.



This is more than just an outreach; we want someone who understands youth culture, knows how to build authentic

relationships, communicates clearly (written and spoken), and is committed to delivering quality influencer partnerships

that drive results.



If you’re organized, data-driven, patient, and have a proven track record managing influencer campaigns end-to-end, we

want to hear from you.



Key Responsibilities:

Lead daily outreach and relationship-building with influencers and creators, ensuring clear and professional

communication at all times.

Proactively scout and identify emerging, culturally relevant talent that embodies our streetwear aesthetic and resonates

with our target audience.

Manage influencer partnerships end-to-end, including negotiation, briefing, and nurturing long-term relationships.

Develop and maintain a detailed tracker of influencer outreach, partnerships, performance history, and affiliate activities.

Monitor and motivate affiliate partners to drive engagement, ensure consistent performance, and encourage higher

conversion rates.

Monitor, analyze, and report on performance metrics (reach, engagement, conversions) with a focus on continuous

optimization.

Collaborate closely with internal teams to ensure influencer and affiliate initiatives are aligned with brand objectives and

campaign goals.



Requirements:

2+ years of hands-on macro influencer marketing experience, ideally in fashion or streetwear.

Strong written and verbal communication skills. Clear, persuasive, and professional.

Excellent negotiation and relationship management abilities.

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and data-driven, with a strong analytical mindset.

Deep understanding of youth culture, streetwear trends, and the influencer landscape.

Patient, diligent, and committed to sourcing quality influencers, not just quantity.

A proven ability to track and document previous campaigns, results, and learnings.



What We’re Looking For:

A proven track record of successful influencer campaigns. We expect you to send us a tracker or portfolio showcasing

Your previous work.

Strong analytical and reporting skills, with the ability to turn data into actionable insights.

An existing network of influencer contacts or a clear strategy for sourcing culturally aligned, high-quality talent quickly.

Cultural awareness and an instinct for trend-spotting.

A patient, thoughtful approach to vetting influencers to ensure brand alignment.



How to Apply? Please record a 2–4 minute video answering the following questions:



If you joined our team tomorrow, how would you find Macro Influencers that can generate content suitable for paid advertising for a fashion brand within your first 30 days?



Applications without a video will not be reviewed.

title: Customer Support Specialist
description:
Important Instructions Before Applying:



Applicants with previous experience supporting schools or working with educational technology organizations in the K–12 environment will be prioritized.



Please use “SPECIALIST” as the subject line when submitting your application.



Include a short cover letter and make sure to provide a working link to your resume or CV in your application.



?



Role Summary

We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Customer Support Specialist to join our growing team. In this role, you will act as the primary contact for customers who need assistance using our platform. 



As the team expands, this position will also play an important role in helping shape and improve our support workflows and documentation.





Scope of Work

-Handle incoming customer support requests and provide accurate, professional, and timely assistance.

-Help customers resolve common issues such as navigation questions, feature usage, login or access concerns, and basic troubleshooting.

-Escalate more complex cases when necessary and ensure they are followed through until resolution.

-Track and organize support inquiries to identify patterns, recurring issues, and opportunities for improvement.

-Analyze support activity such as ticket volume, resolution timelines, and user feedback to provide insights that help improve the support experience.

-Create and maintain customer support resources, including help guides and internal documentation.

-Contribute to team initiatives and assist in other support-related tasks when needed.





Qualifications and Ideal Traits

-Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal is a MUST

-Experience working as a customer support or technical support is a MUST

-Experience working in a fast-paced and rapidly changing environment 

-Hands-on experience with a ticket-based support system is an advantage

-Strong analytical thinking, with the ability to recognize patterns and recurring issues across customer requests

-Clear and professional communication style with strong attention to grammar, tone, and clarity

-Strong problem-solving skills and a proactive approach when investigating and resolving issues

-Highly organized and capable of managing multiple tasks while maintaining accuracy and attention to detail

-Ability to work collaboratively with different teams and coordinate effectively across departments

-Motivated to help organizations operate more efficiently and make better use of their time, resources, and people





Work Setup

-Full-time remote position

-8 hours per shift

-5 days per week

title: Patient Care Coordinator
description:
We are looking for a highly motivated and experienced Remote Patient Services Representative based in the Philippines. The ideal candidate will manage inbound and outbound calls, assist patients with scheduling appointments, address inquiries, and perform other related tasks to ensure a seamless patient experience.



Key Responsibilities:

• Answer incoming calls promptly and professionally.

• Schedule, reschedule, and confirm patient appointments using our electronic health record (EHR) system.

• Provide accurate information regarding services, insurance, and payment options.

• Address patient inquiries and concerns with empathy and efficiency.

• Maintain and update patient records with a high degree of accuracy.

• Collaborate with the optometry team to ensure optimal patient care.



Performance Metrics:

To ensure excellence in patient service, the following performance metrics will be used to evaluate success in this role:

• Average Handle Time (AHT): The average duration of a patient interaction, including talk time, hold time, and after-call work. Efficiently managing AHT ensures timely assistance to patients while maintaining service quality. ?

• Quality Score: Assessment of call quality based on adherence to protocols, accuracy of information provided, and overall patient interaction effectiveness. High-quality scores reflect a commitment to excellence in patient care.

• Patient Satisfaction Score: A measure of patient contentment with the service provided, often gathered through post-interaction surveys. High scores indicate successful patient engagement and issue resolution.

• Service Level: The percentage of calls answered within a specified timeframe, reflecting the ability to meet patient demand promptly. Maintaining a high service level ensures patient satisfaction and loyalty. ?

• Appointment Scheduling Rate: The efficiency and accuracy in scheduling patient appointments, ensuring optimal utilization of clinic time and resources.



Qualifications:

• Proven experience in a customer service role, preferably in a medical or optometry setting.

• Exceptional verbal and written English communication skills.

• Familiarity with EHR systems and medical scheduling software is a plus.

• Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

• Ability to work independently and manage time effectively.

• Stable internet connection and a quiet workspace conducive to professional phone conversations.



Work Schedule:

• Full-time position.

• Must be available to work U.S. business hours, including potential evening shifts to accommodate different time zones.



To Qualify, please complete the Assessment below:



1. Application form: wkf.ms/45nfpCJ

2. Complete this assessment: 
/link/index/JB-BYUGHNDRC?u=

title: Bookkeeper
description:
Job Title: Bookkeeper (US-Based Operations)



We are seeking a sharp, proactive, and highly experienced Bookkeeper to take full ownership of our financial records. This isn't just a data entry role; we need a "numbers architect" who catches what others miss, operates with total autonomy, and treats our ledger like a high-stakes puzzle they are determined to solve.



If you are a QuickBooks expert who thrives in a fast-paced environment and prides yourself on presenting insights before they are even requested, you’re exactly who we’re looking for.



Key Responsibilities



Full-Cycle Bookkeeping: Complete oversight of QuickBooks, including sophisticated AP/AR management, complex journal entries, and meticulous ledger maintenance.

Proactive Reporting: Prepare and present monthly P&L, Balance Sheets, and Cash Flow statements with executive-level clarity.

Process Optimization: Audit current workflows to identify "bottlenecks" and implement streamlined, automated processes for maximum efficiency.

Advanced Reconciliation: Handle high-volume bank and credit card reconciliations with 100?curacy, investigating and resolving discrepancies independently.

US Compliance: Manage financial records in accordance with US standards, ensuring readiness for year-end tax preparation and audits.

Platform Integration: Quickly master and integrate secondary platforms (payroll, time-tracking, or inventory) with QuickBooks.



What We’re Looking For:



Experience: Proven track record (3+ years preferred) as a Bookkeeper or Accountant, specifically working with US-based companies.

QuickBooks Expert: You are a power user. You know the shortcuts, the advanced reporting features, and how to troubleshoot the software's quirks.

High Autonomy: You don't need a task list. You see what needs to be done, you do it, and you report the results.

Analytical Mindset: You don’t just move numbers; you understand what they mean for the business and can explain "the why" to leadership.



Tech-Agile: You learn new software at lightning speed and are always looking for tools to make bookkeeping faster and more accurate.



To Qualify – Complete the Assessment and Application Form:

1. Assessment: 
/o/JB-E0PIHSF1P/landing?u=
. Application Form: wkf.ms/45nfpCJ



Note: Both the assessment and the application form must be completed to be considered for this role.
