title: YouTube Video Editor & Strategist
description:
We are an Australian-based Digital Marketing Agency supporting health professionals with growing their businesses online, and we're looking for a talented, creative, and tech-savvy YouTube Video Editor & Strategist to join our fast-growing team.



The ideal candidate is driven, detail-oriented, fluent in written and spoken English, and passionate about creating video content that actually performs.



About the Role:

This is more than just an editing job. You'll be responsible for editing both long-form and short-form YouTube videos, optimising our YouTube channel for growth, and editing course videos for our clients. If you have a sharp creative eye, move fast, and understand what makes content stop the scroll and grow a channel, we want to hear from you.



Responsibilities:

- Edit long-form YouTube videos into polished, engaging content that holds attention

- Create short-form clips (YouTube Shorts, Reels) that are dynamic 

- Develop and implement YouTube channel strategy to grow views, watch time, and subscribers

- Optimise videos for YouTube SEO (titles, descriptions, tags, thumbnails)

- Edit online course videos for clients (up to 15 minutes per video) to a clean, professional standard

- Incorporate trending audio, visuals, and storytelling techniques to keep content fresh

- Collaborate with the team to ensure all content aligns with branding and messaging

- Stay current on YouTube trends, algorithm updates, and best practices



Requirements:

- Proven experience editing YouTube content with a strong portfolio (please do not apply without this)

- Expertise in video editing software (Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, Descript, or similar)

- Strong understanding of YouTube's algorithm, SEO, audience retention, and growth strategy

- Experience editing content for online businesses, coaches, or digital agencies

- Creative eye for design, pacing, and storytelling (you know what looks good and what doesn't)

- Ability to work fast without sacrificing quality

- Reliable, trustworthy, and strong work ethic

- Fluent in English with C1 Proficiency (Advanced)

- Highly organised with the ability to work independently and manage your own workload

- Tech-savvy and willing to learn new tools as needed



Hours & Availability:

We are looking for someone who can start at 5-10 hours per week, Monday to Friday, and must be available between 9am–6pm Philippines Time. Hours and responsibilities will increase quickly for the right candidate.



How to Apply:

If this sounds like you, please submit your application here:

???? 
/to/y3RzZ726



Please attach your portfolio and at least two examples of YouTube or short-form video work in your application.

Only applications submitted via the link above will be reviewed. No agencies please.

title: Project manager
description:
SENIOR PROJECT MANAGER / DIGITAL OPERATIONS MANAGER



Lead Generation • Marketing Systems • Web Development



Remote Position – Philippines



We are an international company operating in the luxury medical skincare and aesthetics industry, currently expanding globally and seeking a highly skilled Project Manager / Digital Operations Manager.



This role is not simply administrative.

We are looking for a technical and marketing-oriented project manager who understands lead generation systems, digital marketing platforms, and marketing automation tools.



The ideal candidate will help coordinate and optimize marketing operations for our international brands.



Our company operates in:



• Medical skincare and regenerative aesthetics

• Med spa marketing and lead generation

• Luxury cosmetic products

• E-commerce and international distribution

• Digital brand development



Our flagship brands include Jouvence Éternelle and Jouvence MD, premium Swiss medical-grade skincare companies specializing in advanced regenerative technologies such as exosomes, NAD+, peptides, and growth factor formulations.



We work with:



• Med spas

• Dermatology practices

• Luxury salons

• International distributors



?



POSITION OVERVIEW



The Project Manager / Digital Operations Manager will oversee marketing systems, digital campaigns, and operational workflows while working directly with leadership.



This position requires someone who understands how modern digital marketing ecosystems work, including paid advertising, CRM automation, funnel systems, and website development.



You will coordinate marketing activities, optimize lead generation systems, and ensure projects move efficiently from planning to execution.



?

 / Instagram) advertising campaigns

Experience with med spa or local lead generation campaigns is a strong advantage.



?



Marketing Automation & CRM Systems

GoHighLevel

 and SMS automation campaigns

Experience managing marketing automation and client pipelines is essential.



?



Digital Advertising Coordination



The candidate must have experience coordinating or managing:



• Meta Ads 
 & Instagram Ads Manager)

• Google Ads campaigns



Responsibilities include:



• Coordinating campaign launches

• Monitoring performance metrics

• Managing creative testing

• Tracking lead acquisition costs

• Coordinating with designers and ad specialists



This role does not necessarily require running campaigns personally but requires deep understanding of campaign structure and optimization.



?



Website Development & Design Coordination

Responsibilities include:

• Updating website content and structure



Experience with platforms such as:



• WordPress

• Shopify

• Landing page builders

• Funnel builders



Basic knowledge of UX, UI, and conversion optimization is required.



?



Project Management & Workflow Systems



You will coordinate projects across marketing, web development, and operations.



Responsibilities include:



• Creating and managing project timelines

• Assigning tasks to tea
mbers

• Tracking deliverables

• Managing workflows and deadlines

• Providing weekly project reports



Experience with project management tools such as:



• ClickUp

• Asana

• Monday

• Notion

• Trello



?



Remote Team Coordination



You will coordinate and manage a remote team that may include:



• Marketing specialists

• Ad managers

• Designers

• Web developers

• Virtual assistants

• Lead generation specialists

• Call center agents



Your role is to ensure clear communication, accountability, and efficient workflow.



?



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE



Applicants must have experience with:



• Lead generation systems

• Meta Ads platform

• Google Ads platform

• GoHighLevel CRM

• Marketing automation systems

• Landing page development

• Web design coordination

Candidates without experience in lead generation systems and CRM automation will not be considered.



?



REQUIRED SKILLS



The ideal candidate should demonstrate:

• Excellent written and spoken English

IDEAL BACKGROUND

Experience supporting international companies or U.S. businesses is highly valued.

title: Customer Experience & Operations Associate (E-commerce Coffee Company) *Full Time, Remote | Long-Term Growth Opportunity
description:
Are you ready…

To start a role that motivates and excites you?

And a position where we invest in your learning, education, and growth?



Then keep reading, we want to work with you!





WHY YOU’LL LOVE THIS POSITION:

This is not your typical support role — you’ll work directly with our founders, influence company-wide systems, and gain exposure to every part of the business.



Incredible company culture:

• Small, close team with collaborative, friendly and open culture.

• We believe the biggest asset of a company is our people. We focus on helping each tea
mber reach their full potential by investing in their learning, growth, skills, and education. When we grow as individuals, we succeed as a team.

• Not a fan of office politics or drama? We’re on the same page. Instead of wasting time with that, we focus on solving problems and reaching goals

• 100% remote, enjoy the comfort and flexibility of working from home



Pay, benefits, progression, and long-term growth:

• Competitive salary

• Benefits including up to 16 days a year Paid Time off

• Progression as we grow: greater responsibilities, leadership opportunities, and increased pay.

• Feel empowered, make decisions, have an impact

• Grow with the company and live up to your potential!

• Join an exciting, fast-growing company!







ABOUT US:

We’re a young, ambitious, and small (but growing!) company that’s making a massive impact in ecommerce. 



Since 2015 we’ve been obsessed with building award-winning products and awesome brands that people fall in love with. We have 2 primary brands in our portfolio: 

(1) an international award-winning coffee products brand 
 / 
).

(2) an educational coaching program that helps entrepreneurs grow their businesses to create a positive impact in the world!



Our two recent flagship products became the world’s most successful launches in their categories. We’ve shipped more than 200,000 orders worldwide and we’re continuing to expand.



Our culture is transparent and candid. You’re always welcome (and encouraged!) to ask questions or express a difference of opinion. Learning and growth is a cornerstone of our culture, both personally and professionally. We work hard, and we have fun!







WHO WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

We’re looking for a proactive and detail-oriented team player to fill this role—someone who thrives on solving problems, staying organized, and making things run smoothly across departments.



Do you love helping customers, supporting a team, and keeping operations organized? Do you get satisfaction from making systems work better and “getting things done”? If yes, we want you on our team!



You’re probably the type of person who:

• Enjoys supporting others and finding solutions to problems

• Has strong communication and organizational skills

• Likes working behind the scenes to make sure everything runs like clockwork

• Is excited to wear multiple hats and be part of a growing, fast-moving company

• Has worked directly with founders or in a startup, and enjoys that fast-paced, flexible vibe

We’re not just looking for someone who can support our team, we’re looking for someone to be proactive with taking ownership of tasks, solve problems independently, and grow into larger responsibilities over time.







YOUR OPPORTUNITY AND ROLE ON THE TEAM:

Our culture is collaborative, friendly, and open. We hire people who are smart, ambitious, and have a strong desire to learn and grow.



Sound like you? This is an exciting long-term opportunity!



This is a fully remote position. You’ll work directly with our founders and collaborate with our small but mighty team to support customer happiness, streamline operations, and take on projects that help the business grow. 



This is a foundational role — one where you’ll gain visibility into all parts of the company.



As you grow, your role will grow with you, based on your interests and strengths:

• Want to work improving our systems and processes? Awesome!

• Have ideas on how to improve our website? Fantastic!

• Want to learn how to manage projects? Let’s go!



We’re not just hiring for a role — we’re hiring for potential. 



Your responsibilities will span 4 key areas: customer experience (30-40%), operations/logistics (20-30%), executive support (10-20%), and special projects (10-20%) — giving you exposure across the business. These percentages are estimates and you can expect your day-to-day to shift and evolve as the business grows and as you take ownership. 



1. Customer Experience

• Provide
/chat-based support for our customers across our channels (Shopify, Amazon, and wholesale)

• Answer order and product questions, resolve issues promptly, and ensure customers feel heard and supported

• Support wholesale partners with order updates, invoicing, and coordination



2. Order Management & Platform Coordination

• Manage, monitor, and troubleshoot orders across Shopify, Amazon, and wholesale channels

• Troubleshoot and resolve shipping or fulfillment issues with partners and customers

• Maintain accurate product listings, inventory data, and logistics information across platforms



3. Executive & Admin Support

• Manage founder and team inboxes, schedule meetings, and organize internal documentation

• Assist with travel bookings, meeting preparation, and note-taking

• Support small projects by tracking timelines, managing tasks, and ensuring follow-through



4. Special Projects & Company Operations

• Conduct research projects to support decision-making (tools, systems, competitors)

• Support lead generation efforts through identifying new wholesale prospects, brand partners, or influencers

• Support planning and execution of events, expos, or marketing campaigns — manage timelines, logistics, and tasks

• Document and maintain SOPs for operational clarity and training

• Test and troubleshoot web pages, workflows, or customer journeys to ensure quality and functionality

• Take ownership of ad hoc “figure it out” tasks — we’ll guide you, but we value initiative and independent problem-solving mindset



You’ll be trained on all platforms and tools, and we’ll support your learning — but we’re looking for someone who’s excited to take initiative and build systems along the way. This role evolves — as you grow, so will your responsibilities.







ABOUT YOU / REQUIRED SKILLS OR EXPERIENCE:

We value curiosity, reliability, and the ability to take ownership. If you enjoy figuring things out, learning on the job, and taking initiative, you’ll thrive here. This role is not a fit if you need constant direction or struggle to manage your own time.



Must have experience:

• 2+ years of experience in a customer service or operations support role 
/chat-based)

• 1+ years experience in eCommerce environments (Shopify, Amazon, etc.)

• Fluent in written and spoken English



Key traits:

• Strong detail orientation, organizational, and time-management skills — you’re detail-obsessed and on top of things

• Proactive problem-solver — you take initiative, do the research, and follow through

• Able to work independently, ask questions when needed, and communicate clearly

• Comfortable with constructive feedback and direct, respectful communication



Optional but a big plus:

• Experience coordinating projects, events, or marketing campaigns is a plus

• Experience with executive assistant work 
/calendar/travel management)

• Experience improving or documenting processes (SOPs)

• Experience at a startup or small business where you wore multiple hats

• “Experience coordinating projects, events, or marketing campaigns is a plus”







PAY, WORKING HOURS, HOW TO APPLY

If this description seems like it’s too intimidating for you, this position is probably not for you. However, if you’re still here reading and this sounds exciting for you, we’d love to meet you!



The full time monthly salary will be $
based on your skills and level of relevant experience. Being a member of our team has other benefits including up to 16 days of paid time off per year.



We understand you may have a busy schedule, so we’ve made our interview process extremely quick and efficient. 



To apply, please follow the steps below:

1. Get started with a quick Initial Screening here for us to get to know you: 

2. Complete the screening and we’ll be in touch with next steps once we receive it.





The position is on a first come first review basis, so the sooner you complete the screening, the more likely you'll get hired.



Good luck, and we hope to have someone awesome like you to join us!

title: Digital Marketer - Creatives & Website Management (Remote)
description:
Please follow the application instructions below.



About PropFix.ie



PropFix.ie is Ireland's trusted property maintenance specialist, offering comprehensive solutions with years of expertise across the construction and renovation sectors. We transform spaces through our diverse range of services, from handyman solutions and office fit-outs to complete renovations, house extensions, and specialized installations including doors, floors, and partitions.



Our commitment to delivering the best value property maintenance has established us as a reliable partner for residential and commercial clients nationwide. With decades of experience, including 50 years of expertise in garage conversions, we pride ourselves on impeccable craftsmanship, turning our clients' visions into reality while ensuring their properties remain in top condition.



Role Overview

We are seeking a creative and results-driven Digital Marketing Specialist to join our dynamic team. This role focuses on enhancing our online presence, managing multi-platform social media campaigns, and driving lead generation through strategic digital marketing initiatives. The successful candidate will be responsible for improving website visibility, creating engaging content, and managing targeted advertising campaigns across various platforms to expand our reach and grow our client base.



Key Responsibilities

SEO & Website Optimization



Search Engine Optimization: Improve website ranking and visibility through strategic SEO implementation

Keyword Research: Identify and apply high-converting search terms to maximize organic reach

Content Optimization: Ensure all web content is optimized for search engines and user engagement



Social Media Management



Platform Management: Manage and optimize
, Instagram, and TikTok accounts for maximum engagement

Content Creation: Produce engaging posts, graphics, and short videos that align with brand messaging

Community Management: Respond to comments, inquiries, and messages across all social platforms in a timely and professional manner

Brand Consistency: Ensure consistent messaging and visual identity across all platforms



Digital Advertising & Campaign Management



Paid Advertising: Run targeted ads on Meta 
/Instagram), Google, and TikTok platforms

Campaign Development: Create and manage comprehensive digital marketing campaigns, with particular focus on fitness studio and related sectors

Performance Tracking: Monitor, analyze, and report on campaign performance and conversions

Budget Management: Optimize ad spend and ROI across all advertising platforms



Content Management & Brand Development



Content Upload: Upload creatives, blogs, and campaign updates across digital platforms

Visual Content: Design and produce graphics, videos, and other visual content for marketing campaigns

Brand Messaging: Maintain consistent brand voice and messaging across all marketing materials



Required Skills & Experience

Technical Requirements



Digital Marketing: Proven experience in digital marketing, social media management, and online advertising

Platform Expertise: Hands-on experience with
 Ads Manager, Google Ads, TikTok Ads, and social media management tools

SEO Knowledge: Strong understanding of SEO principles, keyword research, and website optimization techniques

Analytics: Proficiency with Google Analytics, social media insights, and performance tracking tools



Creative Skills



Content Creation: Experience in creating engaging social media content, graphics, and short-form videos

title: Bookkeeper
description:
Join Our Remote Accounting Team!

We are a fast-growing, boutique outsourced accounting firm supporting high-growth e-commerce and service-based businesses. While our name remains confidential for now, we’ve been behind the scenes helping some of the most exciting DTC brands scale with confidence through expert bookkeeping, financial systems, and strategic insights.



We are a remote-first company with a collaborative, client-first culture — and we’re looking for exceptional talent to grow with us.



We’re seeking a detail-oriented, tech-savvy E-commerce Bookkeeper to manage financial records, process transactions, and generate critical reports to support client decision-making. You’ll play a key role in ensuring books are accurate, clean, and up-to-date — and bring clarity to fast-moving businesses.



What You’ll Be Doing

As our Bookkeeper, you’ll support multiple clients with day-to-day accounting operations, reconciling accounts, and managing both AP and AR functions.



Your Core Responsibilities:

- Record and categorize financial transactions using QuickBooks Online

- Reconcile bank, credit card, and merchant accounts

- Prepare and analyze financial reports (P&L, Balance Sheets, Cash Flow Statements)

- Perform invoicing, collections, and accounts receivable tracking

- Process bills and manage accounts payable workflows

- Process payroll and ensure timely tax remittances

- Track and maintain accurate inventory accounting records

- Communicate with clients via dedicated channels (Slack,
, Meetings)

- Support ad hoc bookkeeping and administrative needs as required



What You’ll Bring to the Table

**Experience & Skills:

- 3+ years of experience as a Bookkeeper

- Advanced QuickBooks Online skills are required

- Strong grasp of inventory tracking and accounting best practices

- Experience reconciling financial data across multiple platforms

- Experience with NetSuite is required

- Proficient with Google Workspace, Excel, and Word

- Experience working with e-commerce or service-based businesses is a plus

**Communication & Work Environment:

- Advanced English skills (written and spoken – C1 level preferred)

- Strong attention to detail and time management

- Clear communicator who can work independently and manage deadlines

- Tech-savvy and comfortable with remote collaboration tools



What’s In It For You?

- 100% Remote Work - Work from anywhere in the Philippines. No more long commutes or stressful traffic. Spend more quality time with your loved ones and thrive in the comfort of your own home.

- Long-Term Career Growth – With opportunities to scale into higher leadership roles.

Competitive Pay – $10/hr + benefits as an independent contractor

- Supportive Culture – Work alongside a leadership team that values transparency, innovation, and your ideas.

- Positive, People-First Vibes – We believe in balance, fun, and thriving together.

- Annual Performance Reviews – Your growth gets recognized and rewarded.



Ready to Keep the Books Clean & Clients Confident?

If you’re obsessed with accuracy, enjoy structure, and love bringing order to financial chaos — this role is for you. Join our growing team of professionals who value excellence, clarity, and results.

title: Senior TikTok Shop & Social Media Marketing Specialist
description:
About Velomix



Velomix is a top-performing fitness brand and the #1 best-selling protein shaker brand on Amazon US. We dominate the shaker bottle category on Amazon and are now rapidly expanding into TikTok Shop and creator-driven social commerce.

We are looking for a Senior TikTok Shop & Social Media Marketing Specialist to help lead the growth of Velomix across TikTok Shop and our social media channels.

This role is ideal for someone who understands social commerce, creator ecosystems, and content-driven marketing, and wants to take ownership of scaling a brand..

You will work directly with the founders and growth team, helping build and scale Velomix’s social commerce presence.



Role Overview

Position: Senior TikTok Shop & Social Media Marketing Specialist

Type: Full-Time, Remote (Exclusive Role)



Primary Focus

• TikTok Shop growth and performance

 • Creator and influencer partnerships

 • Social media content strategy



Secondary Channels

• Instagram,
, Youtube and etc

 •
 marketing support 

-  Experience handling Shopify operation



This is a high-ownership role responsible for helping drive revenue growth through social commerce and creator marketing.

You will contribute to both strategy and execution, ensuring Velomix continues to grow across social platforms.



Key Responsibilities

TikTok Shop Growth & Optimization (Primary Focus)

• Manage and optimize TikTok Shop product listings (titles, images, videos, bundles, descriptions)

 • Monitor pricing, promotions, and stock availability

 • Improve product page conversion through testing and optimization

 • Identify growth opportunities within TikTok Shop

 • Support the development of strategies to increase views, clicks, and conversions



Creator & Influencer Partnerships

• Identify and recruit TikTok creators aligned with the brand

 • Build relationships with creators and affiliates

 • Coordinate product seeding and creator collaborations

 • Track creator content and campaign performance

 • Help scale creator-driven sales through TikTok Shop



Social Media Content Strategy

• Identify trends and viral content opportunities

 • Work with editors and designers to guide content direction

 • Help develop content formats that perform well on TikTok

 • Repurpose high-performing content for Instagram and YouTube



Social Commerce Operations

• Monitor orders, disputes, returns, and customer messages

 • Respond to customers professionally and on-brand

 • Ensure product listings, pricing, and promotions remain accurate

 • Escalate operational issues to the operations team when needed



Performance Tracking & Reporting

• Track views, clicks, conversions, and creator performance

 • Identify top-performing creators and content formats

 • Provide weekly insights and performance updates

 • Recommend improvements based on data and platform trends



What We’re Looking For

Must-Have

• 3–5+ years experience in social media, influencer marketing, or eCommerce marketing

 • Strong understanding of TikTok/Tiktok Shop and creator-driven platforms

 • Experience managing creator outreach or influencer campaigns

 • Organized and detail-oriented with strong execution skills

 • Strong written and verbal English communication

 • Ability to work independently in a remote environment

Nice-to-Have

• Experience with TikTok Shop or Amazon

• Experience working with affiliate or creator programs

•  Familiarity with tools such as Klaviyo, Slack, Asana, or Google Sheets

•  Experience coordinating with designers or video editors

• Interest in fitness, supplements, or consumer brands



Compensation

Salary: $1,200 - $1400 a month

Employment Type: Full-Time Remote



Probationary Period:

- 2 months to ensure the role is a strong mutual fit.

- Strong performers will have opportunities for expanded responsibilities and compensation growth as Velomix’s social commerce channels scale.



What We Offer

• Full-time remote position

 • Work with a top Amazon US brand

 • Direct collaboration with founders and growth team

 • Opportunity to help scale TikTok Shop and social commerce

 • Fast-paced environment with real ownership and impact

title: Growth Operator Application — Tier-1 London Careers Consultancy
description:
WHO WE ARE



Elite Careers Strategy (ECS) is a London-based premium career advisory firm. We help students and graduates secure offers at the world’s most competitive employers — Magic Circle law firms, Goldman Sachs, Blackstone, Citadel, and equivalent institutions. Our founder has reviewed over 10,000 graduate applications from the hiring side and has delivered sessions at MBA student clubs at Harvard Business School, MIT Sloan, and Yale School of Management.



We operate a proprietary system — the ECS Offer-Engineering System™ — built around trademarked frameworks including VTMR™, PEAL-3™, STAR-3®, and Commercial Fluency™. We have 56+ documented client outcomes across Goldman Sachs, Freshfields, White & Case, Kirkland & Ellis, Blackstone, and others.



We are a lean, fast-moving team. We do not waste time. We execute. We are looking for one exceptional person to own the growth engine of this business.



THE ROLE



This is not a virtual assistant role. This is not a data entry role. This is a growth operations role for someone who understands that content, systems, and lead pipelines are the lifeblood of a growing business — and who wants to own them end-to-end.



You will sit at the intersection of content distribution, CRM operations, and marketing systems. You will work directly with the founder and will touch every part of how ECS reaches, attracts, and converts clients. You will be a core part of the engine.



The right person will thrive here. The wrong person will not last two weeks.



WHAT YOU WILL OWN

Content Distribution & Repurposing

• Publish one long-form YouTube video per week — upload, SEO-optimise title, description, tags, timestamps, thumbnail text, and pinned comment per the production bible provided

• Clip each YouTube video into 5 TikTok/Reel-ready short-form pieces using CapCut or equivalent; apply captions, format to 9:16, and schedule across Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

• Maintain the content calendar in Notion; flag any gaps 7 days in advance

• Cross-post founder content across LinkedIn (manual posting required due to API restrictions) and flag for same-day turnaround

 

CRM & GoHighLevel (GHL) Operations

• Manage the GHL unified inbox (Instagram DMs,
 Messenger, SMS,
) — monitor daily and flag urgent leads to Mabel (lead pipeline VA) within 2 hours

• Maintain and update lead pipeline tags, stages, and contact records inside GHL

• Support the build-out and testing of 
 automations that route inbound messages to Claude for Mabel approval; document workflows and flag errors

• Run weekly pipeline hygiene: remove duplicates, update stale contacts, confirm booking statuses in Pensight

 

Analytics & Reporting

• Produce a weekly growth dashboard (Monday delivery): YouTube views, subscriber growth, TikTok/Reel engagement, GHL lead volume by source, Pensight bookings

• Track content performance and surface the top 3 performing pieces each week with a plain-English explanation of why they performed

• Monitor competitor content in the training contract/IB space and flag any trend worth acting on

 

Skool Community Support

• Monitor the ECS Skool community (2,800+ members) for unanswered questions that fall within defined community support boundaries; route anything outside scope to the customer support doc

• Pin and promote new YouTube/content releases inside the community

 

Operational & Ad Hoc

• Maintain the Notion B-roll asset database and production bibles; update entries as new content is shot

• Source and organise royalty-free b-roll or stock assets for video production as directed

• Execute any founder-assigned growth task within agreed SLA — this role is for someone who closes things



THE PERSON WE ARE LOOKING FOR

Non-negotiable requirements:

• Native or near-native English written communication — you will be communicating with UK clients and a UK founder

• Minimum 2 years in a digital marketing, content operations, or social media management role

• Proven hands-on experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) — you must be able to evidence this; do not apply if you have not used GHL

• Proficiency with short-form video editing — CapCut, DaVinci Resolve, or equivalent — and experience publishing on TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

• Experience with 
 (Integromat) or equivalent automation platforms (Zapier accepted)

• Notion proficiency for content calendar and asset database management

• Obsessive attention to detail — a single typo in a YouTube title or a missed caption on a reel is a failure

• Ability to work independently with minimal hand-holding; you identify the problem, you solve the problem, you report back

• Reliable high-speed internet and a quiet working environment

 

Strongly preferred:

• Experience working with a UK, US, or Australian client or employer

• Familiarity with YouTube SEO — keyword research, title/thumbnail optimisation, CTR improvement

• Prior work in an education, coaching, consultancy, or personal brand business

• Understanding of elite professional services (law, investment banking, finance) is a significant advantage — you will be producing and distributing content about these industries daily

• Experience managing a community platform (Skool, Circle, Mighty Networks, or similar)





WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE IN 90 DAYS

• YouTube publishing pipeline is fully systematised: zero late uploads, every video SEO-optimised and distributed across all platforms within 24 hours of the master file landing

• Short-form content machine is running: 5 clips produced and scheduled per long-form video, captions accurate, engagement tracking live

• GHL inbox response time is under 2 hours for urgent leads on weekdays

• Weekly growth dashboard delivered by 09:00 UK time every Monday without prompting

• 
 automation workflows are documented, tested, and handing off cleanly to Mabel and the approval layer

• You have identified and flagged at least 3 content or system improvements the founder had not thought of





WHAT THIS ROLE IS NOT

• This is not a part-time role or a side project. We need full commitment.

• This is not for someone who needs to be chased. Every task has an owner. You are that owner.

• This is not a role where you will coast on easy work. The standard here is set by the results we get for clients. It carries over into how we operate internally.

• This is not for someone who has never used GHL, 
, or video editing tools and is willing to “learn on the job.” You must arrive equipped.



HOW TO APPLY

We use applications to filter. We do not shortlist on CV alone. To be considered you must submit all four of the following:

• A short Loom video (3–5 minutes maximum) introducing yourself, walking through your most relevant experience, and answering this question: “What is one thing most businesses in the coaching or education space get wrong about content distribution, and what would you do differently?”

• A 1-page written summary of the tools you use daily, with specific examples of automations or content workflows you have built

• Evidence of GoHighLevel experience: a screenshot or screen recording showing a pipeline, workflow, or inbox you have managed (please redact any client data)

• A sample short-form clip: take any video from 
 or the ECS YouTube channel and recut it into a 60-second vertical clip ready for TikTok. Submit the file or a Google Drive link.

Incomplete applications will not be reviewed. We are looking for the 1 in 20 who actually reads the JD.

Send your application here

title: E-commerce Finance Manager (Daily Profitability & Reporting)
description:
Ace & Taylor is a fast-growing D2C e-commerce brand selling premium hair tools across Europe.



We sell online through Shopify and run paid ads on Meta & TikTok. As we grow, it is important that we always understand our profitability, costs, and financial performance.



Your Role

- Monitor product margins and profitability

- Track returns and their financial impact

Who We're Looking For

title: Experienced Web Developer with SEO Background
description:
We are seeking a versatile Full-Stack Web Developer with a sharp eye for design and a deep understanding of the technical search landscape. This role is perfect for a developer who doesn't just build pages but understands how they contribute to a larger business ecosystem—from user experience to search engine dominance.



The ideal candidate is comfortable navigating the backend logic of PHP and Laravel, the interactivity of React, and the meticulous styling of CSS, all while ensuring the site is perfectly indexed and lightning-fast.



Core Responsibilities

UX & Design Enhancement: Elevate website aesthetics and functionality, ensuring a seamless journey for the user from landing to conversion.



Technical SEO Mastery: Implement advanced Schema markup, optimize site structure, and maintain elite page speed scores (Core Web Vitals).



Custom Development: Modify existing WordPress plugins or develop custom scripts to meet specific business needs.



Systems Integration: Connect 3rd-party tools, with a specific focus on affiliate program integrations and tracking APIs.



Maintenance & Quality Control: Conduct regular code cleanup, audit for broken elements, and proactively fix bugs or performance bottlenecks.

Frameworks: Proficiency in Laravel (for custom applications) and React (for dynamic frontends).



SEO Expertise: A deep understanding of technical SEO, including crawlability, indexing, and structured data.



Tooling: Experience with graphic design software and version control (Git).



Application Requirement

A complex integration (e.g., an affiliate system or custom API).



Significant improvements in technical SEO or site performance.



Examples of My Capabilities

While I am an AI, I can demonstrate my ability to execute these tasks through the following conceptual projects I have helped users architect and build:



1. Global Health Logistics Portal

The Build: A custom Laravel backend integrated with a WordPress frontend to manage high-volume product catalogs.



Technical Achievement: Implemented complex JSON-LD Schema for medical products, resulting in "Rich Snippet" eligibility. Cleaned up legacy PHP code to reduce server response time by 40%.



2. Affiliate-Driven Content Hub

Technical Achievement: Fully integrated a 3rd-party affiliate tracking system and optimized the CSS for a "mobile-first" score of 99/100 on Google PageSpeed Insights.



Would you like me to draft a list of specific technical questions you can use to vet candidates for these specific skills?

title: Executive Assistant
description:
Skills play a vital role in a workforce but We believe that hiring character over skill is the basic foundation for building a smart, efficient, passionate, driven, and impactful workforce.



AT MERIDIAN, WE FOCUS ON PEOPLE OVER PROFITS



Overview



Role Summary:



The Executive Assistant provides high-reliability administrative and operational support to the CEO and CCO. This role is responsible for managing calendars, communications, logistics, and follow-through to ensure executive time and priorities are protected and executed effectively.



Key Responsibilities



Daily Responsibilities

Calendar Management & Meeting Coordination

- Schedule, update, and coordinate meetings, appointments, and events

Inbox Triage & Communication Support

- Draft responses or prepare summaries as requested



Document Preparation & Writing



- Draft and edit
s, memos, presentations, and decks

Expense & Administrative Support



- Track receipts and prepare expense reports

Travel Arrangements

- Prepare clear itineraries and supporting travel details



Sales Support



- Aggregate call notes and ensure timely, organized entry into HubSpot

- Draft templated or custom follow-up
s after sales calls, including links, proposals, or terms docs as needed

- Assist with procurement and security questionnaires by coordinating internal input, formatting responses, and managing submission timelines



Ad Hoc Research



- Conduct quick-turnaround research on vendors, tools, or topics

- Summarize findings clearly and concisely



Monthly / Ongoing Responsibilities



Follow-Ups & Action Item Tracking



- Track outstanding tasks and commitments

- Follow up with relevant parties to ensure timely completion



Vendor & Partner Coordination



- Manage routine communications with vendors and external partners

Conference and Field Support

Required Skills



- Fluent written and spoken English

title: VoIP Technician ****Ex Ring Central Employees Welcome X** EX 8X8 Employees Welcome*******
description:
****YOU MUST SUBMIT A RESUME AND VOICE RECORDING IN ORDER TO BE CONSIDERED FOR A POSITION****





We are a leading telecommunications solutions provider dedicated to delivering cutting-edge communication technologies to businesses of all sizes. We pride ourselves on providing exceptional service and innovative solutions to our clients, and we are looking for a talented Telecommunications Phone System Technician to join our team.



Position Overview:

As a Telecommunications Phone System Technician, you will play a crucial role in designing, implementing, and maintaining telecommunications systems for our clients. We are seeking an experienced technician with a strong background in legacy systems like Nortel, Avaya, and NEC, as well as expertise in modern UCaaS (Unified Communications as a Service) solutions and VoIP phone systems such as RingCentral, 8x8, 3CX, and Nextiva.



Responsibilities:



Install, configure, and maintain legacy phone systems like Nortel, Avaya, and NEC EC.

Design and implement UCaaS solutions to meet client requirements.

Configure and troubleshoot VoIP phone systems, including RingCentral, 8x8, 3CX, and Nextiva.

Perform system upgrades, patches, and maintenance tasks.

Provide technical support and assistance to clients, both remotely and on-site.

Collaborate with clients to understand their telecommunication needs and recommend solutions.

Assist in the training of end-users on telecommunication systems.

Keep up-to-date with industry trends and emerging technologies in telecommunications.

Qualifications:



Minimum of 3 years of hands-on experience in telecommunications.

Proficiency in legacy phone systems such as Nortel, Avaya, and NEC EC.

Strong knowledge of UCaaS solutions and VoIP phone systems, including RingCentral, 8x8, 3CX, and Nextiva.

Excellent troubleshooting and problem-solving skills.

Strong communication and interpersonal skills.

Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

Previous experience with 8x8, RingCentral, Nextiva, or Dialpad is a strong plus.

Industry certifications (e.g., CCNA, CCNP, UCaaS certifications) are a bonus.



Why Join?



Competitive salary and benefits package.

Opportunities for professional growth and development.

Collaborative and supportive team environment.

Exposure to cutting-edge telecommunications technologies.

Chance to work with a diverse range of clients and industries.

Employee recognition and appreciation programs.

If you are a dedicated Telecommunications Phone System Technician with experince in legacy systems and modern UCaaS/VoIP solutions, we encourage you to apply. Join our team and help us shape the future of business communication.

ssy sheets into a streamlined, "one-source-of-truth" dashboard.

title: Operations Manager
description:
About First or Nothing

First or Nothing (FON) is an Australian supplement company on a mission to build products that actually work; no fillers, scientifically backed, no compromises. We’re a compact, fast-moving team with big ambitions, and we’re looking for someone who can come on board as we gear up for US market expansion.



We move fast, we hold ourselves to a high standard, we are passionate and we hero health. If that sounds like your kind of environment, read on.



The Role

We’re looking for an experienced Operations Manager to own the engine room of FON. This is a hands-on, end-to-end role — you’ll be responsible for keeping the supply chain tight, the numbers accurate, and the business running without friction so the rest of the team can focus on growth.



You’ll work closely with the founder and brand team, and you’ll have genuine ownership over a critical part of the business.

What You’ll Own



End-to-end logistics; domestic and international shipping, freight, and fulfilment coordination 

Form strong relationships with our logistic partners and manufacturers 

Demand forecasting and inventory planning to ensure we never run short or overstock

Manufacturing run scheduling and liaison with our production partners

Invoicing, purchase orders, and supplier payment management

Stock reconciliation and oversight of warehouse operations

Building and maintaining operational systems, SOPs, and reporting

Identifying and eliminating inefficiencies across the supply chain

Supporting US market expansion from an operations standpoint as we scale



Have a confident relationship with our marketing team to ensure healthy stock levels for upcoming campaigns and forward planning



What We’re Looking For



Proven experience in an operations role; ideally within e-commerce, FMCG, health, or consumer products

Hands-on experience with logistics, supply chain, and manufacturing coordination

Strong financial literacy; comfortable with invoicing, POs, and cost management

A systems thinker who builds processes that actually get followed

Someone who takes ownership and doesn’t wait to be told what to do

High attention to detail without losing sight of the bigger picture

Comfortable working in a lean, fast-moving environment

Strong communicator; you’ll interface with suppliers, freight partners, and internal stakeholders



Nice to Have

Experience with US logistics or cross-border supply chains

Familiarity with supplement or nutraceutical manufacturing

Experience with Shopify, ERP tools, or inventory management software such as Xero

Previous experience at a startup or scale-up where you built things from scratch



Location

First or Nothing is based in Sydney Australia, however, this role will be virtual/remote for the right candidate. 



How to Apply

Submit your CV and a short note on why you’re the right person for this role. We understand the world is AI, but a short personal cover letter goes a long way.

title: Ecom Performance Video Editor | High-Growth | Long-Term
description:
## Role Overview



The purpose of the Video Editor role at Ivy Ecommerce is to transform creative briefs into high-performing video ads that drive conversions at scale.



This is not just a technical editing role.



Our Video Editors are an integral part of the marketing engine. Your job is to understand the psychology, messaging, and strategy behind each ad concept, and bring it to life through sharp editing, pacing, storytelling, and attention to detail.



As a Video Editor, you are responsible for the execution and final polish of our video ads. The success of our marketing team depends on your ability to:



- Understand each creative brief from a performance/direct-response marketing lens

- Assemble visuals, hooks, captions, and pacing in a way that maximizes conversions

- Enhance the core marketing message through smart creative decisions



You understand that small details can be the difference between an ad that gets scaled to millions in spend and one that dies after testing.



Your role is to work closely with our Creative Strategists, actively learn what makes ads win or lose, and help us consistently produce winning ads month over month across our brand portfolio.





### Primary Responsibilities



- Edit and deliver ~10 ad briefs per week

- Collaborate closely with Creative Strategists to ensure each ad concept is executed correctly

- Implement feedback from the creative team and performance data to improve iterations

- Learn and internalize our ad strategy frameworks to understand what makes creatives “win” or “lose”

- Analyze your own creatives to identify what’s working, what isn’t, and how to improve

- Upload and organize final assets into the correct folders and formats for each platform





## Qualifications



### Direct Experience



- 1+ year experience editing eCommerce / performance marketing ads

- Experience working within a team environment and understanding roles in a creative workflow





### Character Traits We Look For



- Extremely high attention to detail – you care about the small things because you know they matter

- Creative + marketing-minded – you’re not just an editor, you’re curious about why ads perform

- Strong visual communicator and storyteller

- High curiosity and a desire to continuously improve your creative and marketing skills

- Willingness to do the “boring but important” work consistently at a high standard

- Clear communicator who collaborates well with a team

- Time-efficient, but willing to put in extra effort when quality demands it

- Hungry, motivated, and growth-oriented – you want to get better, take on more responsibility, and level up your career

- to make sure you are still reading, type “BLUE” in your response title.

- Coachable and open to feedback

- Not a clock-in, clock-out mindset — you care about results and impact







### This Role Is NOT for You If:



- You only want to execute tasks without understanding the marketing behind them

- You’re not interested in learning performance marketing or creative strategy

- You dislike feedback or fast-paced environments

- You’re disorganized or unreliable

- You prefer working solo and don’t enjoy team collaboration

- You’re not motivated to grow your skills and career over time







### Growth & Upside



At Ivy Ecommerce, we invest in people who perform and show initiative. This role has real upside for those who take ownership:



- Opportunity to grow into a Creative Strategist / Creative Lead role over time

- Increased responsibility across multiple brands in our portfolio

- Performance-based bonuses tied to ad spend (no cap)

- Long-term growth path into higher-level marketing and creative leadership roles



This is a long-term opportunity for someone who wants to build a career in performance marketing, creative & be part of building cool ecom brands, not just edit videos.







## ???? How to Apply



To be considered, please reply with:



- A short overview of yourself

- Your CV / Resume with your past work experience

- Your eCommerce video editing portfolio

- Your
 address + WhatsApp number



Then answer the questions below in detail:



1. What about this role excites you most?

2. Why do you believe you’re a strong fit for this role?







Applications that do not follow these instructions or provide detailed answers will not be reviewed.

Share a short weekly update (what was posted, what worked, what to improve)



TO APPLY (IMPORTANT): 

Please review our website and include:

A short note on what we do (in your words)

3 specific ideas to improve our social media

A link to your portfolio or 2–3 examples of posts you’ve created

title: Digital Marketing Specialist (Local SEO + PPC)
description:
HOW TO APPLY:



Apply using this form only



*Applications sent via this form will be prioritized.



JOB DESCRIPTION:



We are looking for an experienced full-stack digital marketer who can plan, prioritise, execute, analyse, and document — not someone who tries to do everything at once.



This role follows weekly planned sprints, not chaotic multitasking. You are expected to own your execution plan, work independently, and operate with clarity.



IMPORTANT (PLEASE READ):



- All responsibilities are executed through weekly strategic planning, not simultaneously

- You will plan your own tasks weekly based on agreed priorities during weekly planning

- This is an experienced-level role, not suitable for beginners

- SEO (technical, on-page, off-page, local, content-driven)

YOU SHOULD ALSO:



- Strategically plan and prioritise weekly execution

- Be organised, analytical, and process-driven

- Follow SOPs and structured workflows

- Communicate clearly and professionally



REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCES:

WORK DETAILS:

INITIAL INTERVIEW PROCESS:



Shortlisted candidates will be contacted via their mobile number, so please keep your lines open.

The initial interview will be conducted via Google Meet.

title: Shopify User Experience Specialist
description:
About Us:

At 4ocean, our mission is to save the world's oceans, and we are looking for passionate individuals to help us achieve this goal. We are more than just a company, we are a global movement committed to making a tangible difference in the health of our planet. We achieve this by removing plastic waste from the ocean and coastlines, while also advocating for sustainable change. If you are driven by purpose, motivated to contribute to a cause that truly matters, and eager to make a lasting impact on the environment, we want you on our team.



Role Overview

Own the daily performance of the Shopify storefront as a revenue-producing environment. Treat the site like a live retail floor that requires constant monitoring, adjustment, testing, and reporting based on real customer behavior. Software Development maintains platform stability; this role ensures the storefront stays fast, accurate, and converting through disciplined execution tied directly to revenue outcomes.



Key Responsibilities

Daily Operations

Audit homepage, collections, product pages, and cart flow for errors or friction

Validate mobile experience across devices

Confirm navigation, search, filtering, and add-to-cart functionality

Verify promotions, pricing, bundles, and messaging accuracy

Update homepage features, merchandising, and campaign landing pages

Optimize product placement based on inventory and demand

Improve product page clarity, hierarchy, and usability

Optimize images and assets for speed

Execute changes safely, test, publish, and maintain rollback readiness

 

Optimization & Reporting

Analyze funnel metrics, conversion rate, AOV, and abandonment points

Prioritize UX improvements that increase revenue per session

Plan and execute controlled experiments

Review page speed and Core Web Vitals

Refresh homepage aligned to marketing calendar

Maintain change logs with impact analysis



Testing & Monitoring

Validate navigation, cart, and checkout entry

Confirm promotions, tracking, and pixels function correctly

Use heatmaps and session recordings to identify friction

Monitor broken links, errors, crawl issues, and site health

Analyze behavior by device, traffic source, and segment



Required Qualifications

Hands-on Shopify storefront management experience

Strong conversion-focused UX/UI instincts

Familiarity with analytics and behavior tools

Mobile-first ecommerce understanding

Ability to implement changes without degrading performance

Detail-oriented with disciplined testing habits



Software & Utilities Familiarity

Storefront & Page Building: Shopify Admin, PageFly, Shogun, Gempages

Subscriptions: Recharge, Skio, Loop

Analytics & Behavior: GA4, Shopify Analytics, Microsoft Clarity, Hotjar

Testing & Optimization: Intelligems, Shoplift

Performance: PageSpeed Insights, GTmetrix, Lighthouse

Site Audit & SEO Health: Screaming Frog, Ahrefs, SEMrush, Google Search Console

Cross-Device Testing: BrowserStack, LambdaTest



Ideal Candidate

Treats the storefront as a live revenue environment, moves quickly but tests thoroughly,

focuses on removing customer friction, anticipates issues before they impact shoppers,

and understands ecommerce metrics beyond surface-level design

title: Paid Social & Performance Content Specialist
description:
Role Overview

The Paid Social & Performance Content Specialist creates, adapts and deploys high-quality creative that performs across TikTok Paid, Meta Paid, YouTube, Google (Demand Gen/YouTube/Display), Yelp 1P, DTC,
/SMS and third-party marketplaces.

We’re looking for a self-governing, fast, commercially minded creator who understands that creative is a core performance lever. You should be comfortable operating with minimal direction while staying aligned to brand guardrails, campaign priorities and performance feedback.

AI is central to the workflow, but human judgment, brand sensibility and final creative control always sit on top. This role sits inside the paid performance engine, where speed, consistency and quality matter as much as ideas.



What You’ll Do

Paid Strategy & Planning

Support execution of performance-driven paid creative strategy.

Maintain weekly/monthly creative calendars aligned to campaigns and launches.

Translate briefs from Paid Media, Ecommerce and Marketing into platform-ready creative for TikTok, Meta, YouTube, Google, Yelp 1P, DTC,
/SMS and marketplaces.

Propose creative angles, formats and tests based on performance trends.

Paid Creative Production

Produce platform-native assets including:

Short-form vertical video (TikTok, Reels, Shorts)

Mid-form YouTube creative

Static images and carousels

UGC-style performance video

Write conversion-oriented hooks, captions and CTAs.

Optimize creative for pacing, framing, text density and platform best practices.

Ensure all work meets brand standards while feeling native to each channel.

AI-Powered Workflow

Use AI tools for hook generation, A/B testing, video editing, thumbnail/caption variants and rapid iteration at scale.

Balance efficiency with brand integrity, treating AI as a production amplifier, not the decision maker.

Publishing, QA & Alignment

Prepare assets to exact specs for Meta, TikTok, YouTube, Google, Yelp and marketplaces.

Partner closely with Paid Media teams/agencies for smooth implementation.

Maintain organized asset libraries and clear naming conventions.

Ecommerce & Marketplace Integration

Design creative that supports conversion and product discovery.

Align timing and messaging with DTC promotions, paid campaigns,
/SMS and marketplace initiatives.

Ensure marketplace assets meet platform requirements while preserving brand consistency.

Performance & Learning

Review results including CTR, CPC, CPA, CPV, hook rate, watch time and view-through signals.

Refine storytelling, structure and hooks based on data.

Share concise creative learnings with stakeholders.

Collaboration & Trends

Work cross-functionally with Paid Media, Ecommerce, Marketing and Creative teams.

Stay current on platform updates and ad best practices across Meta, TikTok, YouTube, Google and Yelp.



You Bring

2–5 years experience in paid social creative, performance content, or ecommerce marketing.

Proven track record of high-performing short-form video and static paid assets.

Experience working with paid teams or agencies preferred.

Familiarity with YouTube and Google ad formats a strong plus.

Comfort owning workflows and deliverables with minimal supervision.

Working knowledge of CTR, CPC, CPA, CPV and hook rate.

Highly organized with strong attention to detail.

A portfolio demonstrating TikTok, Meta, YouTube and ecommerce-oriented paid creative is required.

Tools

Native ad tools across Meta, TikTok, Google, YouTube and Yelp.

Canva, CapCut, Adobe Creative Suite, or equivalent.

Hands-on experience with AI creative tools for variation and testing.

Ability to build scalable, repeatable creative workflows.

What Success Looks Like

Consistent delivery of high-quality, campaign-ready creative.

Reliable, on-time handoffs to Paid Media teams.

Improving creative efficiency and performance over time.

Clear contribution to paid-driven traffic and revenue across TikTok, Meta, YouTube, Google and Yelp 1P.

title: Creative Strategist — DTC Wellness Brand (Full-Time)
description:
We're a growing DTC wellness brand looking for a full-time Creative Strategist to lead our ad creative pipeline. You'll research winning ads, build creative briefs, and manage video editors to produce high-performing VSLs, UGCs, and ad creatives for Meta and TikTok.



You're the bridge between strategy and execution - you find what's working, turn it into a brief, and make sure the final output is ready to run.



What You'll Do:

- Research competitors and top-performing ads in the health/wellness space using tools like Gethookd, Meta Ad Library, and TikTok Creative Center

- Identify winning hooks, structures, angles, and emotional triggers worth modeling

- Analyze and break down winning competitor VSLs - identify what makes them work (hooks, story structure, CTAs, pacing)

- Model and write VSL scripts adapted for our product, including scene directions, visual cues, and voiceover copy

- Write multiple hook variations per script for creative testing

- Build creative briefs for video editors including scripts, visual direction, reference videos, and asset lists

- Manage and give feedback to 3+ video editors through revision rounds until final delivery

- Ensure all creatives are compliant with Meta and TikTok ad policies (no direct medical claims)

- Deliver final ad-ready assets to media buyers on a weekly cycle

- Track creative performance and use data to inform future briefs and scripts



Must-Haves:

- 3+ years in performance marketing, creative strategy, or ad production for DTC/e-commerce brands

- Deep understanding of direct-response ads - VSLs, UGCs, advertorials

- Copywriting and scriptwriting skills — ability to model winning ad structures and adapt them for a different product

- Understanding of direct-response frameworks (problem-agitate-solve, story-lead, listicles, etc.)

- Experience managing editors or creative teams

- Excellent written communication for briefs and feedback

- Organized and deadline-driven - comfortable managing multiple projects in Asana

- Available full-time (40 hrs/week)



Nice-to-Haves:

- Experience in health, wellness, or supplement brands

- Familiarity with AI tools (Claude, Kling, Higgsfield) for creative workflows

- Background in UGC scripting and creator management

- Experience with TikTok Shop content

- Portfolio showing ads you've strategized that scaled profitably

title: VSL Video Editor - DTC Wellness Brand [Full-time]
description:
We're a DTC brand growing fast on TikTok Shop, Amazon, and Shopify. 



We’re looking for a skilled video editor to join our tea,. You’ll create engaging VSLs for paid social advertising on Meta and TikTok. These are 2 - 6 minute vertical videos combining UGC clips, b-roll, text overlays, captions, voiceover, and music - designed to stop the scroll and drive purchases.



What You’ll Do:

Edit VSLs

Create 4 different hook variations per VSLs

Follow provided scripts and reference videos (we’ll give you examples to model)

Add captions, text overlays, transitions, and motion graphics (composite overlays, split-screen layouts, animated icons, glow effects)

Generate AI b-roll using Higgsfield AI or similar tools (product scenes, cinematic visuals, medical visualizations) and composite them into the edit

Sync voiceover with visuals and add background music



Must-Haves:

2+ years of video editing experience (VSL or direct-response ads preferred)

Proficient in Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or any of your choice

Strong sense of pacing, storytelling, and visual engagement

Reliable internet (100Mbps+) and own editing equipment

Available for 40 hours/week

Responsive communication (reply within 4 hours during working hours)

Experience with AI video generation tools (Higgsfield AI, Kling, Sora) for creating b-roll and product scenes from prompts



Nice-to-Haves:

Experience editing for health/wellness or e-commerce brands

After Effects skills for motion graphics

Understanding of Meta Ads / TikTok creative best practices



To Apply

Please include:

(1) Your portfolio or reel with at least 2 VSL/ad examples

(2) What editing software you use and your typical turnaround time

title: VSL Video Editor — DTC Wellness Brand
description:
We’re looking for a skilled video editor to join our growing DTC wellness brand. You’ll create engaging Video Sales Letters (VSLs) for paid social advertising on Meta and TikTok. These are 3–6 minute vertical videos combining UGC clips, b-roll, text overlays, captions, voiceover, and music - designed to stop the scroll and drive purchases.



What You’ll Do:

Edit 4 - 6 VSLs per month (3 - 5 minute videos)

Create 4 different hook variations per VSL (different opening visuals + captions for the first 3–5 seconds, same body)

Follow provided scripts and reference videos (we’ll give you examples to model)

Add captions, text overlays, transitions, and motion graphics (composite overlays, split-screen layouts, animated icons, glow effects)

Generate AI b-roll using Higgsfield AI or similar tools (product scenes, cinematic visuals, medical visualizations) and composite them into the edit

Sync voiceover with visuals and add background music



Must-Haves:

2+ years of video editing experience (VSL or direct-response ads preferred)

Proficient in Premiere Pro,  Final Cut Pro, or nay of your choice

Strong sense of pacing, storytelling, and visual engagement

Reliable internet (100Mbps+) and own editing equipment

Available for 20 hours/week with potential to go full-time

Responsive communication (reply within 4 hours during working hours)

Experience with AI video generation tools (Higgsfield AI, Kling, Sora) for creating b-roll and product scenes from prompts



Nice-to-Haves:

Experience editing for health/wellness or e-commerce brands

After Effects skills for motion graphics

Understanding of Meta Ads / TikTok creative best practices

Portfolio of AI-generated video clips showing strong prompting ability (Higgsfield, Kling, Runway, etc.)



Compensation

Starting at $800–$1,000/month part-time (20 hrs/wk), with path to full-time at $1,500–$2,500/month. Performance bonuses for ads that scale.



To Apply

Please include: (1) Your portfolio or reel with at least 2 VSL/ad examples, (2) A 2-minute Loom video introducing yourself and walking through your best VSL edit, (3) What editing software you use and your typical turnaround time, (4) Any examples of AI-generated video clips you’ve created (Higgsfield, Kling, Sora, Runway, etc.)

title: Website Developer
description:
Job Title: Experienced WordPress Developer (Elementor) – Long-Term Opportunity



Read this carefully before applying.



I run a marketing agency and I’m looking for a serious WordPress developer to build client websites using step-by-step video instructions that I provide.



This is not a “design from scratch” role.

You will follow clear video walkthroughs showing exactly how I want the website structured and built.



This will start as a per-project role.

If your work is clean, fast, and consistent, I will move you into steady, ongoing work as part of the team.



DO NOT APPLY IF:



You are still learning WordPress



You miss deadlines



You copy/paste proposals



You do not have strong Elementor experience



You need constant supervision



You MUST Have:



Strong experience building full WordPress websites



Strong Elementor experience



Understanding of responsive design



Ability to follow instructions exactly



Fast turnaround times



Good English communication



To Apply (This Filters Most People Out):



At the top of your application, write: “I Build Clean Sites” and tell me your favorite color. 



Send 3 live WordPress websites you personally built (no team portfolios)

Briefly explain your workflow from start to finish



If you do not follow these instructions exactly, your application will be ignored.



I value reliability, attention to detail, and long-term thinking.

If you perform well, you will have consistent work.

title: E-Commerce Email Designer
description:
This is NOT a drag-and-drop design job.



We need a designer who THINKS about what they're creating. Someone who reads copy and instinctively knows how to restructure it visually so people actually read it. Someone who spots awkward phrasing or AI-sounding bullshit and fixes it. 



Someone who turns walls of text into scannable, engaging layouts that drive clicks.



If you just paste copy into Figma and make it "look nice" - this role isn't for you.

If you actively improve every
 you touch - keep reading.



WHO WE ARE:

We're an
 marketing agency helping premium DTC brands add additional revenue through
. Our
s don't just look good - they look SO GOOD, THEY SELL & MAKE ECOM CUSTOMERS FALL IN LOVE.



THE PROBLEM YOU'LL SOLVE:

Our copywriters write the messaging. But copy alone doesn't convert. YOU transform that copy into visual experiences that:

- Guide the reader's eye exactly where we want it

- Break up text so it's actually readable on mobile

- Create visual rhythm that keeps people scrolling

- Make the CTA impossible to miss



WHAT MAKES THIS ROLE DIFFERENT:

You're not just a designer. You're a visual editor. When you receive copy, you:

- Read it critically (Does this flow? Does this make sense?)

- Restructure it visually (How do I break this into digestible chunks?)

- Flag issues proactively ("This section is confusing - here's how I'd reword it")

- Add visual storytelling (Icons, dividers, imagery that reinforces the message)

- Optimize for scanning (Most people skim - make key points pop)

- FIND what you need to make it great (Missing a product image? You go find it. Need a lifestyle shot? You source it. You don't wait to be spoon-fed every asset - you take initiative to make the
 as good as it can be.)



WHAT YOU'LL DESIGN:

- 36
s per month (9 per week)

- Campaign
s: Product launches, sales, promotions, content

- Flow
s: Welcome series, abandoned cart, post-purchase, winback

- Style: Premium, high-converting, mobile-first



WHAT "HIGH QUALITY" MEANS TO US:

- Visual hierarchy that guides the eye (not everything screaming for attention)

- White space used strategically (breathing room, not emptiness)

- Text broken into scannable chunks (no walls of copy)

- Pattern interrupts that keep readers engaged (not the same layout repeated)

- CTAs that stand out without being obnoxious

- Mobile-first design (thumb-friendly, fast-loading)

- Brand consistency across every



Examples of the quality we expect: 



WHAT WE DON'T WANT:

- Generic templates with copy pasted in

- Designs that look pretty but ignore readability & conversion

- "Set it and forget it" mentality

- Designers who wait to be told what to fix

- Big blocks of text because "that's what the copy said"



REQUIREMENTS:

- 1+ years designing e-commerce
s (show me
s, not websites)

- Portfolio showing BEFORE/AFTER or explaining your design decisions

- Figma proficiency

- Strong eye for typography and spacing

- Understanding of
 rendering constraints

- Fluent English (you'll be suggesting copy edits)

- Can commit to 9
s weekly, consistently



YOU'LL STAND OUT IF YOU:

- Can articulate WHY you made specific design choices

- Have reworded or restructured copy to improve an

- Understand what makes people click (not just what looks good)

- Notice things others miss (alignment, spacing, flow issues)

- Are opinionated about design (and can back it up)

- Have worked with premium/luxury brands



COMPENSATION:

$10-15 per
 ($
/month for 36
s)

Higher rate for designers who consistently deliver exceptional work.



WHAT'S IN IT FOR YOU:

- Creative ownership (we want your input, not just execution)

- Work with premium brands (portfolio pieces you'll be proud of)

- Consistent weekly volume (predictable income)

- Direct feedback loop (we share what's converting)

- Growth path to Senior Designer / Art Director as we scale



HOW TO APPLY:

1. Send your portfolio 
 designs specifically)

2. Tell me:



   - What's the difference between a good
 design and a great one?

   - Tell me about a time you improved copy or layout beyond what was asked

   - What do most
 designers get wrong?



(You can use AI to answer these questions; however, I want your real, sincere answers, not AI bullshit please)



3. Include 5-8 examples of your best
 work (the more the better)



Serious candidates will complete a test project before hiring:

- We provide: Brand guidelines + product images + brief

- You design: 1 complete

- Timeline: 24 hours



We respond to all applications within 48 hours.





REAL TALK:



I want someone who actually cares about getting better at this. Not just clocking in.



If you're that person, I'll invest in you. Train you properly. Help you build a portfolio that opens doors. The goal is we both grow from this.

title: US Accounting Manager
description:
Location: 100% Work from Home

Job Type: Full-time

Reports To: CEO/Founder

Schedule: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST



If interested apply through this link: 
/apply?role=us-accounting-manager





About ProfitWorks:



We serve the home trades and construction industries with a unique, concierge-style approach to Controller and CFO services. Our growth is entirely referral-based, and we maintain a waiting list of clients ready to onboard. In just five years, we’ve built lasting partnerships, many from day one.



Our team spans the U.S. and the Philippines, and we are deeply proud of our blended-shore model—one built on over a decade of collaboration and mutual growth. One tea
mber from the Philippines has been with the founder for 12 years.



Now, as we scale from 17 to 40+ tea
mbers, we’re looking for a tech-savvy, people-first Accounting Manager to help lead that growth and elevate our standards of excellence even higher.



What We Do Differently



No taxes—we’re all about operations, insights, and scalable financial solutions.

Pod-based teams that combine U.S. and PH accountants for support, continuity, and better work-life balance. We don’t hide our blended team

Deep client relationships over transactions.

Cutting-edge cloud tech and modern systems.

People before process. Always.

The Role: Accounting Manager



We are seeking a highly organized Accounting Project Manager with experience in U.S. home trades and construction accounting and strong proficiency in QuickBooks Online. This role acts as the bridge between accounting operations and client relationships, ensuring financial processes are executed accurately while maintaining strong communication with clients.



The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, proactive, and capable of managing multiple accounting projects or client accounts simultaneously. This role requires strong project coordination, financial oversight, and client communication skills to ensure smooth accounting workflows and high-quality financial reporting.



Key Responsibilities



Accounting Operations



Oversee daily accounting functions: GL, AP, AR, reconciliations

Manage month-end and year-end close

Ensure accurate financial statements, job costing, and project tracking in QuickBooks Online

Team Leadership & Task Management



Assign and prioritize tasks, monitor productivity, and review work

Coach and support accounting staff

Coordinate with operations/project managers for financial data

Financial Oversight & Decision Making



Analyze financial data to support decisions and identify trends

Approve entries, adjustments, and reconciliations

Recommend cost control and process improvements

Risk & Compliance



Identify and mitigate financial risks or errors

Ensure adherence to U.S. GAAP and internal controls

Maintain audit-ready documentation

Planning & Process Improvement



Support budgeting, forecasting, and financial analysis

Optimize accounting workflows and implement automation tools

Monitor financial performance against budgets

Required Qualifications



7+ years of accounting experience

2+ years of US Accounting background

1+ years of construction or home services accounting experience

1+ years of experience managing multiple teams.

Strong hands-on experience with QuickBooks Online

Solid understanding of U.S. GAAP

Experience with job costing and project-based accounting

Advanced Excel or Google Sheets skills

Excellent communication and organizational skills

Ability to manage multiple projects or client accounts simultaneously

Preferred Qualifications



Experience managing remote accounting teams

Experience with construction accounting workflows or WIP reporting

Familiarity with task management systems (ClickUp, Asana, or similar)

Key Skills



Financial Reporting

Job Costing & Project Accounting

Team Leadership & Task Delegation

Risk Management & Internal Controls

Financial Planning & Forecasting

Process Optimization

Tech Stack



QuickBooks Online

RightTool

Google Suite (Docs, Sheets, Gmail, Meet)

Excel / Google Sheets

Time Doctor (time tracking)

ClickUp (task management - bonus)

Adaptive

Other cloud-based tools as needed

Why You’ll Love Working Here



Loyal, Supportive Culture – Several tea
mbers have worked with our founder for 12+ years.

High Trust, No Corporate Bloat – Build your career without soul-crushing bureaucracy.

Growth-Ready Team – Positioned to scale to 40+ employees in the next year.

People First – Clients love us because we take care of our team first.

Perks



13th Month Pay

Philippine HMO Plan

80–120 Hours of PTO

7 Paid Holidays

Paid SSS, PhilHealth, Pag-IBIG

Paid Training & Certifications

Clear Advancement Path with Performance-Based Increases

Flexible, Fully Remote Environment

title: CAD Drafter (Retail & POSM)
description:
Job Summary:

We are looking for a detail-oriented CAD Drafter with experience in a creative or agency environment to join our team. In this role, you will translate design concepts into precise technical drawings, bridging the gap between 3D visualizations and physical production. You will ensure that retail store layouts and POSM units are accurately documented and ready for fabrication and installation.



Key Responsibilities:



-Prepare accurate 2D floor plans, elevations, sections, and detailed construction drawings for full retail store layouts.

-Develop technical drawings for Point of Sale Materials (POSM), including exploded views, assembly drawings, and material specifications.

-Collaborate with 3D Visualizers and Interior Designers to ensure designs are structurally feasible and aligned with the original design intent.

-Maintain high standards in layering, scaling, dimensioning, and annotations to ensure clear communication with contractors and fabricators.

-Review drawings for accuracy, completeness, and buildability before submission or production.

-Update and revise drawings based on project feedback while meeting deadlines.



Requirements:



-Advanced proficiency in AutoCAD is required.

-Knowledge of SketchUp integration is an advantage.

-Proven experience in retail fit-outs and POSM production drawings.

-Familiarity with materials, fabrication methods, and manufacturing constraints used in retail environments.

-Experience working in a fast-paced creative or design agency is preferred.

-Strong attention to detail, communication skills, and teamwork, with a reliable and responsible work ethic.



Click this link to apply,
