title: Meta Ads Media Buyer
description:
Apply Here

All applications must be submitted through our Tally form:





(Applications via
 or DM cannot be processed)



About Smarcomms

We're a social media marketing agency that's been helping brands grow for over 9 years, working with 10,000+ clients across diverse industries. Our mission is simple: deliver real, measurable results through smart, data-driven advertising.

As we scale our agency and transition from lead generation to conversion-focused campaigns, we're looking for a talented Media Buyer to join our team and help our clients unlock their next level of growth.



The Opportunity

This is your chance to work across a diverse portfolio of client accounts in a fast-paced, collaborative environment. You'll partner closely with our creative strategist to turn winning ads into scalable revenue engines.



What makes this role exciting:

- Own the entire media buying process from strategy to optimization

- Work across multiple industries (SaaS, DTC, B2B, ecommerce, lead gen)

- Collaborate with a creative strategist who feeds you fresh concepts to test

- Make a direct impact on client growth and agency success

- Learn and grow quickly in a supportive, results-driven culture

- Current state: Running lead generation campaigns

- Where we're headed: Conversion/sales campaigns with aggressive ROAS targets



What You'll Do

- Build & Optimize Campaigns - Structure testing frameworks, launch scaling campaigns, and continuously improve performance

- Monitor & Analyze - Keep a pulse on account performance, spot opportunities, make smart budget adjustments

- Handle the Technical Stuff - Set up pixels, configure CAPI, troubleshoot tracking issues (many clients need your help here)

- Scale What Works - Use Post ID methodology and systematic budget increases to turn winners into revenue machines

- Keep Clients Happy - Deliver weekly reports, share insights, recommend strategies

- Stay Ahead - Keep up with platform updates and test new features to give clients an edge



You're a Great Fit If You Have:

Experience & Skills:

- 2+ years as a hands-on Media Buyer (agency or freelance)

- Managed multiple client accounts simultaneously

- Experience across different industries (not just one vertical)

- Technical know-how - CAPI, pixel setup, GTM, GA4 don't scare you

- Real results you can point to - scaling successes, ROAS improvements, breakthrough campaigns

- Deep platform knowledge - You know your way around Meta Ads Manager (ABO, ASC, cost caps) and Google Ads



Your Approach:

- You're data-driven but also understand the creative side matters

- You have systems and frameworks - not just winging it

- You test methodically and scale what works

- You're proactive - you spot issues and opportunities before they're problems



Bonus Points:

- Familiar with attribution tools (Triple Whale, Northbeam, Hyros)

- Active in media buying communities 
/X, Slack groups, podcasts)

- You geek out about ad performance and love sharing what you learn



What Success Looks Like

Your First 30 Days:

- Get to know our client accounts inside and out

- Audit current performance and spot quick wins

- Set up proper tracking and reporting systems

- Start building trust with the team



60 Days In:

- Testing framework is humming along smoothly

- You've identified and scaled your first batch of winners

- Clients are consistently hitting their ROAS targets

- You're in a good rhythm with our creative strategist



90 Days & Beyond:

- You're running accounts autonomously with confidence

- You're bringing proactive strategy ideas to the table

- You're helping shape our creative testing roadmap

- You're a trusted partner to both clients and our internal team



What We Offer

- Full Remote Flexibility - Work from anywhere in the world

- Growth & Learning - Fast-paced environment where you'll level up quickly

- Direct Collaboration - Work closely with Henry (Founder) and our creative team

- Creative Partnership - Team up with our creative strategist to unlock scale

- Performance Incentives - Opportunity for bonuses tied to client results

- Competitive Pay - Fair compensation based on your experience and impact

- Diverse Portfolio - Never get bored - work across multiple industries and campaign types



This Role Isn't For You If:

- You've only taken courses but haven't actually managed real budgets

- You're a "social media manager" who's only boosted a few posts

- You can't provide references from past clients or employers

- You're looking for a relaxed, low-pressure 9-5

- You prefer working in just one industry or campaign type

- You can't handle a fast-paced, constantly evolving environment



How We Hire

1. Submit Your Application (3 minutes)

 Complete our Tally form with thoughtful, detailed answers

2. We Review (5-7 days)

 Our team reads every application carefully

3. Interview (20 minutes)

 Quick video chat with Henry to get to know each other

4. Reference Check

 We'll chat with 2-3 people you've worked with

5. Paid Test Project

 Small audit or strategy task so we can see how you think

6. Welcome Aboard!

 Start within 2-4 weeks



Ready to Apply?

Submit your application here: 



Timeline: We're reviewing applications on a rolling basis and will close when we find the right person.

Questions? Most answers are in this post or in the application form itself.



Important Notes:

Hiring is subject to positive reference checks - we'll need 2-3 verifiable references

 Expected start date: 2-4 weeks after accepting an offer

 Please don't apply via
, DM, or LinkedIn - we can only process applications through the Tally form



Let's Build Something Great Together

We're excited to find a Media Buyer who's passionate about performance, loves the challenge of scaling campaigns, and wants to make a real impact for a growing portfolio of clients.

If that sounds like you, we'd love to see your application.

Apply now:

title: Social Media Manager
description:
About MTCHMKR 



MTCHMKR is the UK's first dedicated peer-to-peer platform for pool and snooker players. Built for the cue sports community, the app connects players to arrange head-to-head matches, enter tournaments, join leagues, and track their progress through detailed analytics and a star rating system. 



With over 1,000 UK venues already pre-loaded on the platform and a launch campaign backed by a partnership with a leading influencer in the pool and snooker space — who brings an audience of 400,000+ followers — we are positioned for rapid growth from day one. 



We are a lean, ambitious team — founder-led, founder-funded, and building something that genuinely matters to a passionate sporting community. No fluff. No filler. Just pool, snooker, and the infrastructure to make competitive play easier, fairer, and more accessible across the UK. 



The Opportunity 



We are looking for a talented Social Media Manager to take full ownership of our Instagram and
 presence. This is a genuine opportunity to build something from the ground up. We have strong content assets already in Dropbox — match footage, event clips, and more — and we know broadly what we want to do for the first 30 days. After that, we want you to bring your own ideas, creativity, and strategic thinking to grow the accounts and the brand. 



You will be the voice of MTCHMKR on social media. The founder will handle community management initially, with the possibility of handing that over to you as the relationship develops. Your job is to create and publish content that builds our audience, drives app downloads, and gets the cue sports community talking. 



What You'll Be Doing 



- Editing and repurposing existing video and photo content from our Dropbox library for Instagram and
 

- Creating a consistent daily posting schedule that keeps both platforms active and engaging 

- Writing sharp, on-brand captions with appropriate hashtags, tags, and CTAs 

- Setting up and managing all relevant CTA functions, link-in-bio tools, and webhooks 

- Delivering the first 30-day content plan we've mapped out, then taking creative ownership from there 

- Proposing fresh content ideas using our existing footage and brand guidelines 

- Tracking performance metrics (reach, engagement, follower growth, link clicks) and reporting back weekly 

- Flagging any content gaps to the founder — a specific shot, clip, or graphic can be arranged on request 

- Exploring YouTube and TikTok as the audience grows 



 What We're Looking For 



Must-Have 

- Fluency in English

- Proven experience managing Instagram and
 for a brand or business 

- Strong video editing skills — cutting raw clips to platform-specific formats and lengths 

- An eye for visual storytelling and short-form content that actually performs 

- Confident with CTAs, link-in-bio tools, Meta Business Suite, and scheduling platforms 

- Self-starter who can work independently and manage their own time 

- Reliable daily availability — a couple of hours every day, not a big block once a week 



Nice to Have 



- Experience growing sports, gaming, or lifestyle social accounts from scratch 

- Familiarity with pool, snooker, or cue sports — or genuine enthusiasm to learn 

- YouTube and TikTok experience ready to deploy when we expand 

- Basic graphic design skills (Canva, CapCut, Adobe, or similar) 

- Experience with webhooks, Meta Ads, or audience retargeting 



Why Join MTCHMKR? 



- You get to build something. We are pre-scale and growing fast — your fingerprints will be on everything. 

- We have the content, the community, and the launch 
ntum. We just need someone who knows how to use it. 

- Flexible, remote role with genuine creative freedom once you've proved yourself. 

- Real exposure to a funded, founder-led tech business in a niche that is underserved and passionate. 

- A direct line to the founder — no layers, no committees, no approval chains. 

- Use of AI tools is not only allowed, it is actively encouraged — we want smart people who use every tool available to do great work faster. 



How to Apply 



Send a short message and examples of social accounts you have grown or managed to: 
 

Subject line: Social Media Manager — [Your Name] 

Tell us who you are, show us what you've done, and let us know when you can start. We move fast. 

Before you apply, take a look at what we've built so far: 

Website: 
 


 on Instagram and

title: In-bound lead Appointment Setter/ Caller
description:
In-bound lead Appointment Setter/ Caller

Lunatik Marketing Agency



Lunatik Marketing Agency is seeking a motivated and professional Real Estate Follow-Up Caller to join our growing team. This role focuses on speaking with real estate leads who have already requested information and opted in to be contacted.



This is NOT cold calling. Every person you contact has already shown interest and provided their contact information.



Your primary responsibility will be to follow up with leads, build rapport, confirm their needs, and help move them to the next step in the process.



If you enjoy speaking with people, are confident on the phone, and have strong communication skills, this can be a great long-term opportunity.



POSITION

Real Estate Follow-Up Caller (Independent Contractor)



SCHEDULE

• 4 hours per day with potential for more very soon

• Monday through Friday

• Start time TBD:  Will be based on Pacific Standard Time (PST)

• Workday will consist of 4 hours from the start time



COMPENSATION

• $2.00-3.00 USD per hour

• Time and activity tracked using Monitask

• Compensation based on verified Monitask hours and activity

• Payments made weekly via Wise Pay



RESPONSIBILITIES

• Call and follow up with inbound real estate leads via GHL

• Use provided scripts and communication guidelines

• Confirm lead information and level of interest

• Build rapport and maintain professional conversations

• Update notes and call outcomes in the CRM

• Ensure leads are properly documented and organized



IMPORTANT: THIS IS NOT COLD CALLING

All leads you will contact have opted in and requested information about buying or selling real estate.



REQUIREMENTS

• Clear and professional speaking voice

• Strong English communication skills

• Reliable internet connection

• Quiet work environment for making calls

• Ability to follow scripts and processes

• Comfortable speaking with people and building rapport



VOICE / VIDEO REQUIREMENT

Because this role is communication-focused, applicants must submit a short video recording (30-60 seconds) introducing themselves and demonstrating their speaking voice.



Please include in your video:

• Your name

• Your location

• Why you are interested in this role

• A short example of how you would greet someone on a phone call



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS

To apply, please submit:



1. Your resume or work experience

2. A 30-60 second introduction video showing your speaking voice

3. Confirmation that you are available during the required PST schedule



We are looking for someone who is professional, reliable, and interested in growing with our team.



Company: Lunatik Marketing Agency

Hours: 40 hours/week

Location: Remote

Type: Full-time



Please answer this form to be considered: 



About 


 is a wholesale liquidation marketplace that connects resellers, retailers, and entrepreneurs with surplus merchandise sourced directly from major retailers — including Amazon, Walmart, Target, and Costco. We specialize in truckloads of returns, overstock, salvage, and shelf-pull inventory, distributing to buyers across the globe. Our mission is straightforward: cut out the middleman and give buyers access to quality merchandise at unbeatable prices. As we grow our customer base, we're building out our team with people who can help us connect with new buyers and expand our reach.



Role Overview

We're looking for a confident, quick-thinking Lead Generation Specialist to reach out to prospective customers, introduce them to our liquidation programs, and generate interest in our inventory offerings. This is not a scripted call center position — you'll need to read the conversation, think on your feet, and adapt your approach to each prospect. You'll be the first voice of 
, and your ability to communicate persuasively and intelligently will directly impact our sales pipeline.



Key Responsibilities

Outbound Lead Generation & Calls

• Conduct outbound calls to prospective buyers to introduce 
 and its merchandise programs

• Qualify leads and assess interest in wholesale liquidation truckloads and inventory offerings

• Engage prospects in natural, unscripted conversations — tailor your approach based on their responses

• Handle objections confidently and keep conversations moving productively

Follow-Up & Pipeline Management

• Follow up consistently with warm leads to move them through the sales funnel

• Handle inbound inquiries and provide clear, helpful information about available inventory and pricing

• Log all outreach activity and keep contact records up to date

Coordination & Reporting

• Report outreach progress and lead status to the team on a regular basis

• Stay updated on current inventory, pricing, and promotions to speak accurately with prospects



Requirements

• Impeccable American English accent — this is a strict requirement for all voice interactions

• Strong verbal communication skills with the ability to hold natural, engaging conversations

• Quick thinker who can handle unexpected questions and objections without a script

• Persuasive and personable — comfortable building rapport with strangers over the phone

• Self-motivated and results-driven with a proactive attitude toward outreach

• Organized and reliable with the ability to manage a consistent volume of calls and follow-ups

• Stable internet connection and a quiet, professional environment for calls



Nice to Have

• Previous experience in lead generation, telemarketing, sales, or a customer-facing role

• Familiarity with wholesale, liquidation, reselling, or e-commerce

• Experience using CRM tools or outreach platforms



Compensation

• $800/month for 40 hours/week

• Fully remote — work from anywhere

• Stable, long-term full-time opportunity

• A role where your communication skills directly drive company growth

title: Accounts Preparation Specialist (UK Statutory Accounts)
description:
Accounts Preparation Specialist (UK Statutory Accounts)

Full-Time | UK Hours | Remote | ?55,000–?70,000 per month

We are a growing UK firm of accountants supporting hundreds of businesses across multiple industries. We are expanding our team and looking for a highly skilled Accounts Preparation Specialist with solid UK accounting experience.

This role is focused on year-end statutory accounts preparation.



**** Important: This is NOT a bookkeeping role. ****

If your experience is limited to transaction posting, bank reconciliation, or day-to-day bookkeeping only, this position will not be suitable.



We are looking for someone confident in handling full year-end files, reconciliations, journals, VAT schedules, and statutory draft accounts for UK clients.

________________________________________

What You’ll Be Doing

You will manage multiple UK client files each month and work closely with UK-based managers during file reviews and handovers.

Your responsibilities will include:

• Preparing year-end statutory accounts for UK clients (Xero required; Sage or QuickBooks is a plus)

• Producing complete and well-structured Excel working papers to support reconciliations

• Posting and reviewing journals (accruals, prepayments, depreciation, reclassifications)

• Reviewing and adjusting Profit & Loss accounts

• Preparing loan calculations and posting interest journals

• Performing VAT reconciliations (experience preparing UK VAT returns is advantageous)

• Supporting PAYE and payroll reconciliations

• Preparing audit-ready supporting schedules

• Liaising with UK accountants and external auditors to resolve queries

• Preparing management accounts when required

This role requires accuracy, accountability, and confidence working with UK accounting standards.

________________________________________

Who We’re Looking For

You must meet the following criteria:

• ? Proven experience preparing UK statutory year-end accounts (not bookkeeping only)

• ? Minimum 3 years accounting experience with exposure to UK clients

• ? Strong understanding of accruals, VAT, PAYE, reconciliations, and statutory reporting

• ? Xero experience (required)

• ? Strong Excel skills (pivot tables, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, variance analysis)

• ? Ability to manage multiple client files efficiently

• ? Excellent English communication skills

• ? Reliable internet connection and professional home office setup

Experience with Dext and Hubdoc is an advantage.

________________________________________

Compensation & Benefits

• ?55,000–?70,000 per month (based on experience)

• HMO after 3 months

• 13th Month Pay

• Paid Philippine Holidays

• Permanent UK business hours

________________________________________

Application Instructions (Important)

To be considered, please apply using 5 Apply Points and submit:

1. Updated resume

2. Cover letter outlining your UK accounts preparation experience

3. A short video confirming that you meet each of the listed requirements



Applications without UK statutory accounts preparation experience will not be shortlisted.

If you are confident preparing UK year-end files independently and want to work with a professional UK accounting firm long term, we’d love to hear from you.

We are a UK firm of accountants supporting hundreds of clients across various industries. We are looking for a skilled Accounts Preparation Specialist to prepare year-end statutory accounts for UK businesses.

title: Product Designer, Product Research, Product Developer
description:
Position: Part-time (preferred someone who will stay with us in the long run)



Hours: Max 10 hours per week



Compensation: $5 USD/hour ($200/month) – Initial 6-month period



Lorelli Company is preparing for an exciting first launch based on clothing ONLY. We are currently in the early stages with a select few products, which is why we are starting with a focused, 10-hour weekly schedule. However, we aren't just looking for a freelancer, we are looking for a long-term partner to grow with us.



As we scale, your hours and compensation will be adjusted after the initial 6 months based on your performance, dedication, and work ethics. We believe in fairness and rewarding those who help us build our legacy.



The Role

We need a versatile creative who can handle the "Full Stack" of product creation—from trend research, final design, analysis, sourcing and optimization. You will be responsible for:



Fashion Design: Conceptualizing and designing Shapewear, Swimwear, and Athletic Wear for both men and women.



Cosmetic Development: Assisting in the design and research of Skincare and Makeup products.



Market Research: Staying ahead of the curve by identifying shifting trends in the fashion and beauty industries.



Detail-Oriented Execution: Ensuring every stitch and shade meets our quality standards.



Who You Are

Trend-Obsessed: You have a natural eye for what’s "next" in fashion and beauty.



Versatile: You are comfortable jumping between garment technicalities and cosmetic packaging/concepts.



Detail-Oriented: You don’t miss the small things; you understand that quality is in the details.



Growth-Minded: You are looking for a company to call home and are motivated by the prospect of a pay increase based on your results.



How to Apply

If you are ready to help Lorelli Company launch something amazing, please submit:



Your Resume



A Portfolio (Showing examples of clothing design and/or cosmetic product work)

title: Product Researcher & Lister & Store Builder - Full-Time Position
description:
Full application here







Remote Ecom Operator (Dropshipping) — Run the Full Playbook End-to-End



SOPS please read before hand.















## Remote Ecom Operator (Dropshipping) — Run the Full Playbook End-to-End



We’re hiring a **hands-on, end-to-end dropshipping operator** to execute our complete operating system from **niche selection product research  supplier sourcing  store build  ads testing  fulfillment. This is not a “VA” role—this is an **owner-operator** style execution seat using a defined SOP playbook. 



### What you’ll be responsible for (end-to-end)



#### 1) Niche selection & market validation



* Use a structured niche scoring + validation process (Reddit + Google Trends + Amazon + TikTok signals) to pick testable niches. 



#### 2) Product research & competitor intelligence



* Run winning-product research using spy tools + checklists (e.g., Minea/PiPiADS + validation criteria). 

* Build product test shortlists, document competitors, extract angles/hooks, and recommend go/no-go decisions.



#### 3) Supplier sourcing, vetting & backup suppliers



* Source suppliers (CJ/AutoDS/Zendrop/Spocket/AliExpress/Alibaba as needed), vet with clear standards, and maintain **at least 2 suppliers per winning product**. 

* Confirm shipping methods/timelines and ensure policy-safe claims + realistic customer expectations.



#### 4) Shopify store build & conversion optimization



* Build/optimize Shopify store(s): theme setup, required apps, product pages, pricing, trust elements, FAQs, upsells. 

* Maintain mobile-first performance and clean customer journey (product page ? checkout ? post-purchase).



#### 5) Paid ads launch, testing & optimization (TikTok + Meta)



* Launch tests using structured testing protocols (budgeting, ad group structure, creative requirements, kill/scale rules). 

* Install pixels Day 1, monitor key metrics daily, iterate creatives fast, and pivot when data says so. 



---



## Systems & deliverables (how we work)



You will document and manage execution so work is “handoff-ready” and repeatable:



* Maintain product records, tasks, and structured research/decision packets (R0R3 style gates are a plus). 

* Keep organized folders and clear handoffs for creatives, store assets, suppliers, and performance reporting.



---



## Required experience



* Proven track record running **Shopify dropshipping or DTC testing** end-to-end (not just one slice like “product research” or “customer support”).

* Strong paid ads fundamentals: TikTok Ads + Meta Ads (testing structure, reading metrics, creative iteration, scaling decisions). 

* Comfortable owning operations: supplier coordination, fulfillment workflows, support processes, and refund/chargeback prevention. 





### Tools you are required to have and know how to use (At least 2)



Minea, PiPiADS, Meta Ad Library, Kalodata, Winning Hunter 

---



## What success looks like (core KPIs)



You will be measured on:



* Speed to launch: consistent product testing cadence (weekly/biweekly depending on scope).

* Store health: conversion rate trends, AOV improvements via upsells, refund rate control. 



---



## Role details



* **Remote / online**

* **Type:** Contract (with potential to grow into long-term operator role)

* **Hours:** Full-time 35–45 hrs/week]



  * Hourly: $1 to start

  * Performance bonus: $200 per winning product and funnel tied to net profit milestones (preferred for senior operators)



---



## How to apply



Send:



1. A short summary of your relevant wins (store results, ad spend levels, ROAS ranges, niches).

2. Links or screenshots: ad dashboards, store examples, creative examples



### Screening questions (answer in your application)



* What’s your step-by-step process to find and validate a product before spending on ads?

* Walk us through how you structure a $50/day TikTok test and what metrics d
 “kill” vs “keep.” 

* What’s your approach to reducing refunds/chargebacks in dropshipping? 

* What core
 flows do you launch first and why? 

* What tools from this stack have you personally used? 

* Full Understanding to the inital Compensation of 1USD base and 200 USD Per Validated Store/Product

* A fun fact about yourself so we know this was not written with AI

title: Amazon Arbitrage Product Research Specialist
description:
We are looking for an experienced Amazon Arbitrage Product Research Specialist to help us build a list of high-quality leads for our business. We already have an existing leads list, and now we need new, highly qualified leads to grow and scale.



[PLEASE READ HOW TO APPLY BEFORE SUBMIT]



You will be responsible for finding profitable products on Amazon based on our strict checklist and criteria. This is a part-time role (1–2 hours per day) to start, with the goal of becoming a full-time position within the next 2 months if the leads you provide are consistent and high quality.



Responsibilities:

Research and analyze products on Amazon for Online Arbitrage opportunities.

Follow our exact checklist to ensure product quality, including:

Minimum 30% ROI (Return on Investment)

At least 25 sales per month

Amazon should not be a competitor on the listing

Products must not have IP issues or be Private Label

Products should be easy to ungate (10 units on invoice) - Must order from direct of the brand / NOT WALMART ETC..

Provide 5–10 quality leads per day in the beginning.

Maintain accurate records of all leads.

Communicate progress daily.



Requirements:

2+ years of proven experience in Amazon Online Arbitrage product research.

Strong knowledge of sourcing tools such as Tactical Arbitrage, Keepa, SellerAmp, or other similar tools.

Ability to evaluate competition, sales rank, ROI, and Amazon restrictions.

Detail-oriented and able to strictly follow instructions.

High level of integrity – we are looking for long-term collaboration.



Nice to Have:

Experience working with wholesale suppliers and ungating processes.

Familiarity with Google Sheets / Excel for reporting.



What We Offer:

Starting with part-time work (1–2 hours/day).

Opportunity to grow into a full-time long-term position based on performance.

Competitive pay for high-quality, consistent leads.

Long-term, stable collaboration with a growing international business.



How to Apply:

Send us your resume/CV with your experience in Amazon Arbitrage.

Provide 3–5 sample leads that you have researched according to the checklist above (30% ROI, 25+ sales/month, no Amazon competition, etc.).

Tell us briefly about the tools you use and your workflow.

Only applicants who submit qualified sample leads will be considered.

title: Online Math/Science Teacher(Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

title: Head of Recruitment | Build the Hiring Engine for a High-Growth Digital Marketing Agency
description:
Please Apply Here: 
/
/f/2kz0ma3h-1156/MHHLY4BOXCKVXG8CCW



The Opportunity

We are a market-leading digital agency with ambitious growth plans and ongoing hiring demand. This role gives you ownership of one of the most critical growth levers in the business: talent acquisition at scale. You will design the recruitment engine that allows the company to grow faster without lowering standards. Your systems, decisions, and frameworks will directly affect execution capacity and revenue.

If you want to move beyond filling roles and instead build a hiring machine that compounds, this is a rare opportunity to do exactly that.





The Mission

Your job is to replace reactive hiring with a scalable system. You will design, implement, and continuously improve the recruitment and onboarding machinery that allows the business to hire large volumes of people quickly and effectively. This is not a traditional HR role. We already have HR support. This role is for an operator who diagnoses problems, builds solutions, and front-runs issues before they impact growth.



What You Will Do:

- Design and own the end-to-end recruitment and onboarding system across the business

- Build scalable hiring pipelines that support rapid, high-volume recruitment

- Create structured role definitions, scorecards, and assessment frameworks

- Diagnose bottlenecks in hiring and onboarding and fix them through process and systems

- Introduce data and reporting around time-to-hire, quality-of-hire, ramp time, and attrition

- Build repeatable onboarding processes that get new hires productive quickly

- Work closely with operations and leadership to forecast hiring needs in advance

- Replace ad hoc decision-making with clear criteria and hiring standards

- Continuously improve systems to support growth without operational drag



Who You Are:

- 5+ years experience in recruitment, operations, or talent-related roles in fast-growing organisations

- Strong systems thinker who enjoys designing processes and fixing broken workflows

- Comfortable operating without detailed instructions and taking full ownership

- Able to diagnose root causes rather than treating surface-level problems

- Data-literate and confident using metrics to drive hiring and onboarding decisions

- Not an HR generalist, but an execution-focused operator

- Clear communicator who can push back, set standards, and enforce process

title: Technical WebOps & Systems Engineer
description:
Full-time | Remote | Competitive Salary



We are looking for a highly technical operator with a deep background in WordPress architecture and server infrastructure. You will own the servers that host our sites, ensure flawless technical SEO and site speed, and build the custom APIs that connect our web presence to our CRM (GoHighLevel).



This is a hands-on role for someone who is as comfortable managing DNS and Node.js webhooks as they are building marketing automations.



Responsibilities

Server & IT Infrastructure (Core Priority): Own web hosting administration, DNS, SSL certificates, corporate
 deliverability (SPF/DKIM/DMARC), domain security, and proactive uptime monitoring.



WordPress & Web Architecture: Advanced management of WordPress/Elementor sites, focusing heavily on site speed optimization, Core Web Vitals, technical SEO execution, and mobile responsiveness.



Development & Integrations: Build custom Node.js integrations, REST APIs, and Webhooks to seamlessly connect our web assets, payment gateways, and third-party tools.



Tracking & Data: Architect advanced tracking setups using Google Tag Manager (GTM), server-side conversion tracking, and marketing source attribution.



CRM & Automation Ops: Manage GoHighLevel (GHL) sub-accounts, pipelines, and permissions across multiple locations. Utilize Make (Integromat) to route leads and automate complex workflows.



Requirements

Proven Server/IT Expertise: Deep experience managing DNS, web hosting environments, SSL, and
 infrastructure (you know how to keep sites fast and
s out of spam folders).



Advanced WordPress/Elementor: You don't just build pages; you know how to optimize the backend, fix database issues, and execute technical SEO audits.



Development Skills: Hands-on experience writing Node.js scripts and managing REST APIs/Webhooks.



Marketing Tech: 2+ years of experience with GoHighLevel (or comparable CRM) and Make (Integromat).



Analytics: Strong grasp of GTM and conversion tracking.



Communication: Strong written and verbal English.



How to Apply

To ensure you have read this entire job description, please include the word Mavrik in your application or subject line. Only applications that follow this instruction will be reviewed. Please note that due to the highly technical nature of this role, we will only be responding to suitable candidates who demonstrate proven experience managing servers and complex web integrations.

title: CEO's Executive Assistant
description:
About the Role:



This Executive Assistant role supports the CEO directly in a fast-paced, high-stakes environment. Priorities can shift multiple times in a week, and you’ll often need to make decisions independently while keeping multiple projects aligned.





Who this is for:



The EA who succeeds is confident, proactive, and adaptable. You’ll need to anticipate needs, manage competing priorities, and communicate clearly under pressure. While the role is demanding, it’s incredibly rewarding in terms of learning, impact, and exposure to executive-level decision-making.





What You’ll Be Doing:



1. Keeping the CEO’s calendar, meetings, and priorities organized, and catching conflicts before they happen.

2. Acting as the CEO’s right hand: making sure messages, updates, and follow-ups happen smoothly across teams.

3. Drafting and reviewing
s, presentations, and reports so they’re clear and professional.

4. Taking ownership of high-priority projects from start to finish, often with little direction.

5. Tracking deadlines and progress on multiple projects, flagging any potential problems early.

6. Doing research, summarizing info, and presenting solutions that make the CEO’s life easier.

7. Being the point person for internal and external partners, always professional and discreet.

8. Adapting quickly when priorities shift or last-minute requests come in—staying calm is key.

9. Finding ways to improve processes and workflows so things run more smoothly.





Must-Have:



> Proven experience supporting a senior executive, ideally a CEO or high-level leader.

> Superb organizational skills—you can juggle multiple priorities without dropping the ball.

> Excellent communication—clear, concise, and confident in both speaking and writing.

> Strong problem-solving skills—you can make decisions and figure things out independently.

> Emotional intelligence and resilience—you stay composed even when things get hectic or tricky.

> Discretion—you know how to handle sensitive info carefully.

> Tech-savvy with calendars, communication tools, and docs.





Nice-to-Have:



i. Experience in strategic projects or operations.

ii. Comfortable collaborating across multiple teams in a fast-paced environment.

iii. Ability to anticipate needs and solve problems before they become issues.





Why You’ll Love This Role:



If you like fast-paced work, making an impact, and being in the center of everything, this is a place where you can shine. You’ll learn a ton, grow quickly, and work closely with the CEO to help the company run like a well-oiled machine.





How to Apply:



Use “I can do this” as your subject line and tell us why you’d love this role.

title: Medical Virtual Professional
description:
Job Title: Clinical Virtual Assistant (Registered Nurse or Pharmacist)

The Mission

We aren't looking for a typical "assistant." We are looking for a high-level Clinical Partner to join our team. This role is designed for a medical professional (RN or Pharmacist) who combines clinical expertise with an elite work ethic. If you are someone who finds "good enough" unacceptable and takes genuine pride in the precision of your work, we want to talk to you.



Who You Are

A Top-Tier Graduate: You didn’t just finish your degree; you graduated with honors. You have a track record of academic and professional excellence.



Medically Sharp: You hold an active or prior license as a Nurse or Pharmacist. You understand the stakes of healthcare and the importance of accuracy.



The "Independent Variable": You don't need a micromanager. Once you understand the objective, you execute it flawlessly. You are a problem-solver by nature.



Dedicated & Disciplined: You have a "get it done" attitude. You view your work as a reflection of your character.



What You’ll Do

As a Clinical VA, your responsibilities will bridge the gap between administrative efficiency and clinical accuracy. Your tasks may include:



Clinical Coordination: Managing patient inquiries, triage, or medication synchronization with professional authority.



High-Level Documentation: Creating, editing, or auditing clinical reports, charts, or research summaries with 100?curacy.



Workflow Management: Organizing complex schedules or projects that require a deep understanding of medical terminology and urgency.



Independent Research: Sourcing and synthesizing medical data to support decision-making.



The Requirements

Education: Bachelor’s or Doctoral degree in Nursing or Pharmacy.



Academic Standing: Proven record of graduating with honors (Latin honors, Dean’s List, or equivalent).



Experience: Previous clinical experience is required; previous VA experience is a plus but not a substitute for clinical knowledge.



Tech Savvy: High proficiency in digital tools (EMR/EHR systems, project management software, and communication platforms).



Communication: Elite verbal and written English communication skills.



Why Join Us?

We value high performers. If you are tired of the "grind" of the floor or the retail counter but still want to use your degree at its highest level, this is your opportunity. We offer a professional environment where your intelligence is respected and your dedication is rewarded.



How to Apply: Please submit your application here only:

title: NetSuite Accountant
description:
About Us



Welcome to Assign – where global talent thrives! We connect exceptional professionals like you with leading U.S. businesses, enabling you to showcase your skills on an international stage.



At Assign, we believe in fostering an environment where talent can grow and flourish. We're committed to inclusivity, personal and professional growth, and we aim for service excellence in everything we do.



By joining our network, you will be a part of a vibrant community shaping the future of work, transcending borders, and transforming businesses. Be a part of our journey as we shape the future of work!



Hours: Full-Time, 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM PST, with potential schedule adjustments after the initial few months based on business needs and team alignment.



Job Description

As the NetSuite Accountant, you will play a key role in supporting corporate and parent company accounting across a growing, multi-entity organization. This position is ideal for an accountant with a strong general ledger foundation who enjoys working in dynamic environments, supporting month-end close, and contributing to process improvements as the business scales.



This role goes beyond transactional accounting and provides exposure to intercompany activity, financial reporting, revenue-related accounting, and new initiatives. You will work closely with the Corporate Controller and cross-functional teams to ensure accurate financial reporting while helping build and improve accounting processes.



Key Responsibilities

Core Accounting & Month-End Close

Prepare journal entries ranging from routine to complex, including accruals, payroll, depreciation, prepaids, and other recurring and non-recurring entries.

Support and own assigned areas of the monthly close process, ensuring accuracy and timeliness.

Prepare and review monthly balance sheet reconciliations and supporting schedules with a strong understanding of underlying activity.

Assist in continuously improving and streamlining the month-end close process in partnership with the Controller.



Accounts Payable, Credit Cards & Cash

Review and reconcile accounts payable, credit card transactions, and employee reimbursements from the AP system (e.g., RAMP).

Prepare bank reconciliations with varying levels of volume and complexity.



Intercompany & Multi-Entity Accounting

Prepare and review intercompany transactions, funding flows, and eliminations across multiple entities.

Support accounting across operating companies, holding entities, and related structures to ensure accurate financial reporting.



Revenue, New Initiatives & Special Projects

Support revenue-related accounting, including management fees and other revenue streams, as applicable.

Assist with accounting for new business lines, products, or initiatives by researching and documenting appropriate accounting treatment under U.S. GAAP.

Participate in special projects and new initiatives, providing accounting support and insight as the business evolves.



Financial Reporting & Analysis

Assist with the preparation of monthly, quarterly, and year-end financial statements.

Prepare variance analysis and provide commentary on balance sheet and P&L fluctuations versus prior periods and budget.



Controls, Systems & Process Improvement

Assist in developing, documenting, and maintaining standard operating procedures (SOPs) for assigned accounting areas.

Identify opportunities to improve processes, controls, and automation to enhance accuracy and efficiency.

Work within NetSuite and integrated systems to support clean, scalable, and auditable accounting processes.



Collaboration & Audit Support

Collaborate with FP&A, Legal, Operations, and other cross-functional teams to understand transactions end-to-end.

Communicate effectively with stakeholders, including non-accounting partners.

Assist with audits, reviews, and other external reporting requests as needed.



Qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.

Relevant accounting experience supporting corporate accounting and month-end close (level will align with experience).

Strong understanding of the U.S. GAAP and general ledger accounting.

Experience in a multi-entity environment is preferred.

Proficiency in Excel; experience with NetSuite is strongly required.

Real estate, investment, or fund-related experience is a plus but not required.

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with high attention to detail.

Ability to prioritize tasks, meet deadlines, and adapt in a fast-paced, evolving environment.

Self-motivated, collaborative, and comfortable taking ownership of assigned areas.



What We Offer:

PTOs

Paid US holiday leaves

Opportunity for growth and professional development.

Collaborative and supportive work environment.



How to Apply: Interested applicants should apply using this link: 
/
/f/dp7a
/KN6OJKJT4WHTP193CN



Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview. Applications will be accepted until the role is filled.

title: Photo Editor
description:
Dear,



For our fast-growing e-commerce brand, we are on track to hit 8 figures this year. Therefore, we are looking for a highly skilled Photo Editor with proven experience creating high-converting static ad creatives for e-commerce brands to become a core part of our creatives team.



We are not looking for beginner designers or basic freelancers. We are looking for someone who understands performance marketing, direct response advertising, and how to design creatives that actually generate revenue through paid advertising.



You must understand what makes static advertisements perform well and be extremely creative, detail-oriented, and efficient when producing visual creatives.



To prove you have read this carefully, please apply with the word cranberry before you introduce yourself.



Read on to find out what tasks we expect you to perform, as well as the experience we require for this job.



Please answer the following questions if you are interested:



Do you have experience creating static ad creatives for e-commerce brands?



Have you previously worked with 6–7 figure Shopify brands?



Please include 3–5 static ad creatives you created that were used in paid advertising campaigns.



If available, can you share performance metrics such as CTR, CPA, or ROAS for the ads you created?



Which software do you primarily use for editing (Photoshop, Illustrator, etc.)?



What do you believe makes a static ad creative perform well in paid advertising?



Are you comfortable creating multiple creative variations quickly for testing and scaling campaigns?



Are you available full-time, 6–7 days a week, and responsive during business hours?



As a Photo Editor you must have:



Strong experience creating static ad creatives for e-commerce brands (Must)



High-level proficiency in Adobe Photoshop or equivalent image editing software (Must)



Deep understanding of direct response advertising and performance creatives (Must)



Ability to design high-converting image creatives for paid advertising campaigns (Must)



Strong understanding of visual hierarchy, typography, and conversion-focused layouts (Must)



Ability to produce multiple ad variations quickly for testing and scaling campaigns (Must)



Highly responsive and professional communication (Must)



Prior experience working with 6-7 figure brands or marketing agencies (Pre)



If you do not meet the requirements, please do not apply. (thank you)



Your duties will be:



Creating high-converting static ad creatives for platforms such as
 and Instagram



Designing performance-focused image ads using Photoshop or similar software



Producing multiple creative variations for testing and scaling advertising campaigns



Implementing clear hooks, strong headlines, offers, and conversion-focused layouts



Following creative briefs and brand guidelines provided by the marketing team



Collaborating with the team to develop new creative angles and advertising concepts



Maintaining organized creative files and workflows



Delivering creatives quickly and consistently to support advertising campaigns



Ensuring all creatives meet brand standards and performance goals



FULL SOPs AND CREATIVE REFERENCES PROVIDED



PAID CREATIVE TEST REQUIRED FOR SHORTLISTED CANDIDATES



ROOM TO GROW INTO A SENIOR CREATIVE ROLE



FAST-PACED TEAM BUILDING AN 8-FIGURE BRAND



If you believe you are the right fit for this role and can create world-class static ad creatives that drive real revenue, please respond to this post.



Best regards,

Romeo

title: High-End Interior Designer & 3D Visualiser
description:
Senior Interior Designer – Luxury Residential & Hospitality (Remote)



We are looking for an experienced Senior Interior Designer to join our design-led team, working on high-end residential refurbishment and luxury hospitality projects across London, UK.



This is not a purely conceptual role. We are looking for someone who understands how interiors are designed, detailed, delivered, furnished, and maintained in the real world. The role combines interior design, technical detailing, 3D visualisation, FF&E specification, and ongoing design support for luxury properties already in operation.



You will work across both new design projects and the day-to-day evolution of high-end serviced apartments and residences.



Key responsibilities include:



Producing detailed interior and architectural drawings for design development and construction



Creating high-quality 3D visualisations to develop and test design ideas, materials, lighting, and layouts



Managing interior design workflows from concept design through to FF&E specification and procurement support



Supporting day-to-day operations for luxury properties already under management, including sourcing replacement furniture, fittings, lighting, and decorative items



Proposing design improvements and upgrades aligned with a high-end, hospitality-led aesthetic



Working closely with UK-based architects, designers, and operations teams



Actively using AI tools to improve design development, visualisation, documentation, and workflow efficiency



Ideal background:



We are particularly interested in candidates with experience in high-end residential interiors, luxury hotels, serviced apartments, or high-end private residences. Experience delivering interiors in live hospitality environments is a strong advantage.



Key requirements:



Interior design or architectural background with experience in luxury residential and/or hospitality projects



Strong technical detailing skills with the ability to produce clear, accurate drawings



Excellent 3D visualisation skills for both design development and presentation



Proven experience managing interior design projects from concept through procurement



Confidence sourcing, specifying, and coordinating FF&E, fittings, and decorative items



Strong understanding of materials, finishes, durability, and buildability



Familiarity with UK construction methods; knowledge of UK Building Regulations is a plus



Proficiency in tools such as AutoCAD, SketchUp, Revit, Rhino, 3ds Max, Enscape, V-Ray, and AI-assisted design tools



Candidates who are highly skilled in adopting AI tools are strongly valued



A strong portfolio demonstrating high-quality residential or hospitality interiors (link required)



Why join us:



Work on prestigious London-based residential and luxury hospitality projects



Influence both design quality and real-world execution



Be part of a design-led, detail-driven team with high standards



Gain exposure to the operational side of luxury serviced apartments



Flexible, fully remote working environment



Opportunity to grow into a long-term design and design-operations role



To apply:



Please send your CV, a link to your portfolio, and a short cover letter explaining why you would be a great fit for this role.

To demonstrate attention to detail, please quote reference code TDTArch2801 in your application message.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Airbnb Virtual Assistant / Virtual Concierge / Property Manager (Guesty, Asana, STR Operations)
description:
We are hiring an experienced Airbnb Virtual Assistant / Virtual Property Manager to join our growing short-term rental operations team.



We manage high-quality serviced apartments across Central London, listed on Airbnb, 
, VRBO, and Expedia, and we’re looking for a professional who understands STR operations end-to-end, not just guest messaging.



This is a senior STR operations role with real responsibility, systems, and long-term growth.

________________________________



PLEASE ONLY APPLY IF YOU HAVE STR EXPERIENCE



This role is not suitable for beginners or general VAs.

You must have previous experience working as a Virtual Assistant in short-term rentals / Airbnb management.

________________________________



REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE (READ CAREFULLY)



You must have:

- Strong experience as an Airbnb Virtual Assistant / STR Property Manager

- High proficiency in Guesty PMS and Asana

- Solid knowledge of short-term rental operations, including:

   - Cleaning turnover and laundry coordination

   - Maintenance scheduling

   - Calendar and availability management

   - Travel-time and access planning

   - Full guest journey management (pre-arrival to post-checkout)

- Experience with Airbnb Support, Trust & Safety, Listings, or advanced host-side operations

- Experience working with OTAs (Airbnb, 
, VRBO, Expedia)

- Confident use of ChatGPT and AI tools for guest communication and operations

- Excellent written English and understanding of UK hospitality standards

- Previous experience with UK-based serviced accommodation (strong advantage)



If you don’t meet these requirements, please do not apply.



________________________________



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Guest Support & Virtual Concierge

- Handle guest enquiries, check-ins, and in-stay issues

- Troubleshoot Wi-Fi, smart locks, heating, access, and property questions

- Draft professional guest messages using ChatGPT

- Maintain clear communication records



Airbnb AirCover, Deposits & Reviews

- Prepare and manage Airbnb AirCover claims

- Handle evidence, timelines, and guest follow-ups

- Manage security deposits and deductions

- Review Ring CCTV footage and monitor Minut alerts

- Apply Airbnb Review Policy and review dispute strategies



Operations & Logistics

- Schedule and coordinate cleaners and laundry

- Review cleaning photos and quality control

- Track supplies, invoices, and operational costs

- Liaise with maintenance providers



Listings & OTA Management

- Maintain and optimise Airbnb and OTA listings

- Export new properties to OTAs

- Manage calendars, pricing, and descriptions



Reporting & Improvements

- Assist with monthly performance reporting

- Improve SOPs, workflows, and systems

- Support operational research and ad-hoc tasks



________________________________



IDEAL CANDIDATE PROFILE



- Experienced Airbnb / STR Virtual Assistant

- Highly organised and detail-oriented

- Calm under pressure and solutions-focused

- Tech-savvy and able to work independently

- Reliable, punctual, and long-term focused

- Comfortable handling responsibility and making decisions

________________________________



POSITION DETAILS



- Hours: 40 hours per week

- Schedule: Monthly rotating shifts (UK daytime & UK evenings)

- Type: Full-time, long-term, remote



________________________________



HOW TO APPLY



Apply via OnlineJobs.ph only.



To prove attention to detail, include the phrase “W202816D” in your application. If you are an experienced Airbnb Virtual Assistant / STR Property Manager who enjoys running high-level operations and working with structured systems, we would love to hear from you.

title: AI App Developer
description:
AI Agency Institute

We’re Hiring!



AI App Developer



Full-Time  |  Remote  |  $15–$25/hr AUD



About Us

AI Agency Institute is at the forefront of building AI-powered applications and solutions. We leverage cutting-edge tools like Claude AI and Claude Code to rapidly develop intelligent apps for our clients. We’re a fast-moving, innovation-driven team looking for a talented developer to help us scale our growing portfolio of AI applications.



The Role

We’re looking for a mid-level developer who can take the AI-powered apps we’ve been prototyping with Claude Code and build them out into polished, production-ready products. You’ll work closely with our team to turn concepts into fully functional applications, improve existing builds, and help us push the boundaries of what’s possible with AI-assisted development.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Build out and refine AI-powered applications initially developed with Claude Code

• Develop full-stack web applications (frontend and backend) from concept to deployment

• Work with AI tools and APIs (Claude AI, OpenAI, and similar) to integrate intelligent features into apps

• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

• Collaborate with the team to translate ideas and prototypes into production-ready software

• Debug, test, and optimise applications for performance and reliability

• Stay current with AI development tools and best practices



What We’re Looking For

• 3+ years of experience in web/software development

• Strong proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, or similar languages

• Experience with modern frameworks (React, Next.js, Node.js, or equivalent)

• Familiarity with AI/LLM APIs and tools (Claude, OpenAI, etc.) — experience with Claude Code is a big plus

• Comfortable working with APIs, databases, and cloud services (AWS, Vercel, Supabase, etc.)

• Excellent written communication in English



Nice to Have

• Experience with prompt engineering and AI-assisted development workflows

• Background in building SaaS products or client-facing applications

• Familiarity with no-code/low-code tools alongside traditional development

• Experience with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps basics

• Portfolio or GitHub showcasing personal or professional projects



Compensation & Benefits

• $15–$25/hr AUD depending on experience and skill level

• Full-time, remote position — work from anywhere

• Opportunity to work at the cutting edge of AI application development

• Collaborative, flexible team environment

• Room to grow as we scale our projects and client base



How to Apply



Send us your application with the following:

• Your updated resume/CV

• A brief cover letter explaining why you’re a great fit for this role

• Links to your portfolio, GitHub, or examples of past work

• Any experience you have working with AI tools (especially Claude or Claude Code)



We’re excited to hear from you! If you’re passionate about building with AI and ready to join a team that’s shaping the future of intelligent applications, apply now.

title: Marker (Education_Product Development)
description:

Desirable

title: Operations Coordinator / Operations Manager (NDIS Allied Health Company)
description:
Operations Manager (NDIS Allied Health Company)

Remote | Full-Time | Long-Term Role



We are a fast-growing Australian allied health company supporting children, adults, and families through the National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS).



Our team includes Speech Pathologists, Occupational Therapists, Key Workers, and Allied Health Assistants delivering therapy services across Australia.



We are looking for a highly organised, systems-focused Operations Manager to help run the operational backbone of our company.



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys building systems, improving workflows, managing documentation, and supporting a high-performance team.



This is a long-term leadership support role working directly with the CEO.



About Our Company

We deliver therapy services across Australia through the NDIS and focus on:

• Speech Pathology

• Occupational Therapy

• Key Worker Model

• Neurodiversity-affirming therapy

• Holistic and transdisciplinary care



Our mission is to remove barriers and improve quality of life for families.



We are a values-driven organisation focused on innovation, strong systems, and meaningful impact.



Your Role

As Operations Manager you will help ensure the company runs smoothly behind the scenes.



You will work closely with the CEO to organise systems, improve workflows, support clinicians, and maintain operational structure across the business.



This role requires strong attention to detail, initiative, operational thinking, and the ability to build organised systems that support a growing team.



Key Responsibilities

Operations & Systems

• Create and improve internal operational workflows

• Maintain and organise company SOPs and documentation

• Help build operational systems that support business growth

• Monitor operational processes and identify inefficiencies



NDIS Compliance & Documentation

• Maintain policy and procedure documentation

• Assist with NDIS compliance documentation

• Maintain service agreement templates and client documentation

• Ensure operational documentation is organised and audit-ready



Team Operations Support

• Support clinician onboarding and documentation

• Assist with scheduling and operational coordination

• Ensure internal systems and processes are consistently followed



Business Administration

• Maintain organised digital filing systems

• Support client management systems and CRM processes

• Assist with reporting and operational tracking



Process Improvement

• Identify opportunities to improve workflows

• Help streamline processes to reduce errors and save time

• Assist the CEO in implementing operational improvements



Required Skills

Essential

• Excellent written and spoken English

• Strong organisational and time management skills

• High attention to detail

• Ability to manage multiple systems and tasks

• Strong documentation and process management skills

• Ability to work independently and take initiative

• Strong problem-solving ability



Preferred

• Experience working with Australian companies

• NDIS experience (highly regarded)

• Experience creating SOPs or operational documentation

• Experience with CRM systems or client management systems

• Experience supporting leadership or management teams



Tools We Use

You may work with:

• Cliniko (client management system)

• Microsoft Office

• Xero



Training will be provided where required.



What We Are Looking For

The ideal candidate is:

• Extremely organised

• Systems-oriented

• Reliable and proactive

• Comfortable working with structure and processes

• Able to think operationally and solve problems

• Able to support a growing business with strong internal systems



This is not a simple administrative role.



We are looking for someone who wants to grow with the company and help build strong operational systems.



Work Details

Remote Position

Full-time (40 hours per week)



Long-term opportunity with growth potential.



We are looking for someone who wants to build a career with a growing international company.



Assessment Process

As part of our recruitment process, shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a psychometric assessment. This helps us better understand cognitive strengths, problem-solving ability, communication style, and operational thinking to ensure the role is a strong mutual fit.



This assessment is not about passing or failing. It is designed to help us understand how you work, how you approach complex tasks, and how you may contribute to a high-performing operational team.



Applicants must be comfortable completing this assessment as part of the selection process.



To Apply

Please include:

• A short introduction about yourself

• Your experience working with operations or systems

• Any experience working with NDIS or healthcare companies

• An example of a workflow or system you helped improve



Applications that provide clear examples of operational thinking will be prioritised.



Application Questions

Please answer the following questions in your application:



1. Operational Systems

If you joined our company and noticed that tea
mbers were following different processes for the same task, what steps would you take to standardise and improve the workflow?



2. Operational Prioritisation

A clinician forgets to upload session notes, a client’s service agreement has expired, and the support coordinator is requesting an urgent update. How would you prioritise and resolve the situation?



3. Recruitment Process

Are you willing to complete a short psychometric and cognitive assessment as part of the hiring process?



Please include the word "Systems" at the beginning of your application so we know you have read the full job description.

title: Senior Media Buyer / Ad Specialist
description:
ABOUT THE COMPANY

We are No Problem Marketing, an Australian creative and digital solutions agency working across digital advertising, content, and web development. We move fast, value creativity, and focus on results.

We work with clients across automotive, real estate, and more. Every day is different. Our environment is fast paced, collaborative, and built around problem solving.





ROLE OVERVIEW

We are seeking a data-driven and proactive Senior Media Buyer to take full ownership of our paid acquisition channels. In this role, you won’t just be "pressing buttons"; you will be the strategic lead responsible for launching, managing, and scaling high-performance campaigns across Meta 
/Instagram), Google Ads, and Tiktok Ads.



The ideal candidate thrives on data, understands the nuances of direct-response creative, and is obsessed with tracking the entire customer journey from the first click to a booked leads or sales.





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

*Campaign Management: Plan, build, and optimize full-funnel ad campaigns across Meta, Google, and Tiktok Ads to drive consistent conversions and revenue.

*Performance Monitoring: Conduct daily audits of campaign performance, monitoring key metrics including CPL, CTR, ROAS, and CPA to ensure maximum profitability.

*Creative Strategy: Lead the end-to-end creative iteration process by analyzing performance metrics and collaborating with copy and design teams to produce high-impact, data-driven assets.

*Testing & Scaling: Structure campaigns for aggressive creative testing and audience research. Identify winning strategies and scale budgets while maintaining efficiency.

*End-to-End Tracking: Monitor the lead flow from the initial ad click through to the final booked appointment, ensuring attribution accuracy and funnel health.

*Communication & Reporting: Participate in weekly strategy calls, provide proactive updates on issues, and deliver clear, insight-led reports (CPA, ROAS, MER, etc.) to stakeholders.





QUALIFICIATIONS

*Experience: Minimum 5 years of proven experience as a Media Buyer or Media Planner, preferably within the Australian (AU) market.

*Work Schedule: Fully available for the Australian Eastern Time (AET) business day (9AM to 6PM)

*Technical Proficiency: Deep understanding of media buying tools, platform algorithms, and industry best practices.

*Communication: Exceptional written and verbal communication skills; ability to explain "the why" behind the data.

*Problem Solving: A proactive mindset for troubleshooting underperforming campaigns and navigating compliance-sensitive niches.

*Negotiation: Demonstrated ability to build relationships and manage vendor/client interactions effectively.





WHY JOIN US?

*You will have the autonomy to drive results and the support of a creative team to bring your vision to life. We value transparency, proactive problem-solving, and a "win-fast, learn-faster" mentality.

*We operate in a dynamic, high-trust environment where proactive communication is the standard. This collaborative framework allows us to pivot quickly, align our vision across teams, and execute complex strategies with precision.

*We offer a highly competitive compensation package including a market-leading base salary and a performance-based incentive structure designed to reward high-impact results.



CONTRACT DETAILS

Full time contractor (40 hrs per week)

$2,000 AUD per month, paid via Wise

Work from home with overlap in AEST/AEDT hours

Paid PH public holidays + 20 paid leave days per year

Optional performance bonus tied to delivery metrics and client satisfaction



HOW TO APPLY

Send a link to your CV or Resume.

Loom video with a 1-2 minute introduction.

title: Full Stack Software Engineer
description:
"We are looking for a detail-oriented team player with a passion for technology..."   Yuck. Let's skip that.



We need a full stack engineer who can build anything we throw at them. Not a ticket-taker. Not someone who needs a Jira board and a standup to write a function. A builder. Someone who ships real products, solves real problems, and moves fast enough to make big teams jealous.



You should already be using AI tools to write and deploy code faster than anyone around you. If you're not prompting Cursor, Claude, or Copilot daily, you're already behind.



WE ARE NO PROBLEM

We're a young, fast-moving Australian team building performance-driven digital products and marketing for some of the hungriest automotive and real estate businesses in the country.



We don't just build websites. We build SaaS platforms, marketing tools, internal systems, and the infrastructure that holds it all together. Right now we're building marketing platforms for car dealers and real estate businesses. Both need serious engineering. APIs everywhere. Complex frontend. Database architecture. Payment systems. Notifications. The works.



On top of that, we run client websites, manage servers, and handle the full tech stack for the business. You'd be the technical backbone.



THE ROLE

This is a full stack, full ownership role. You will:

*Build and ship web applications from spec to production (Next.js, TypeScript, Supabase, Tailwind CSS)

*Design and integrate APIs - vehicle data, payment gateways, CRM/DMS systems, SMS and
 providers

*Own database architecture (PostgreSQL via Supabase - schema design, RLS, migrations, edge functions)

*Build frontend with modern React (TanStack Query, React Hook Form, Zod, Server Components)

*Create internal tools, dashboards, and admin panels

*Manage and update client websites (WordPress and custom)

*Handle VPS server admin - deployments, security, DNS, SSL, monitoring

*Domain management,
 config, hosting migrations

*General IT/sysadmin tasks. You're the tech person. If it's technical, it lands on your desk.

*This is not a 'build one component and wait for code review' role. This is a results role.





WHO IS THIS FOR

You'll thrive here if:

*You've got 3+ years building and shipping real web applications

*You're strong in TypeScript, React/Next.js, and PostgreSQL

*You've deployed full stack apps end-to-end, not just worked on pieces

*You're comfortable on Linux servers, SSH, Git, CI/CD, and cloud platforms (Vercel, AWS, DigitalOcean, whatever)

*You already use AI coding tools daily (Cursor, Claude, Copilot) to ship faster than anyone else

*You've got a portfolio, a GitHub, side projects, something - proof you have a passion for building things even in your spare time

*Your English is strong, written and verbal. You'll be working directly with the founder every day.

*You don't need hand-holding

*You care more about shipping great products than job titles or org charts



BONUS POINTS IF YOU HAVE:

*Experience with Supabase, TanStack Query, Zod, React Hook Form

*WordPress dev and management experience

*IT admin / sysadmin / hosting experience (VPS, cPanel, Cloudflare, DNS)

*Marketing experience or exposure to the digital marketing world

*Experience with marketing APIs (Meta/Facebook Ads API, Google Ads API, analytics platforms, CRM integrations)

*Stripe or Xero API integration experience

*Exposure to automotive, real estate, or lead generation industries

*Experience building AI-powered features (LLM APIs, embeddings, vector search, chatbots)

*UI/UX design skills or Figma experience

*We care more about hunger, ability to learn, and what you've actually built than how many years you've been in a seat.



If you're a wizard who picks up new languages and frameworks overnight because you understand the fundamentals deeply enough that syntax is just detail - we want to talk to you.



WHAT WE'LL GIVE YOU

*Real products to build, not busywork

*Direct access to the founder. No middle management. No layers.

*Autonomy. We set the direction, you figure out how to get there.

*As many Cursor, Claude, and Codex credits as you could ever need

*A fast-moving environment where your work actually matters

*Flexibility to work from anywhere in the Philippines



WHAT WE WON'T GIVE YOU

*Micromanagement

*Excuses

*Comfort zones

*A bloated sprint process



WORKING HOURS

Full-time, Monday to Friday

9:00 AM - 6:00 PM Australian time (AEST/AEDT)

Remote - work from wherever you want in the Philippines

You need reliable internet and a backup connection. No exceptions.

Daily communication via WhatsApp and video calls

The Numbers

Here's the offer:

PHP 120,
,000/month (AUD ~$3,000/month)

Full-time contract, paid fortnightly

Compensation reviewed based on performance and contribution

HOW TO APPLY

Send us:

1. Link to Your CV/resume

2. A link to your portfolio, GitHub, or projects you've shipped. This is non-negotiable. No portfolio, no review.

3. A short note (2-3 sentences): What's the most interesting thing you've built recently? How are you using AI in your development workflow right now?



If you don't put effort into the application, don't bother.



***

If you want a slow, predictable, ticket-punching dev job - this isn't it.

If you want to build real products, move fast, and work with a team that rewards output - apply.
