title: AI Engineer & Automation Architect
description:
Company: Take Two

Location: Remote – Philippines (Full-Time, Long-Term Contract)

Reporting To: Head of Acquisition

Hours: Full-Time | Australian Business Hours (Melbourne-aligned)



About Take Two

Take Two is a global online creative education platform working with leading textile and mixed-media artists worldwide. We produce high-quality courses, run live programs, manage global communities, and support thousands of students. We're now building the AI systems layer that will power our next phase of growth.



About the Role

This is a hands-on, senior-level technical role. You won't be writing prompts for ChatGPT — you'll be designing and building the AI systems infrastructure for a real, scaling business.

Working directly with our Founders and Leadership Team, you'll architect and implement intelligent automation across marketing, production, course development, operations, and student success.

Your mission: turn AI from a set of scattered tools into an integrated operational advantage.



What You'll Build



Multi-agent AI systems integrated across our tool stack

Internal GPT-style assistants (brand voice, student support, course summarisation)

RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) knowledge systems

Marketing automation integrated with HubSpot

Workflow automations in ClickUp, Slack, and Google Workspace

AI-supported pre-production through post-production pipelines

Decision-support dashboards and reporting tools

SOP-driven automation with documented triggers, inputs, and outputs





Key Responsibilities



Map existing workflows and identify where AI creates real leverage

Design, build, test, and deploy AI agents and automation systems

Integrate AI into CRM, LMS, project management, and communication tools

Build and maintain RAG frameworks and internal knowledge bases

Define KPIs and monitor system performance, cost, and quality

Document systems clearly and train internal teams on usage

Advise leadership on AI opportunities, risks, and prioritisation

Stay current on emerging AI tools and assess their relevance to the business





Tools & Platforms You'll Work With

HubSpot · ClickUp · Slack · Google Workspace · n8n / Make / Zapier · OpenAI/LLM APIs · RAG frameworks · Webhook/API integrations



You're the Right Fit If You Have:

? Proven experience building live multi-agent AI systems (not just prototypes)

? Hands-on experience with RAG architecture and evaluation

? Strong understanding of LLMs, APIs, and prompt engineering

? Real-world business automation and workflow design experience

? Experience integrating AI with CRM systems (HubSpot highly regarded)

? Clear written English and strong documentation skills

? Ability to work independently and manage your own priorities

? Commercial mindset — you think about ROI, not just what's technically possible



Bonus Points For:



Experience in online education or digital content businesses

Familiarity with content repurposing and marketing automation workflows

SaaS or product thinking





What Success Looks Like in 12 Months



Admin time across key roles is materially reduced

Marketing production cycles are shorter

Internal knowledge is searchable and usable

Repetitive communication tasks are automated

AI is embedded in daily operations — not bolted on





Why This Role Is Worth Your Time

This is a rare opportunity to build an AI operating model from the ground up inside a real, growing business — not a proof-of-concept. You'll have direct access to founders, real systems to work with, and the autonomy to do your best work.



To apply, please include examples of AI systems or automation workflows you have built and deployed in a real business context. Applications without this will not be considered.

title: Coding & Robotics Education Licensee - Master Trainer
description:
Coding & Robotics Education Licensee - Master Trainer







Remote-Based  |  Occasional Travel Required  |  Part-Time / Contract





About Our Company :



We are the leading Coding and Robotics Education Academy in Singapore. Our passion and mission is in teaching the children of today, the skills of tomorrow, and have fun learning it !



About the Role : 



We are seeking a passionate and experienced Coding & Robotics Education Trainer to support our growing network of licensees. The successful candidate will be responsible for training our licensee partners who have adopted our full coding and robotics curriculum, ensuring they are well-equipped to deliver high-quality STEM education programs.



This role is primarily remote-based, with occasional travel required for training sessions, workshops, or partner support.



You will empower our licensees with the knowledge, skills, and confidence to deliver our coding and robotics curriculum effectively to children aged 5 to 14 years old. You will also play a key role in keeping our curriculum fresh, relevant, and engaging by updating existing materials and developing new content as our programmes evolve.



Key Responsibilities :



•	Train and onboard new licensees on our full coding and robotics curriculum, ensuring they are equipped to deliver high-quality lessons.

•	Conduct training workshops and sessions for licensee educators, both virtually and in-person as required.

•	Provide ongoing coaching, mentoring, and support to licensees post-training.

•	Evaluate licensee competency and readiness to deliver the curriculum independently.

•	Review, update, and improve existing curriculum materials to ensure they remain current and effective.

•	Develop new curriculum modules and lesson plans aligned with industry trends and educational best practices.

•	Collaborate with the curriculum and product teams to align training delivery with programme goals.

•	Gather feedback from licensees and learners to continuously improve training programmes.

•	Maintain comprehensive training documentation, guides, and resources.

•	Travel occasionally to licensee locations for in-person training, support, and quality assurance.



Who We Are Looking For :



We are seeking someone who combines a love for education technology with real-world teaching experience. The ideal candidate:

•	Has proven experience training adults in a professional or educational setting.

•	Has hands-on experience teaching or working with children between the ages of 5 and 14 years old.

•	Holds a background in coding, robotics, STEM education, or a closely related field.

•	Is comfortable using and teaching tools such as Scratch, Python, block-based coding platforms, or robotics kits (e.g., LEGO Mindstorms, mBot, or similar).

•	Demonstrates strong curriculum development and instructional design skills.

•	Is an excellent communicator — able to simplify complex technical concepts for varied audiences.

•	Is self-driven, organised, and able to work independently in a remote environment.

•	Is flexible and willing to travel when required.



Qualifications & Experience :



•	Diploma or Degree in Education, Computer Science, Engineering, or a related discipline.

•	Minimum 2 years of teaching or training experience — experience with both children and adults is strongly preferred.

•	Current or former school teachers specialising in Computing, ICT, STEM, or related subjects are warmly encouraged to apply.

•	Experience in curriculum writing, lesson planning, or instructional design is a strong advantage.

•	Experience in a franchising or licensee-based education business is a bonus, but not required.

•	Proficiency in digital tools for remote training delivery (e.g., Zoom, Google Meet, LMS platforms).



What We Offer :



•	Flexible, remote-based working arrangement.

•	A meaningful role shaping the next generation of coders and innovators.

•	A collaborative and supportive team environment.

•	Opportunities for professional development and growth within the organisation.

•	Travel allowances for required in-person training engagements.

•	Competitive remuneration commensurate with experience.

title: Client Call Coordinator
description:
We are a fast-growing structural engineering firm based in Australia and is currently looking for a confident and composed Client Call Coordinator with a strong direct background in client calls and client meetings and has worked in a coordinator project management before. A full-time role from 7:00 AM to 3:30 pm Philippines time, weekdays only.



This role involves direct communication with clients— particularly those related to project delays, drawing status, or technical concerns. Your key responsibility is to act as the first point of contact on the phone, provide a warm and professional experience for the client, and coordinate internally with our design team to ensure timely resolutions.



We are ideally looking for someone who is comfortable under pressure, has excellent communication skills, and enjoys solving  in a fast-paced environment.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:



Answer incoming client phone calls regarding project updates, delays, or technical questions.



Reassure and guide clients calmly and professionally — especially in high-pressure or escalated situations.



Gather relevant information from clients to assist internal design teams.



Follow up on requests with the design team and ensure clients receive timely responses.



Maintain detailed records of calls and follow-ups using internal systems.



Escalate urgent or complex issues to the appropriate internal tea
mbers.



Build and maintain strong client relationships through consistent and reliable communication.



Assist in improving call-handling procedures and response workflows.



SKILLS & QUALIFICATIONS:



A university degree or diploma



Previous experience in a client-facing or coordination role is highly desirable.



Excellent verbal communication skills with a calm and empathetic phone manner.



Ability to handle pressure, de-escalate tense situations, and remain composed under stress.



Strong organizational and time management skills.



Comfortable with regular phone interaction as the core part of the role.



Basic understanding of engineering or construction drawings is a PLUS.



Proficient in using collaboration tools (e.g., Teams, CRM systems, call logging software).



NICE TO HAVE:



Familiarity with the design and construction industry.



Experience working with internal engineering or design teams.



Prior work in a support or help desk-style role involving technical discussions.



To apply and be considered, please follow the below: 



1. Please send a link to your most updated CV and a short recording link explaining your relevant experience to the role.

2. Use 3 apply points.



Only those applicants who follow the above instructions will be contacted.

title: One-on-One English Education Institution - Filipino Tutor Resource Partner Recruitment
description:
Requirements for Partner Agencies/Individuals

1. Direct Resource Access: Must have direct access to a pool of Filipino tutors(no multi-layer intermediaries) to ensure stable supply and competitive pricing.

2. Pre-Screening Capability: Ability to conduct initial screenings (document verification, oral English assessment, attitude evaluation) before submitting candidates.

3. Attitude & Quality Control: Strictly exclude tutors with poor work attitude, lack of professionalism, or weak communication skills.

4. Operational Support: Assist in coordinating the interview schedules, facilitating onboarding, and handling basic communication with tutors during their employment (e.g., schedule adjustments).

5. Integrity: Ensure all submitted tutor information and certificates are 100% authentic. Any fraudulent information will result in immediate termination of cooperation.

6. SERIOUS INQUIRIES ONLY: We are seeking long-term partners, not one-time suppliers.

 

Our Cooperation Advantages

1. Stable & Large Demand: We have a large base of young students with dense weekly class schedules, ensuring a steady flow of tutor placements for our partners.

2. Efficient Process: A dedicated account manager will handle communications. Our verification process is transparent and efficient, minimize waiting time.

3. Guaranteed Payments: Flexible and reliable payment terms (Monthly or Weekly settlements available). We maintain a zero-tolerance policy for delayed payments.

4. Exclusive Partnership: High-performing partners (providing high-quality tutors and excellent service) will be offered exclusive cooperation rights for all our future tutor needs.

 

Scope of Cooperation Services

1. Candidate Sourcing: Partners source and pre-screen tutors based on our specific requirements (quantity, experience with kids, availability).

2. Interview Coordination: Partners submit shortlisted CVs and assist in scheduling demo lessons between tutors and our academic team.



Requirements for Partner Agencies/Individuals

1. Direct Resource Access: Must have direct access to a pool of Filipino tutors (no multi-layer intermediaries) to ensure stable supply and competitive pricing.

2. Pre-Screening Capability: Ability to conduct initial screenings (document verification, oral English assessment, attitude evaluation) before submitting candidates.

3. Attitude & Quality Control: Strictly exclude tutors with poor work attitude, lack of professionalism, or weak communication skills.

4. Operational Support: Assist in coordinating the interview schedules, facilitating onboarding, and handling basic communication with tutors during their employment (e.g., schedule adjustments).

5. Integrity: Ensure all submitted tutor information and certificates are 100% authentic. Any fraudulent information will result in immediate termination of cooperation.

6. SERIOUS INQUIRIES ONLY: We are seeking long-term partners, not one-time suppliers.

 

Our Cooperation Advantages

1. Stable & Large Demand: We have a large base of young students with dense weekly class schedules, ensuring a steady flow of tutor placements for our partners.

2. Efficient Process: A dedicated account manager will handle communications. Our verification process is transparent and efficient, minimize waiting time.

3. Guaranteed Payments: Flexible and reliable payment terms (Monthly or Weekly settlements available). We maintain a zero-tolerance policy for delayed payments.

4. Exclusive Partnership: High-performing partners (providing high-quality tutors and excellent service) will be offered exclusive cooperation rights for all our future tutor needs.

 

Scope of Cooperation Services

 1. Candidate Sourcing: Partners source and pre-screen tutors based on our specific requirements (quantity, experience with kids, availability).

2. Interview Coordination: Partners submit shortlisted CVs and assist in scheduling demo lessons between tutors and our academic team.

3. Onboarding Support: Assist tutors in completing our internal onboarding process and understanding teaching requirements.

4. Ongoing Communication: Act as a liaison for basic operational issues (e.g., schedule changes, technical difficulties) to ensure smooth teaching operations.



Cooperation Process

1. Initial Contact: Partners contact us with a detailed introduction to their tutor resources (scale, qualifications, supply capacity).

2. Resource Verification: Partners submit a sample of 3-5 qualified tutor CVs for our review and demo lesson assessment.

3. Trial Cooperation: A small-batch trial recruitment will be conducted to evaluate resource quality and communication efficiency.

4. Formal Partnership: Upon satisfactory trial results, a formal cooperation agreement is signed, and large-scale tutor supply begins.

 

Note

 

When applying, please attach a brief introduction to your Filipino tutor resource pool (including the number of available tutors, their average teaching experience, and your supply capacity) to facilitate our efficient review.

 

SERIOUS INQUIRIES ONLY!

title: Assistant Operations Manager - Remote| Singapore Company
description:
ASSISTANT OPERATIONS MANAGER — REMOTE | SINGAPORE COMPANY

Slim Sassy Strong Pte Ltd | Remote Full-Time | php20K–45K+ | Singapore travel opportunities



You’re good at your job. You’re just tired of the commute.

You’ve spent years working onsite — handling clients, managing workflows, keeping things running. You’re competent, you’re professional, and you show up.

But the traffic is costing you 2–3 hours every day. Hours you’d rather spend building something.

We’re offering you a way out of the commute — without stepping back in your career.



Slim Sassy Strong is a women’s wellness education company headquartered in Singapore. We are hiring one Assistant Operations Manager to join our remote operations team, with a structured path to Operations Manager and Senior Operations Manager.



This is a serious career role, not a work-from-home side gig.



|Phase   |Role                     |Compensation    |

|--------|-------------------------|----------------|

|Month 1 |Training                 |php20,000 fixed   |

|Phase 2 |AOM (KPI-based)          |php28,000 starting|

|Phase 3 |Operations Manager       |php35,000–php45,000 |

|Advanced|Senior Operations Manager|php45,000+        |



Plus: selected tea
mbers travel to Singapore for company events and operations.

Advancement is based on performance — not time served.



You will work directly with Singapore-based leadership as an operational extension of the business:

	-	Manage executive calendars and protect leadership time

	-	Own structured
 communication and client follow-ups

	-	Track KPIs, deadlines, and team task execution

	-	Conduct client-facing calls — professionally and confidently

	-	Support the consult pipeline and marketing-to-ops handover

	-	Maintain SOP compliance and operational documentation



As you grow into OM, you lead the team, own systems, and make decisions independently.

Client communication is a core part of this role — not an occasional task.



Why this works for you:

	-	No commute. Work from home, full-time, with a Singapore company on your resume.

	-	Real career track — AOM ? OM ? SOM with compensation that grows with your scope

	-	Singapore travel — top performers join us onsite for events and operational stints

	-	Above-market ceiling — ?45K+ for senior performers

	-	Long-term stability — we grow with people who perform; we don’t churn talent



You’ll do well here if:

You’ve worked onsite in operations, client coordination, admin, hospitality, or a similar field. You’re used to being relied on. You’re not looking for an easy job — you’re looking for a better setup to do your best work in.

Specifically, you:

	-	Are confident handling clients directly — calls, not just chat

	-	Stay composed and professional under pressure

	-	Meet deadlines without being chased

	-	Communicate clearly and directly, especially when escalating

	-	Are fast with digital tools and willing to learn new systems

	-	Want to build a career, not just collect a paycheck

	-	You don’t mind putting in extra hours when it counts. You just want those hours to actually mean something.



Technical requirements

	-	Minimum 50 WPM typing speed

	-	Strong written and spoken English — business standard

	-	Stable internet with a documented backup connection

	-	Own laptop suitable for business use

	-	Familiarity with Google Workspace or similar tools



How to apply:



 with the exact subject line:

Assistant Operations Manager Application

Include all of the following — incomplete applications will not be reviewed:

	1.	One paragraph: what you’ve handled onsite and why you’re ready to bring that to a remote leadership role

	2.	Your current city and power/internet stability details

	3.	Device specs + internet speed screenshot

	4.	Your backup plan during outages

	5.	A 1–2 minute informal audio introduction

	6.	DISC profile screenshot (OnlineJobs)

	7.	Typing test screenshot (min. 50 WPM)

title: AI Narrative Designer (Entry Level - Remote)
description:
(Fresh Graduates are welcome to apply)



Our client is building AI-powered roleplay simulations to help professionals practice real-world conversations. We’re looking for someone who enjoys experimenting with AI tools and has strong written English to help test and refine these simulations.

In this role, you’ll work closely with our team to review, test, and improve AI-generated conversations, ensuring they feel realistic, logical, and culturally appropriate for professional scenarios.

You don’t need a technical background or coding skills. What matters most is clear thinking, strong writing, and curiosity about AI tools like ChatGPT. Fresh Graduates are welcome to apply



What You’ll Do

- Refine prompts and instructions to improve AI responses

- Review dialogue for clarity, tone, and logical flow

- Identify where AI outputs feel unnatural or unrealistic

- Suggest improvements to prompts and scenarios

- Run multiple prompt tests to improve conversation quality

- Collaborate with the team to refine training simulations



What We’re Looking For

- A strong English writer and communicator

- Curious about AI tools like ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity

- Logical and detail-oriented

- Able to think critically about conversations and realism

- Comfortable experimenting and testing different approaches

- Able to work independently and follow structured instructions



Preferred Backgrounds

- Communications

- Marketing

- Psychology

- English / Literature

- Content Writing

- Social Media / Digital Marketing



Nice to Have (But Not Required)

- Experience using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.)

- Experience with content writing or editing

- Experience reviewing conversations, scripts, or dialogue

- Interest in emerging AI technologies



What Success Looks Like

- Improving the realism and quality of AI-generated conversations

- Identifying logical or cultural gaps in AI responses

- Helping refine prompts to produce better outputs

- Contributing to the development of high-quality roleplay simulations

title: Operations Manager (Remote) - Hospitality
description:
About Us

We manage a growing portfolio of short-term rental properties across two US markets. We operate furnished units on Airbnb, VRBO, and direct booking channels, supported by a remote VA team, a revenue manager, and a local vendor network. We are building the operational infrastructure to scale from our current portfolio to 50+ units.

Why This Role Exists

Our goal is simple: the only things that should require the owner’s time are landlord relationships and final sign-off on major decisions. Everything else — maintenance, vendors, guest problems, compliance — should either be handled by you directly or brought to the owner as a recommendation, not an open question.

We need someone who can own the operational layer: investigate issues, weigh options, make decisions within their authority, and present clear recommendations when something exceeds their limits. You are not a task executor who asks “what should we do?” You are the person who says “here’s what happened, here are the options, and here’s what I recommend.”

What You Will Own

Maintenance, Vendors & Network Building

 ? Triage all maintenance requests and dispatch vendors across both markets — plumbers, electricians, HVAC, pest control, handymen

 ? Proactively source and vet new vendors through cold outreach, pricing benchmarks, and fit assessments — building ranked primary, backup, and emergency options per market

 ? Negotiate vendor rates, manage renewals, verify invoices, and own vendor relationships day-to-day

 ? Track all open maintenance items daily and own the preventive maintenance calendar without being reminded

 ? Handle insurance claims end-to-end: document damage, file, follow up with adjusters

Guest Escalation & Problem Resolution

 ? Handle escalations the messaging VAs cannot resolve: maintenance disruptions, amenity outages, noise complaints, compensation demands

 ? Coordinate emergency responses — lockouts, water leaks, HVAC failures, pest sightings — and draft guest communications for complex situations

 ? Issue refunds and credits within your authority independently, escalate anything above your limit with a recommendation

VA Team Management

 ? Direct and coordinate the work of two remote VAs handling guest messaging and daily admin

 ? Assign tasks, monitor output quality, provide feedback, and serve as their first point of escalation

 ? Identify workflow gaps and propose improvements — they escalate to you, not the owner

Compliance & Monitoring

 ? Maintain a compliance calendar covering STR permits, business licenses, and insurance renewals

 ? Monitor for city and county regulation changes that affect our properties

 ? Review post-clean photos before guest check-in and coordinate same-day cleaner coverage when needed

Decision Authority

This role comes with real authority. You will have a defined spend limit to dispatch vendors, issue guest compensation, and purchase supplies without checking in first. Within those limits, you act — you don’t ask. When something exceeds your authority, you bring a recommendation, not a question. Authority limits expand as you demonstrate judgment.

What We Are Looking For

Required:

 ? 2+ years in short-term rental operations, property management, or hotel/hospitality operations

 ? Comfortable making decisions and taking action independently — not waiting for direction

 ? Experience sourcing and coordinating vendors or contractors, including cold outreach

 ? Strong written and spoken English — guest messages, vendor calls, negotiation
s are daily tasks

 ? Highly organized with the ability to manage multiple open items across several properties simultaneously

 ? Comfortable with Google Workspace, Slack, and Notion

 ? Available at least 6 hours overlap with US Central Time (8am–5pm CT)

Preferred:

 ? Experience with Airbnb/VRBO host-side platforms

 ? Familiarity with property management tools (Guesty, Hospitable, OwnerRez, or similar)

 ? Experience managing or directing other remote workers or VAs

 ? Experience building a vendor network in a market you weren’t physically present in

Who thrives here:

 ? Your instinct when a problem lands is to research, assess options, and bring a recommendation — not ask what to do

 ? You build vendor relationships before you need them, not after

 ? You communicate proactively — the owner never has to ask “what happened with X?” because you already sent the update

 ? You’re comfortable holding others accountable, not just doing everything yourself

 ? You treat the business like it’s yours

How to Apply

Apply through OnlineJobs.ph. Send us the following — incomplete applications will not be reviewed:

 1. Your OnlineJobs.ph profile link

 2. Your expected monthly rate in USD and your available hours in Central Time

 3. A Loom video (under 5 minutes). No scripts, no slides, no prep needed. Turn on the camera and cover three things: who you are and what you’ve done operationally, a specific time you identified a problem, figured out the options, and brought a recommendation to your manager — what happened and what did you d
, and finally how you approach situations where you don’t have all the information and the owner is unreachable. We’re not grading the answer — we’re listening to how you think.

title: UGC Video Editor
description:
Role: UGC Video Editor

Location: Remote (9AM - 1PM UK Time)



Are you more than “just an editor” or someone who just “cuts clips".? We’re looking for someone who creates ads that stop the scroll, drive clicks, and sell products.



If you:

- Know what makes a viewer STOP in the first 3 seconds

- Can take raw UGC and turn it into multiple performance-driven concepts

- Understand that speed + quality = results

- Want to be rewarded for impact, not just output



Then this is for you.



???? The Role

As our Video Editor, you’ll be creating direct-response ad creatives for fast-growing eCommerce brands. This is not just an editing role, you’ll be part of the creative strategy loop, working with our team to:

- Edit scroll-stopping video ads designed to convert

- Iterate & optimize creatives based on real performance data

- Suggest new angles, hooks & formats proactively - not waiting for someone to handhold you

If you thrive in a fast-paced, results-driven environment, where urgency & ownership are valued, you’ll fit right in.



?? What You'll Do

- Edit direct-response video ads using UGC, AI, broll, voiceovers, reviews, and product demos etc.

- Proactively suggest improvements to existing ads to drive further performance.

- Brief in new creative versions or angles based on data (with support from strategy team)



? What We’re Looking For

- 2+ years editing ads specifically for eCommerce

- Proven portfolio of real ad creatives that have driven results (bonus points for metrics)

- Understands direct-response frameworks (Problem ? Solution, PAS, AIDA, etc.)

- Knows the key creative performance metrics (CTR, Thumb Stop Ratio, ROAS, CPA)

- Fast without sacrificing quality - you can turn around edits quickly and meet deadlines consistently

- Proactive & resourceful - you suggest ideas, solve problems, and own your craft

- Comfortable in Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut or similar tools



If you just want someone to “hand you clips and tell you what to do,” this isn’t for you.



Note:

This role will start as a contract position, with the possibility of extension based on performance and team requirements.



???? How to Apply

You'll need to include:

- A link to your portfolio

- Examples of ads you’ve edited (with results if possible)

COMPANY INFO

We’re a small but rapidly expanding eCommerce store, specializing in selling fire pits, fireplaces, and a variety of fire and heat products. As our revenue grows, so does our need for a versatile individual to handle sales and customer service.

As we scale, our sales team and customer support team both need help. We’re looking for a Support Guru who can juggle a variety of tasks and can confidently support both sides of the business. Your role will be crucial as we continue to grow.

This is an exciting long-term opportunity for you! As you develop your skills, your role can evolve based on your interests and strengths. We’ll provide you with the training and resources you need to thrive.



JOB OVERVIEW

Sales/BPO experience  - MUST

At the top of your cover letter, please write "It is snowing in Canada.” all applicants without this message will immediately be skipped over

title: Part-Time Professional Video Editor (DaVinci Resolve / Premiere Pro) – Long Form Content
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled and experienced video editor to support an ongoing project with regular YouTube video uploads.



This is a part-time role to start, with the potential to grow into more work over time if the collaboration goes well.



Please read carefully before applying.





IMPORTANT REQUIREMENTS



You must be very experienced with professional editing software, specifically:



• DaVinci Resolve OR  

• Adobe Premiere Pro



Basic tools such as CapCut or similar apps are NOT sufficient for this role.



The footage is filmed in S-Log, so you must be very comfortable working with log footage and professional color grading, including using LUTs and building a strong grading workflow.



We are specifically looking for someone who has serious experience with professional editing and color grading — not simple social media edits or short-form content.





STYLE OF EDITING



The editing style is cinematic, calm, and high quality — not flashy or fast-paced.



The focus is on:



• Cinematic color grading  

• Careful attention to light, tone, and atmosphere  

• Occasional masking and professional grading techniques  

• Clean, thoughtful pacing



The videos are filmed with two static cameras on tripods, and the edit mainly involves switching between angles at the right 
nts while maintaining a cinematic feel.



The videos include peaceful background music, so it’s important that the editor has a good sense of rhythm and timing — knowing when to switch angles naturally with the flow of the video and music. Experience with properly syncing audio and video is also important.





PROJECT FORMAT



• Long-form YouTube videos (4K, horizontal), published weekly or bi-weekly  

• Editing focuses on creating a clean, cinematic long-form experience



Later on, after we are comfortable working together, we may also create short vertical clips or reels from the YouTube videos. However, the main focus is the long-form YouTube edits.





PLEASE ONLY APPLY IF



• You have years of experience with professional video editing  

• You are highly skilled at color grading  

• You have experience editing long-form horizontal content  

• You are comfortable working in 4K workflows with log footage

• You are confident using DaVinci Resolve or Premiere Pro at a professional level



If your experience is mainly short-form social media edits or simple Instagram content, this role will not be a good fit.





TO APPLY



Please send:



1. Your full name  

2. A short introduction  

3. Your editing software of choice (DaVinci or Premiere)  

4. Links to examples of your best work — especially long-form YouTube content  

5. Your hourly rate  

6. Your weekly availability



We’re looking forward to finding someone serious about their craft who enjoys creating beautiful cinematic edits.



Thank you.

title: TikTok / Short-form Video Editor - DIY & Renovation content
description:
Hi! I’m looking for a skilled video editor to help me create engaging TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts focused on UK house renovation content.



You’ll receive raw footage each evening (9-10pm UK time) via WeTransfer, and your job is to edit it into 2-3 minute videos that match my current editing style and personality - fast-paced, dynamic, and engaging. Most clips should appear on screen for less than 0.8 seconds unless I’m speaking or there’s a key action like singing or dancing.



Videos are posted daily, with up to 10 videos some weeks. You must deliver each edited video within 12 hours of receiving the footage (by 9-10am UK time the next day).



What you’ll do:

- Cut longer raw house renovation footage into punchy, engaging short-form videos.

- Follow my existing editing style but always look for ways to make the content better.

- Deliver final videos via WeTransfer within the strict turnaround time.

- Communicate clearly about progress and revisions.



What I’m looking for:

- Experience editing viral short-form videos for TikTok, Instagram, or YouTube Shorts.

- Ability to work under tight deadlines, 7 days a week.

- Proficient with any adobe premiere pro

- MUST be able to edit 360 footage from an Insta360 camera

- Great attention to detail and reliability.

- Strong English comprehension for following instructions and communication.



Hours & Pay:

- Up to 7-10 videos per week, about 1-2 hours editing per video.

- Max 15 hours per week.

- Pay rate: $5 USD/hour.



How to apply:

- Please send a brief summary of your experience editing short-form content, links to your previous work or portfolio. Include "Benje I want to edit your content" in your application. Do not apply if you can't edit 360 footage.

title: Virtual Technical Operations Assistant (Jira / Confluence / HubSpot)
description:
IMPORTANT – PLEASE READ BEFORE APPLYING



To help us identify candidates who are detail-oriented and comfortable working with operational systems, please carefully follow the instructions below.



When submitting your application, please start your message with the word:



STRUCTURE



Then include the following four items at the top of your application:



The phrase: “Systems Operations Assistant Application.”



A short description (2–3 sentences) describing your experience with Jira, Confluence, or HubSpot.



Your hourly rate expectation.



Confirmation that you are willing to work U.S. business hours (Eastern Time).



Applications that do not follow these instructions may not be reviewed.





ABOUT THE ROLE



We are seeking a Virtual Technical Operations Assistant who will help support our team in operating several internal systems including Jira, Confluence, and HubSpot, along with limited administrative coordination.



This role is best suited for someone who is comfortable working inside software platforms, organizing information, creating templates and forms, and helping teams extract useful information from operational systems.



This is not a system architecture or developer role. Instead, the assistant will help keep our operational tools organized, structured, and up to date.



The role is initially a part-time role of 20-25 hours per week with the potential to expand to full-time.



Approximately:



60–70% of the role will involve system support

30–40% will involve administrative coordination



PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES



SYSTEM SUPPORT (60–70%)



Assist the team with operational management of internal systems.



Jira

• Create and manage tickets

• Maintain project boards

• Configure basic ticket templates and fields

• Assist with intake forms

• Run queries and generate reports

• Help keep workflows organized



Confluence

• Create and maintain documentation pages

• Organize knowledge base content

• Format and structure internal documentation

• Maintain page hierarchy and structure



HubSpot

• Update contacts, companies, and deals

• Maintain pipelines and records

• Generate reports and dashboards

• Assist with workflow updates

• Extract data for reporting and analysis



General Systems Support

• Maintain organized data and documentation

• Assist with extracting information from systems

• Help teams maintain structured operational tools



ADMINISTRATIVE SUPPORT (30–40%)



Provide light operational and administrative support including:



• Managing calendars and scheduling meetings

• Coordinating meetings with multiple participants

• Preparing meeting notes or summaries

• Ordering basic office supplies when needed

• Assisting with internal coordination tasks

• Helping maintain organized workflows for the team



REQUIRED SKILLS



• Experience working with Jira, Confluence, or similar project management systems

• Experience using HubSpot or other CRM platforms

• Strong organizational and documentation skills

• Excellent written English

• Strong attention to detail

• Ability to work independently in a remote environment

• Must work US Eastern Time Business Hours



PREFERRED EXPERIENCE



• 3+ years working as an operations assistant, project coordinator, or CRM support role

• Experience supporting software or technology teams

• Experience preparing reports or dashboards

• Familiarity with Microsoft 365 or Google Workspace



IDEAL CANDIDATE



The ideal candidate:



• Enjoys organizing systems and processes

• Is detail-oriented and structured

• Is comfortable learning new tools quickly

• Can help teams keep operational platforms organized

• Communicates clearly and professionally

title: Creative Strategist & Content Producer
description:
About the company

At Miraco Nutripharm, we are dedicated to advancing health & improving lives. Our goal is to relieve 1 billion people worldwide of pain & discomfort. If you know of anyone who has been worried about or suffered from any health problems, join us in making a positive impact by reducing the pain & distress others have to endure.

Job description

We're looking for a Creative Strategist & Content Producer to shape how our health & pharmaceutical brands communicate across both digital & offline channels. You'll craft effective strategies that translate scientific credibility into compelling storytelling & creative assets - helping us engage our diverse audience as we expand our presence regionally. 



The Creative Strategist & Content Producer will be the visionary link between our brand identity, compelling content creation & drive measurable performance across all key channels. This role is responsible for developing & testing high-impact creative strategies as well as producing content assets (visual, video, copy) internally, specifically designed to drive traffic, increase conversion rates, lower Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) & drive overall revenue growth for our Shopify, Shopee & Lazada stores via social media as well as paid advertising platforms.



You'll work across multiple channels & markets to plan, create & optimize content that builds awareness, strengthens partnerships & supports the new channels of the business. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys balancing creativity, analytics & brand strategy in the health supplement industry. 



Key Responsibilities:

Creative Strategy

- Platform & Channel Strategy: Craft tailored creative strategies for B2C & B2B audiences optimized for platform-specific best practices & formats that align with brand goals & regulatory requirements in each market (e.g., Meta carousel ads, vertical video for TikTok/Reels, static product carousels for Shopee/Lazada e-commerce banner ads).

- Hypothesis Generation & A/B Testing: Develop robust creative testing matrices, formulate clear hypotheses for creative elements (hooks, calls-to-action, visual styles, copy length) that drive measurable improvements in Click-Through Rate (CTR) & Conversion Rate (CVR).

- Audience Segmentation: Translate target audience data & segmentation provided by media buyers into resonant creative themes, ensuring content speaks directly to different stages of the marketing funnel (awareness, consideration, conversion).

- Competitive Analysis: Continuously keep up to date with competitors & industry trends, identifying new & successful creative formats, hooks & messaging to finetune our strategy.

In-House Content Production & Execution 

- Performance Creative Development: Lead the end-to-end creative concept development & production for all organic & paid media campaigns (Meta, TikTok, Google/YouTube, etc.) that align with brand & campaign goals, focusing on high-volume, quick-turnaround testing required for performance marketing.

- Hands-on Asset Creation: Directly produce & edit native social content & performance ads using existing assets, stock libraries & internal resources. This includes:

i. Plan platform-specific content calendars: Cover educational, promotional & corporate communications

ii. Static/Image Editing: Adapt product photography, create ad variations & design simple graphics & banner ads

iii. Video Editing: Fast-paced assembly, cutting, adding text overlays, music & effects for short-form, vertical video (UGC-style, product demos, testimonials)

- Copywriting: Develop high-converting ad copy, landing page headlines & social media captions that align with the creative strategy & brand voice, with a focus on clear value propositions & strong CTAs.

- Asset Management: Ensure all campaign assets are correctly tagged, archived & deployed across relevant channels (Shopify, Shopee, Lazada store fronts & advertising platforms).

- Testing & Optimization: apply insights & analytics to refine & optimize content effectiveness across platforms.

Performance & Reporting

- Data-Driven Insights: Work closely with the Marketing Manager to analyze creative performance reports, identifying which creative variables are driving results (or failing) across Shopify, Shopee & Lazada traffic.

- Iteration & Optimization: 

i. Develop, adapt or review content & formats to improve engagement & performance

ii. Use performance data (ROAS, CPA, CTR, CVR) to rapidly iterate on existing creative assets & inform future strategy, ensuring a continuous cycle of improvement & optimization

Storefront Integration: Integrate winning creative messages & visuals onto the respective e-commerce storefronts (product pages, banners) to ensure a cohesive customer journey.

Multi-Channel Storytelling

- Content cohesion: Ensure content is aligned where possible across digital & print media, including LinkedIn, Instagram,
, YouTube, e-commerce platforms, brochures & trade materials.

- Tailor content: To achieve relevance & effectiveness across different stages of the audience journey — from brand awareness & education to conversion.

- Storytelling & visual consistency: To strengthen brand trust & recognition.

Compliance & Brand Integrity

- Uphold regulatory & ethical communication standards across all marketing activities.

- Ensure all content complies with regulatory guidelines & marketing requirements in each country we operate in, including product claims, advertising language & digital promotions.

- Maintain brand credibility by ensuring all communications are factual & aligned with company values.

- Collaborate with internal teams to review materials for accuracy, effectiveness & compliance before publication.



Requirements:

- 3–5 years of experience in creative strategy, content creation, social media, or brand marketing — ideally in health supplements, healthcare or wellness.

- Strong understanding of social media trends & platform best practices (Meta (FB/IG), LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, Google, Generative AI).

- Proficient in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, Premiere Pro), CapCut, Canva, Figma, or similar tools.

- Excellent writing, editing & visual storytelling skills — adopt a strategic approach to design that integrates marketing & commercial goals.

- Excellent communication, project management & cross-functional collaboration skills.

- Familiarity with regulatory communication standards or track record in health supplements or healthcare industry is a plus.



Please send your applications to

title: Graphic Designer
description:

Chain Lightning Design & Marketing (CLDM)



Are you a designer looking to be a part of the next big design revolution? 



We are building one of the fastest and most talented design teams in the world.



CLDM is a new design and marketing company that produces branding, logos, and marketing campaigns live with clients in real-time.



Instead of taking weeks like traditional agencies, we create designs in rapid iteration sessions and launch brands in hours.

We are looking for fast, talented designers who want to improve their skills and grow with an international team.



Compensation



Starting pay: ?250 PHP/hr

Generous bonuses available during live design shows - potentially doubling the hourly pay or more. This will be explained during the interview. This is the starting pay but expect this to go up significantly as you climb up the company!



Work Schedule



You must be able to collaborate across:

Pacific Standard Time (PST)

Philippine Standard Time (PhST)

Typical collaboration window examples:

10:00 PM PST / 2:00 PM PhST

Designers must be able to produce ideas quickly and iterate fast. AI assistance is encouraged. 



Required Skills

• Adobe Suite



Nice to have:

• Canva

• AI design tools

• Branding experience



Important: This Is a Fast Design Environment

Chain-Lightning designers work in rapid design sprints.

This role is ideal for designers who:

• Work fast

• Learn quickly

• Enjoy creative challenges



This Job Is NOT For

Designers who:

How to Apply

Submit:

1?? Portfolio

2?? Resume



Also answer this question:

How many logo concepts can you create in 30 minutes?

Applications that do not answer this question will be ignored.



Much of this position is a learning opportunity where the job pays you to learn. Then we’ll put those skills to a live demonstration for the customers. 



We’re revolutionizing the way the design industry is operating and we’re looking to build the most talented design team to lead it. 



Looking forward to meeting you!

title: Reviser (Education_Product Development)
description:
To carry out review and approval of assessment materials to support the effective operation of NCC Education’s assessment cycles in line with company standards and regulatory requirements. 



Role Specific: 

• To review assessment materials submitted to NCC Education for the above named unit(s) using the Reviser Scrutiny Report document provided by NCC Education, within the timeframe set by NCC Education and following guidance from the Product Development department.



• To provide to NCC Education a complete Reviser Scrutiny Report with confirmation as to whether the assessment materials for the above named unit(s) meet all company standards and regulatory requirements, including correcting or commenting upon any spelling, grammar or punctuation errors.



• In the event the assessment materials do not meet company standards and regulatory requirements, to provide within the Reviser Scrutiny Report direct and unambiguous information to NCC Education as to how the assessment materials do not meet such requirements and to provide clear and unambiguous instructions as to how these requirements need to be revised by the Setter.



• To complete the initial review of assessment materials (see above) within a maximum of seven working days or to notify NCC Education of any extenuating circumstances which may prevent this.



• To review and approve any subsequent changes made by the Setter as the result of the clear and unambiguous instructions in the Reviser Scrutiny Report during the initial review of assessment materials within a maximum of seven working days or to notify NCC Education of any extenuating circumstances which may prevent this.



• To incorporate post-assessment board feedback into future reviews of assessment material for the above named unit(s).



• To undertake training as required by NCC Education.



Essential:

•	A relevant academic qualification (Bachelor’s or Master’s degree) in a related discipline (e.g., Business, Computing, Education, English).

•	Experience in assessment design, academic editing, or examination moderation.

•	Excellent written English, grammar, and attention to detail.

•	Strong understanding of curriculum alignment, learning outcomes, and assessment principles.

•	Ability to work independently to strict deadlines while maintaining high quality.



Desirable:

•	Experience with UK qualifications and frameworks (e.g., RQF, Ofqual).

•	Familiarity with digital learning and assessment platforms.

•	Experience working in international education environments.

•	Professional teaching, examining, or instructional design background.

title: YouTube Editor for Educational Fitness Channel (Long?Form + Shorts)
description:
About us



I run an online coaching/education business helping people move better, get out of pain, and train smarter. We create long?form educational content on biomechanics, lifting, and injury?proofing, then cut it into shorts.

This is a long?term, full?time role for a PH?based editor who wants to grow with the channel, not a one?off project.

Role overview



You will own editing of our long?form YouTube videos (talking head + screen share + training footage) and cutting them into shorts/reels. You must be able to follow detailed notes and SOPs and turn around a strong V1 without guessing.



What you’ll do



- Edit 4–8 long?form YouTube videos per month

- Add B?roll, lower thirds, callouts, zooms, sound effects, and pattern?interrupts to keep retention high

- Create 5–10 shorts/reels per long video using hooks and templates

- Follow written edit notes and checklists for each video

- Organize project files and exports in our folder system

- Communicate daily with our small remote team via chat, Dropbox, and Loom



Must?haves



- Strong written and spoken English (you will read and implement detailed notes/SOPs)

- Proven experience editing educational / talking?head YouTube content (not just gaming or travel montages)

- Comfortable taking direct feedback and iterating quickly

- Can follow a checklist exactly and ask questions when something is unclear

- Stable internet and a machine that can handle 4K footage

- Able to work mostly within PH daytime / early evening with overlap to US Pacific time



Nice?to?haves



- Interest in fitness, lifting, biomechanics, or rehab

- Experience creating short?form content from long?form

- Basic thumbnail sense is a plus (not required)



Salary & terms



- Full?time, PH?based role

- Expected range: $
USD / month, depending on experience and portfolio

- 13th?month pay after 12 months

- Long?term position if we’re a good fit on both sides



How to apply (read carefully)



- To show that you can follow SOPs and instructions, please complete all of the steps below in one message/email. Applications that miss steps will not be considered.



Subject line:



- Use this exact subject line: I read the full post – YouTube Editor Application



Portfolio – 3 videos



- Send links to 3 YouTube videos you edited that are similar (educational / talking head). For each link, include:



1. The video link

2. 1–2 sentences: what exactly you did on that edit

3. Loom critique (2–3 minutes)



-Record a short Loom (in English) where you:



1. Pick any educational YouTube video you did not edit

2. Explain what is good about the edit and what you would improve (pacing, cuts, B?roll, titles, etc.)

3.  Keep it 100 (answer honestly): 

4. “What kind of client or project are you not a good fit for, and why?”

5. “Describe the last time you missed a deadline or made a big mistake on a project. What happened and what did you change afterward?”



Logistics



Include:

- Your desired monthly salary in USD (within the range)

- Your typical working hours (PH time)

-  Your internet speed (screenshot or typed)



At the very end of your message, add this line so I know you read everything: I follow checklists and ask questions instead of guessing.

title: OTA POLICY, CLAIMS & PERFORMANCE MANAGER (AIRBNB-FOCUSED)
description:
OTA POLICY, CLAIMS & PERFORMANCE MANAGER (AIRBNB-FOCUSED)

Full-Time · 40 hours/week · Remote · Long-Term



We are a design-led short-term rental and serviced accommodation company managing a growing portfolio of high-quality apartments across Central London.



Our properties are listed on Airbnb, 
, VRBO, Expedia and other OTAs, with Guesty as our PMS.



As we scale, we are hiring a senior-level operator to **own platform risk, claims, reviews, and listing performance across all OTAs**.



This is **not** a guest messaging role.

This is **not** a junior VA role.



This is a back-office, judgement-based position for someone who understands how Airbnb and other OTAs actually work behind the scenes — and knows how to protect revenue.



––––––––––––––––––––

ROLE PURPOSE



Your job is to **protect and recover revenue across all OTAs** by:



• Winning justified Airbnb AirCover claims

• Challenging unfair reviews, penalties, and decisions

• Monitoring listing health, ranking, and conversion

• Diagnosing underperformance and taking corrective action

• Acting as the single owner of platform-side risk and performance



––––––––––––––––––––

WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR



This role is suitable only if:



• You have hands-on experience managing Airbnb listings end-to-end

• You have personally handled Airbnb AirCover claims (not just assisted)

• You understand Airbnb review policy, evidence standards, and timelines

• You can analyse listing performance and identify suppression or penalties

• You have experience with 
, VRBO, Expedia, or other OTAs

• You are comfortable making judgement-based decisions independently

• You prefer structured, analytical work over reactive daily operations



If your experience is limited to guest messaging, calendar management, or basic listing edits, this role is **not** a fit.



––––––––––––––––––––

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



AIRBNB CLAIMS & POLICY (PRIMARY)



• Prepare and submit Airbnb AirCover claims end-to-end

• Compile strong evidence packs (photos, invoices, logs, CCTV notes)

• Track deadlines and follow up until resolution

• Escalate claims strategically when required

• Handle rule-breach charges and damage recovery

• Assess negative reviews for policy violations and submit disputes



OTA LISTING PERFORMANCE & RANKING



• Monitor Airbnb ranking, visibility, and conversion

• Monitor 
, VRBO, Expedia performance

• Identify penalised or underperforming listings

• Analyse review impact on listing health

• D
 when to optimise, duplicate, relaunch, or leave listings untouched



CHANNEL MANAGEMENT & PLATFORM HYGIENE



• Act as Channel Manager across all OTAs

• Maintain consistency of content, rules, and settings

• Identify sync issues or conflicts via Guesty

• Use AI tools to support SEO-optimised listing content

• Flag risks, anomalies, or policy changes early



DOCUMENTATION & REPORTING



• Maintain clear claim and performance tracking

• Provide brief written summaries of outcomes and learnings

• Support ongoing SOP and process improvements



––––––––––––––––––––

REQUIRED EXPERIENCE (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



• Proven Airbnb experience managing listings end-to-end

• Direct experience handling Airbnb AirCover claims

• Strong understanding of Airbnb review and claims policy

• Experience with at least one additional OTA (
, VRBO, Expedia)

• Excellent written English (clear, structured, professional)

• Highly organised, analytical, and detail-driven



Experience with Guesty and multi-property portfolios is a strong advantage.



––––––––––––––––––––

POSITION DETAILS



• Full-time: 40 hours per week

• Remote

• Long-term position

• High autonomy and ownership



––––––––––––––––––––

REQUIRED APPLICATION QUESTIONS



Applications without answers to all questions will not be considered.



1. Describe an Airbnb AirCover claim you personally handled end-to-end. What evidence did you submit and what was the outcome?

2. How do you d
 whether a negative Airbnb review is removable under policy?

3. When would you duplicate or relaunch a listing instead of optimising it?

4. What signals tell you that an Airbnb or OTA listing has been penalised or suppressed?



We value clarity, structure, and practical thinking.

Short, well-written answers are preferred over long explanations.

title: STR CLAIMS & AIRBNB POLICY SPECIALIST (PART-TIME)
description:
We are a design-led short-term rental company managing a growing portfolio of high-quality serviced apartments across Central London.



As we scale, we are building a specialist back-office function focused on Airbnb claims, policy enforcement, and revenue protection.



This role exists for one purpose:

to win justified Airbnb AirCover claims, challenge unfair Airbnb decisions, and protect the business from revenue leakage and review damage.



This is a specialist Airbnb policy role for someone who has worked inside Airbnb and understands how claims, reviews, and Trust & Safety decisions are actually made.



IMPORTANT – ELIGIBILITY & VERIFICATION



This position is open only to former Airbnb employees.

We will verify Airbnb employment history as part of our screening process.

Applications containing false or misleading information regarding Airbnb employment will be immediately disqualified.



WHO THIS ROLE IS FOR



You should apply only if:

- You are a former Airbnb employee

- You have worked within Airbnb Trust & Safety, AirCover / Claims, Reviews, or another policy-heavy internal team

- You understand Airbnb policies, timelines, evidence standards, and escalation logic

- You are analytical, detail-driven, and calm under pressure

- You enjoy structured, case-based work rather than reactive daily operations



If you have not worked for Airbnb, this role will not be a fit.



THE MISSION



You will fully own all Airbnb claims and policy-related matters across our portfolio.



Your objectives are:

- Recover money through justified Airbnb AirCover claims

- Challenge unfair penalties, chargebacks, or review outcomes

- Protect listing performance and company revenue



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



AIRBNB AIRCOVER CLAIMS (PRIMARY FOCUS)



- Prepare and submit Airbnb AirCover claims end-to-end

- Compile evidence including photos, invoices, logs, and CCTV notes

- Track deadlines and follow up with Airbnb until resolution

- Escalate claims strategically when required



HOUSE RULE VIOLATIONS & DAMAGE RECOVERY



- Prepare charges for damages, smoking, extra guests, and rule breaches

- Support non-Airbnb recovery routes where applicable

- Maintain clear, audit-ready documentation



REVIEWS & AIRBNB POLICY DISPUTES



- Assess negative Airbnb reviews for policy violations

- Prepare review removal and dispute submissions

- Support strategic decisions where reviews impact listing performance



INTERNAL COORDINATION



- Work with Operations VAs to gather evidence

- Maintain clear claim-status tracking

- Provide brief written summaries of outcomes and learnings



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



- Former employment with Airbnb

- Direct experience handling Airbnb AirCover claims, Trust & Safety cases, or review disputes

- Strong understanding of Airbnb policies and timelines

- Excellent written English (clear, structured, professional)

- Highly organised and detail-oriented

- Former experience within Airbnb’s Trust & Safety team or AirCover claims department is a major advantage and will be prioritised.



Experience with UK short-term rental operations is a strong plus.



POSITION DETAILS



- Part-time (~20 hours per week)

- Remote

- Long-term role

- High-trust, specialist ownership position



This role is ideal for someone who wants to be the Airbnb claims and policy expert within a professional short-term rental operation.



HOW TO APPLY (MANDATORY)



Please apply via OnlineJobs.ph and answer ALL of the following questions:



1. Describe your experience working for Airbnb. Include your team or department, role, responsibilities, and dates of employment.

2. Approximately how many Airbnb AirCover claims have you personally handled?

3. Briefly outline Airbnb’s current Review Policy and when a review may be removed.



Applications without verified Airbnb employment experience will not be considered.

title: Airbnb Virtual Concierge / Virtual Property Manager (Guesty)
description:
We are hiring an experienced Airbnb Virtual Concierge / Virtual Property Manager to join our growing short-term rental operations team.



We manage high-quality, design-led serviced apartments across Central London, listed on Airbnb, 
, VRBO, and Expedia. This role is for someone who truly understands short-term rental operations end-to-end — not just guest messaging.



This is a core operations role with real ownership, clear systems, and long-term growth potential. It is not a junior role and not a general VA position.



If you enjoy running complex operations smoothly, preventing issues before they escalate, and taking pride in doing things properly, this role will suit you.



––––––––––––––––––

PLEASE ONLY APPLY IF YOU HAVE REAL STR EXPERIENCE



This role is not suitable for beginners or general virtual assistants.



You must have hands-on experience working in short-term rentals / Airbnb operations and be comfortable managing daily operations independently.



––––––––––––––––––

REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE (READ CAREFULLY)



You must have:



• Proven experience working as an Airbnb VA, Virtual Concierge, or Virtual Property Manager

• Hands-on experience using Guesty and Asana in a real operations role

• Strong understanding of STR operations, including:

– Cleaning turnovers and laundry coordination

– Maintenance scheduling and follow-ups

– Calendar, availability, and reservation management

– Guest access, travel-time, and check-in planning

– Full guest journey management (pre-arrival to checkout)

• Experience communicating with Airbnb Support / Trust & Safety on the host side

• Experience working with multiple OTAs (Airbnb, 
, VRBO, Expedia)

• Confident use of ChatGPT and AI tools for guest communication and operational tasks

• Excellent written English and a strong understanding of UK hospitality standards



Experience with UK-based serviced accommodation is a strong advantage but not mandatory.



If you do not meet these requirements, please do not apply.



––––––––––––––––––

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Guest Support & Virtual Concierge

• Handle guest enquiries, arrivals, and in-stay issues

• Troubleshoot Wi-Fi, smart locks, heating, access, and property questions

• Draft clear, on-brand guest messages using ChatGPT

• Maintain accurate communication records in Guesty



Operations & Logistics (Primary Focus)

• Schedule and coordinate cleaners and laundry

• Review cleaning photos and carry out quality-control checks

• Assign and track tasks for the master housekeeper / handyman

• Track supplies, invoices, and operational expenses

• Liaise with maintenance providers and follow tasks through to completion

• Maintain accurate calendars and availability in Guesty



Monitoring & Risk Prevention

• Monitor Ring CCTV footage and Minut noise alerts

• Verify guest count and potential house-rule breaches

• Take first operational action when issues arise

• Escalate confirmed issues to the relevant specialist role when required



Deposits, Reviews & Escalation

• Send and release security deposits where no issues arise

• Escalate deposit disputes and damage cases to the specialist role

• Draft public-facing review responses using ChatGPT 



Reporting & Improvement

• Assist with basic operational reporting

• Suggest improvements to SOPs, workflows, and systems based on real operational insight



––––––––––––––––––

WHAT THIS ROLE DOES NOT INCLUDE



To keep this role focused and sustainable, you will not be responsible for:



• Preparing or arguing Airbnb AirCover claims

• Submitting review disputes or Airbnb policy arguments

• Listing duplication, relaunches, or OTA optimisation strategy

• Executive admin or personal tasks



These are handled by separate specialist roles.



––––––––––––––––––

IDEAL CANDIDATE PROFILE



You are someone who:



• Has real, hands-on experience using Guesty and Asana in STR operations

• Is comfortable owning daily operations without step-by-step instructions

• Is highly organised, detail-oriented, and reliable under pressure

• Is calm, solutions-focused, and confident making operational decisions

• Is excellent at using ChatGPT and AI tools in day-to-day work

• Understands how to structure prompts to control tone, clarity, and accuracy

• Enjoys improving systems, not just following them

• Communicates clearly when something is unclear and asks good questions

• Is punctual, dependable, and looking for a long-term role, not freelance work

• Bonus: Previous experience working with Airbnb on the host-support side



––––––––––––––––––

POSITION DETAILS



Hours: 40 hours per week

Schedule: Monday to Friday, UK daytime (occasional evening coverage if required)

Type: Full-time, long-term, remote



––––––––––––––––––

HOW TO APPLY (IMPORTANT)



Apply via OnlineJobs.ph only.



Please answer all four questions below in your application.

Applications missing any of these will not be reviewed.



We value clarity, structure, and practical thinking. Short, well-written answers are preferred over long explanations.



1. Relevant Work Experience

Provide a brief summary of your relevant work experience in short-term rental / Airbnb operations (roles, years of experience, and types of properties managed).



2. Guesty & Asana Experience

Summarise your hands-on experience using Guesty and Asana, including what you used each tool for in daily operations.



3. AI & Prompting Skills

Briefly explain how you use ChatGPT or other AI tools in your work, and how you structure prompts to achieve accurate, professional outcomes.



4. IQ Test Score

Include a screenshot or link to your OnlineJobs.ph IQ Test score:





To confirm attention to detail, include the phrase “OPS-2026” somewhere in your application.

title: Executive Assistant to the Head of Legal
description:
About Us

Trustyfy is a global tech company building the first DeFi bank for companies and individuals.

For the first time in history since the invention of banking, customers, not banks, can have full ownership of their money.

. Thanks to our proprietary multi-signature and decentralized technology, companies can work internationally with no risk of payment delays, and at a fraction of the cost of legacy banks.

. Workers can remit funds to their loved ones at almost no cost.

. And two billion unbanked can become financially independent.

We are not just building the future of finance. We can make a real difference.

We have validated the vision and secured the capital from both recurring revenues and a seed round. As we scale globally, we are strengthening our leadership support structure.



Why Your Role Matters

As the Executive Assistant to the Head of Legal, you will play a key role in ensuring the Legal department operates smoothly and efficiently.

You will support a senior executive by managing schedules, organizing documentation, preparing presentations, and coordinating with internal teams and external partners. Your work will help ensure legal operations remain structured, responsive, and well-coordinated across time zones.

This role requires exceptional organization, discretion, and strong communication skills, as you will handle sensitive information and support high-level strategic work.



Key Responsibilities

Manage the Head of Legal’s calendar, scheduling meetings and coordinating across multiple time zones

Prepare and format legal and operational documents in clean, structured formats

Organize and maintain shared documents and legal materials across internal platforms

Assist in preparing presentations, reports, and decks (PowerPoint or Google Slides) from written materials

Coordinate meetings with internal teams, external counsel, and partners

Track action items and follow-ups fro
etings and ensure timely completion

Support execution of legal and operational tasks as needed

Maintain strict confidentiality when handling sensitive company and legal information



Skills & Experience

Exceptional organizational skills and strong attention to detail

Excellent written English and professional communication style

Strong document formatting skills in Word and Google Docs (structured documents, tables, annexes)

Comfort working with tools such as Google Docs, Word, Excel, Basecamp, and shared document platforms

Experience preparing presentations and professional slide decks

High level of discretion and ability to handle confidential information

Ability to manage priorities and coordinate across teams



Bonus Points

Previous experience supporting senior executives or leadership teams

Experience working in legal, finance, or compliance environments

Experience supporting globally distributed teams



Location & Working Hours

Remote role with preferred availability in Dubai Time (GMT+4) and overlap with Asian and European working hours.

Standard business hours coverage with flexibility for cross-time-zone coordination when needed.
