title: Cold Calling: Real Estate Lead Generation
description:
Real Estate Motivated Seller Lead Generator

100% Remote | Unlimited Earning Potential

U.S. Real Estate Investment Marketing Company



Location: 100% Remote — Work From Anywhere. Part-time, and Full-time is welcomed.

Pay Structure: $20–$100 USD per qualified lead submitted (no cap)

Hourly Base: $2-$3/hr

Average Earnings: ~$11/hr for reps submitting just 2 leads/day, 5 days/week

Payment Schedule: Bi-weekly via direct transfer

Start Date: ASAP



About the Company:

We are the highest-paying real estate investment marketing company that generates motivated seller leads for real estate investors across the United States. We work fast, we value accuracy, and we pay immediately upon lead approval. We are a small, lean team — no bureaucracy, no waiting around. If you perform, you get paid and you grow with us.



Why This Role Stands Out:

No hourly cap. No income ceiling. You earn $22–$100 per qualified lead with zero limit on how many you can submit. The only thing limiting your income is how many leads you generate.



Real earning example: A rep submitting just 2 leads per day at our average payout of $40/lead earns $80/day — that is approximately $11/hr on a standard 40-hour work week, working 5 days a week. Reps who submit more leads or generate higher-quality leads that land in the $50–$100 range earn substantially more. Our top individual VA makes >$2,500/week.



What You Will Be Doing:

Your job is straightforward:

• Generate motivated seller leads across the United States using any legal method you choose (cold calling,
 outreach,
 ads, SEO, direct mail, referrals, etc.)

• Qualify each lead to our specifications — the seller must verbally confirm on a recorded line (1) they are interested in selling and (2) they are willing to have someone view the property within 14 days OR speak with an investor by phone within 7 days

• Verify the lead is not a duplicate already in our system before submitting

• Submit the lead through our internal dashboard along with a call recording and qualifying information

• Receive instant payout upon lead approval



That is the entire workflow. Generate. Qualify. Verify. Submit. Get paid.



How You Generate Leads Is Up to You

We do not tell you how to find leads. This role is ideal for people who specialize in one or more of the following:

• Cold calling

•
 outreach

•
 / social media advertising

• SEO or content marketing

• Direct mail

• Referral networks

• Any other legal outbound or inbound method



Important: You are responsible for sourcing and funding your own leads list, dialer, and any other tools you use. We do not provide dialers. We do sell cold call lists at cost if you need them — contact us for pricing. We do not mark up the list cost.



Compensation Structure:

Base + Commission

Lead Payout Range: $22–$100 USD per qualified lead (based on quality and lead type)

Average Payout: $40 per lead

Payout Cap: None — unlimited submissions, and unlimited income

Payout Timing: Instant upon lead approval

Payment Method: Bi-weekly direct transfer



Team / Affiliate Program

You can bring reps on under you and earn a lifetime commission on every lead your team submits. You set the split with your sub-reps (for example, 50/50, 60/40 — you pick ) and simply notify us of the agreed-upon split when onboarding them. We manage all payroll for your team. You do not have to chase payments or manage the administrative side — we handle it entirely. This is ideal for:

• Recruiters

• Affiliate marketers

• Sales team leads or managers

• Anyone who wants to build a passive income stream from team production



Quality Requirements and Account Standing

We pay well because we expect quality. Here is how quality is measured and what happens if it drops:



88%+ Quality Rate (2-week average): No restrictions. Unlimited lead submissions.



Below 88% Quality Rate (2-week average): Account is capped at a fixed number of lead submissions per day until quality rate returns above 88%.



Below 80% Quality Rate (2-week average): Account is paused and placed on a 60-day probation period.



Lead Refund / Clawback Policy

We take lead quality seriously. Accounts can be banned if leads are found to be invalid. This mirrors the industry-standard refund criteria. Leads are subject to commission clawback for any of the following reasons:

• Property is actively listed on the MLS at the time of submission

• Property has not been listed for the past 12 months

• Lead is a duplicate already in our system

• Property is a mobile home on leased land

• Lead was submitted by a wholesaler, not the actual property owner

• Property is vacant land

• Property is non-residential (commercial, industrial, agricultural, etc.)

• Address is invalid, non-existent, or cannot be verified

• Contact information (phone/email) is fake or entirely incorrect

• Lead is confirmed spam or bot-submitted

• Seller confirms they never requested an offer and have no intent to sell

• Contact is not the property owner or an authorized representative

• Lead falls outside our active acquisition markets

• Seller explicitly states they are not selling, confirmed on follow-up

• Seller has high price expectations (more than 135% of market value)

+ This includes sellers who were never thinking about selling but would sell for a excessively high asking price.



Submitting consistently poor-quality or fraudulent leads will result in permanent account termination.



Tools and Technology

Get cash-back on technology you are already using when you are working with us!

Calling Platform: Your own — you are responsible for your dialer and phone system.

-Get a discounted Kixie dialer here: 
/m2sr5mhgu08h

-SmrtPhone, ReadyMode, and more!

Leads List: Your own — we sell lists at cost if needed; we do not provide lists for free.

-Get a discounted PropStream/BatchDialer account here: 
/rizzly/

-Datasift, and more!



How to Apply — Read Carefully

We review every application carefully. Incomplete applications are automatically disqualified. To be considered, you MUST submit all of the following:



Required Application Materials

1. Your resume or verified work history (PDF preferred)

2. A voice or video recording (2–4 minutes) answering ALL THREE questions below — text-only responses will not be reviewed

3. A written statement at the end of your application confirming: "I have read and understand the compensation structure, quality requirements, refund policy, and account standing terms outlined in this job posting."



Video / Voice Recording Questions (Answer All Three)

Question 1: Walk me through exactly how you plan to generate motivated seller leads. What is your strategy, what tools will you use, and why do you believe your approach will work?



Question 2: Describe a time you generated leads or found potential customers for any product or service. What did you do, what was the result, and what did you learn?



Question 3: A homeowner says they are interested in selling but won't be ready for 6 months. How do you categorize this lead? What do you do with it? Does it qualify for submission?



Disqualification Notice

Applications submitted without a recording, without the written confirmation statement, or that do not answer all three questions will not be reviewed — no exceptions.



We are a small, fast-moving team.

We value accuracy, reliability, and honesty above all else.

If that describes you — and you are ready to earn based on results — we want to hear from you.

title: Training / Coaching Manager
description:
Lead and Coach Teams to Success, Unlocking Their Full Potential as a WFH Training & Coaching Manager



Create and lead online training that improves customer service, boosts e-commerce performance, and empowers teams to excel.



(Salary Package: PHP 19,000–23,000 per month (negotiable only within this range; if you are not comfortable with this, please do not apply))



What You’ll Be Doing

 • Design and deliver training programs for new CSRs

 • Create and update training materials including slides, manuals, scripts, LMS content, and videos

 • Conduct coaching sessions using mock calls, role-plays, live demos, and simulations

 • Monitor trainee progress, provide feedback, and ensure training goals are met

 • Evaluate trainee performance and endorse graduates for deployment

 • Collaborate with Recruitment, Operations, and QA to align training with client needs

 • Continuously improve training systems, LMS courses, and knowledge base content



What We’re Looking For

 • 1+ year of experience in BPO training, coaching, or learning & development roles

 • Experience in e-commerce support such as Amazon, Shopify, eBay, or Walmart is a plus

 • Strong facilitation, presentation, and training development skills

 • Analytical, adaptable, and passionate about helping people grow

 • Reliable internet and quiet home workspace

 • Backup device and power source



What We Offer

• PHP 19,000–23,000 monthly salary

• Clear career growth opportunities, from Senior Trainer up to Director level

• Hands-on experience with fast-paced global e-commerce projects

• 100% remote, long-term work-from-home setup

• Opportunities to upskill, lead initiatives, and make a real impact

• Salary reviews possible after probation based on performance



Please click the link below to proceed with the next step in the application process:





Who We Are

At RingCould, we help top brands innovate with smart home technology and AI solutions. We embrace remote work, foster continuous growth, and focus on delivering results that make a real difference.

title: Experienced Ecommerce Video Editor (UGC & AI Ads)
description:
Sereni Parenting is looking for an experienced Ecommerce Video Editor with a proven track record editing high-converting ads for ecommerce brands.



This is not an entry-level role. We want someone who has edited real ads, for real brands, that had to perform. General content creation or personal projects only? This role isn't for you.



Who We Are



Sereni is a fast-growing parenting brand creating calming solutions for children. We're marketers obsessed with performance and emotionally driven storytelling. Our ads run on Meta and need to hook fast, hold attention, and convert.



What You'll Be Doing



Editing short-form UGC and AI-generated video ads (1–3 mins) for direct response. You'll work from detailed creative briefs, your job is to bring them to life in a way that stops the scroll and drives action.



What We're Looking For



- 3+ years editing experience, with at least 2 years on paid social ads for ecommerce brands - name the brands, we'll ask.

- Strong grasp of direct response: hooks, pacing, retention, emotional pull

- Hands-on experience with AI tools such as ElevenLabs, Kling, or similar

- Proficient in CapCut and/or Adobe Premiere Pro

- Can source b-roll and stock footage independently

- Fast communicator who meets deadlines without being chased



Communication is non-negotiable. Go quiet, miss deadlines, or can't take feedback - this isn't for you.



What We Offer



This is a full time, remote, per-project role with consistent daily work available. Editors who deliver 2 videos a day can expect to earn $1,000–$2,000+ per month. Editors who consistently deliver quality and volume move into a fixed full-time role within 2–3 weeks.



How to Apply



Your application must include all 3 or it will not be reviewed:



1. Resume: including specific ecommerce brands you've edited for

2. Portfolio : links to real ad creative you've edited (ads only, not general content)

3. Include the phrase "ECOM EDITOR" in your application title. Applications without both will be immediately rejected.

title: Small Business Looking For THE BEST COLD CALLER For High Commission Role
description:
** PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING **





IMPORTANT:



- We are ONLY looking for candidates with previous B2B cold calling experience.

- If you have only worked warm leads, inbound calls, or appointment setting from ads, do NOT apply.



COMPANY INFO:



- My name is Jordan. I am the founder of a fast-growing company that helps small businesses never miss a call using an A.I. Receptionist.

- This is a simple, high-demand service that business owners immediately understand. We are looking for 1–2 strong cold callers to help introduce it to small business owners across the U.S.

- We are not a large corporate call center where you are just a number, I am only looking to add 1-3 people to my small team.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



- Source your own B2B leads

- Cold call small business owners

- Book them for a free consultation

- Ensure they show up to the call

- That's it! You do not close deals. Our closing team handles everything, your only job is to get them to show-up.



MUST HAVE (DO NOT APPLY IF THIS DOES NOT DESCRIBE YOU):



- Proven B2B cold calling experience

- Strong English with no heavy accent

- Reliable internet and a quiet workspace

- Comfortable making high-volume outbound calls

- Put the phrase “Dial And Smile” in your subject line so we know you read this



COMPENSATION:



-$2/hour base

-$25 per attended show-up

- $100 per closed deal

- Monthly performance bonuses



HOURS:



- Part-time (20 hours per week) with the option to transition to full time

- Schedule: 1:00 AM – 5:00 AM Philippine Time



HOW TO APPLY:



- Do not send a generic message.

- In your application, include 2 things: Your specific B2B cold calling experience AND why this role fits you

- Do not use chat GPT or similar responses, those will be rejected. We read each application and looking for a genuine person to reach out.

title: Experienced Direct Response Copywriter ($2,000 – $4,000 Per Month)
description:
Work Hours: Full-time, Monday to Friday, normal Philippine working hours



Young Publisher | youngpublisher.com/



We’re an international digital publishing company hiring from the Philippines for over 5 years.

We have 50+ team members worldwide and 200+ verified reviews with a 4.9 average rating.

We build long-term partnerships, not short-term gigs.

We don't disappear, we pay on time



We’re looking for an experienced direct response copywriter who can:

- Take full ownership of performance-driven campaigns

- Write emails that get opened, read, and clicked

- Create Ads that stop people from scrolling.

- Craft persuasive copy that drives readers to act.



This is a full-time remote role with clear growth opportunities. You’ll start with emails and ads, and as you prove yourself, move into sales pages and VSLs.



What you’ll do



- Write broadcast emails and automated sequences

- Create Meta ad copy and video scripts

- Help produce ebooks and lead magnets using AI tools

- Progress into sales pages and VSL scripts for launches



Why is this role different?



- You’ll receive direct feedback from an 8-figure copywriter. This is a serious opportunity to sharpen your skills fast.

- You’ll also get access to premium courses and AI communities. We invest in our team because we want long-term growth.

- We encourage AI tools — but only with strong critical thinking. This is not a beginner role.



Essentials



- Full-time, Monday to Friday, Philippine standard working hours

- Long-term position with growth into sales pages and VSLs

- $2,000–$4,000 USD per month, depending on experience

- Fully remote

- Reliable, on-time payments every two weeks via Wise



Requirements



- At least 2 years of direct response copywriting experience (not blog or content writing)

- Proven results: open rates, CTR, conversions, ROAS

- Experience writing for coaches, course creators, or info product businesses

- Native-level English for US, UK, or Australian audiences

- Strong understanding of hooks, emotional triggers, objection handling, and CTAs

- Experience with Meta ad copy and video scripts

- Ability to adapt to different brand voices

- Comfortable using AI tools with critical thinking

- Strong communication skills and independence

- Reliable, responsive, proactive, and coachable



Hiring process



#1: Paid test task

#2: Interview

#3: Paid test month at 50% salary



We’re looking for professionals who know their craft and want long-term growth.



How to apply



Apply via our Typeform here: fg7xf91d8oa.typeform.com/to/CZb9go1y



Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



Young Publisher

title: Video Editor
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

The Video Editor at Brands Capital Group is responsible for creating high-impact video advertisements and marketing content that drives campaign performance across digital platforms. This role combines technical editing expertise with creative execution — bringing Creative Strategist concepts to life through compelling visual storytelling that captures attention, drives conversions, and motivates action.

The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced, data-driven environment, managing multiple projects simultaneously and optimizing content based on real performance data.



JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

Edit high-converting video ads for Meta, TikTok, YouTube & landing pages

Produce UGC-style content, product videos, and social media creatives

Use AI tools — AI voiceovers, talking avatars, automated captions, background removal

Collaborate with Creative Strategist team to execute campaign briefs and concepts

Repurpose existing content into multiple variations for A/B testing

Maintain consistent brand style and quality across all video assets

Manage multiple projects simultaneously while meeting tight deadlines

Continuously optimize edits based on performance feedback and data



REQUIREMENTS

Must-Have 

AI Avatar experience — HeyGen, Synthesia, D-ID, Captions.ai, or similar

2–4 years of professional video editing experience (e-commerce / DTC preferred)

Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

Strong portfolio demonstrating performance-driven, conversion-focused video content



Preferred

Experience creating video ads specifically for Meta and TikTok platforms

Familiarity with AI video generation tools: Kling, Sora, Veo, ElevenLabs

Knowledge of hook-based editing and conversion storytelling

Understanding of DTC performance metrics: CTR, ROAS, retention rates

Background in direct response advertising or performance marketing

Experience working with Creative Strategists or in agency settings

Self-directed, remote-ready with strong communication skills



SKILLS & COMPETENCIES

Expert proficiency in video editing software (Premiere Pro, Final Cut, DaVinci Resolve)

Strong skills in Adobe After Effects for motion graphics and animations

Color grading, audio mixing, and sound design

Stock footage research, sourcing, and asset management

Platform optimization knowledge across Meta, TikTok, YouTube

Visual storytelling through editing pace, timing, and structure

Data interpretation for A/B testing and iterative improvement

Speed and efficiency across multiple concurrent projects



WHAT WE OFFER

Fully Remote

Work from anywhere in the world 

Competitive Salary

Compensation matched to your talent

Fast-Growing Brands

Work on exciting DTC e-commerce brands 

Creative Ownership

Real room for innovation & expression

Long-Term Growth

A role that grows as you grow

Agile Environment

Fast-paced, data-driven, impactful work





IDEAL CANDIDATE

The ideal Video Editor is a performance-focused creative professional who combines technical editing expertise with a deep understanding of what makes video ads drive conversions. They excel at bringing Creative Strategist concepts to life through compelling visual storytelling — skillfully sourcing, editing, and optimizing content for digital advertising platforms.

This individual is both creatively intuitive and analytically minded, thriving in fast-paced environments where they rapidly iterate and refine based on performance feedback. They take genuine pride in seeing their edited content generate ROI, grow leads, and contribute to campaign success — all while maintaining brand consistency and production excellence across every deliverable.



Ready to Apply?

We're actively reviewing applications — don't wait!

ABOUT US

title: Marketing Executive | WFH | UK Property Company
description:
Remote | Long Term Career Growth | AI, Content, SEO and Paid Ads



Bi-weekly Pay | Part -time (25 hours) | Full-time (40 hours)



Luxury Hub and Pure Green are fast growing UK based property companies managing over £20m in assets and securing £30m in investment funding for future developments.



We operate at the intersection of property, technology, performance marketing and social impact, delivering modern estate agency and lettings services across the UK.



We are expanding our Philippines based team and are hiring a Marketing Executive for a long term, part-time / full time role focused on execution, performance and continuous improvement.



This role is ideal for someone who is tech savvy, design aware, comfortable with AI and happy to be hands on across content, SEO,
, website updates and automation.



WHY JOIN US



• Work remotely for a stable UK based company

• Long term role with guaranteed hours and job security

• Real campaigns with real budgets

• Daily use of AI tools including ChatGPT, Canva AI and CapCut AI

• Exposure to UK marketing strategy, funnels and performance data

• Work closely with senior leadership including CMO and Operations

• Clear progression as the business scales

• Annual performance review with potential pay increase



We invest in our people. You will get support and systems to help you grow your skills and confidence, not just complete tasks.



OUR CULTURE AND VALUES



At Luxury Hub, culture matters. We are building a long term team, not short term contractors.



Our core values are:



• Shared Vision – Aligning personal ambition with company success and shared goals

• Virtue and Talents – Individual talents are recognised and nurtured

• Continuous Improvement – We welcome feedback, stay curious, innovate and improve

• Focused Contribution – We play to our strengths and passions to create real impact

• Meaningful Partnerships – We believe in mutual value creation and growing together



We are looking for people who want to build something meaningful, grow their skills and contribute beyond just completing tasks.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

Marketing and Campaign Execution



• Execute weekly and monthly marketing campaigns across digital channels

• Manage and maintain marketing action lists and content calendars

• Create marketing assets, posts and supporting materials

• Research trends, competitors and opportunities across social platforms



Paid Advertising



• Assist with Meta Ads and Google Display campaigns

• Create ad creatives, hooks, captions and visuals

• Monitor CPL, CTR and conversions

• Suggest and apply optimisations



SEO, GEO and Website Updates



• Support basic SEO and GEO tasks including on page optimisation, content updates and metadata

• Carry out basic website updates such as CMS edits, landing pages and content changes

• Work with the team to improve website performance and conversion



AI, Automation and Continuous Improvement



• Use AI tools daily to generate content ideas, captions, scripts, designs and workflows

• Identify opportunities to automate or improve marketing processes using AI

• Continuously look for ways to work smarter and faster



 Campaigns, CRM and Reporting



• Support
 campaigns, outbound
ing and basic automations

• Maintain and update CRM records

• Track leads, campaigns and sources

• Support basic marketing performance reporting



Brand and Quality Control



• Maintain strict brand consistency

• Continuously improve output quality across all channels



WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR



We are skills first, not CV first.



You should have:



• Design Experience in a design tool.  InDesign or Adobe Photoshop, Canva.

• Demonstrable experience in digital marketing, content creation, SEO or paid ads

• Strong Canva skills and a good design eye

• Ability to edit short form videos using CapCut, Premiere Pro or similar tools

• Confidence using AI tools daily

• Comfort working with website backends or CMS and learning new tools quickly

• Strong written English

• A proactive, improvement focused mindset

• Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

• Availability to work UK hours from 9 AM to 5 PM GMT

• No other full time job or full time study commitments



A portfolio or examples of previous work is required.



COMPENSATION AND BENEFITS



• PHP 318 to 330 per hour based on skills and portfolio

• Bi weekly pay

• Paid time off

• KPI based performance bonuses of up to PHP 35 per hour extra

• Annual performance and pay review



Guaranteed pay security

If we do not provide enough work, you will still be paid for at least 75 percent of your contracted hours.



As the company grows, we plan to introduce:



• Thirteenth month pay

• Fourteenth month performance bonus after three years

• Bonus days off every 80 hours worked after probation

• Health stipend of up to PHP 2,000 per month after two years

• Increased leave credits

• Expanded long term benefits

• Company loan options after two years



HOW TO APPLY



• Complete this short application form: 

• No CV required at this stage. Portfolio will be reviewed.



 Join us and grow your career with a UK-based real estate company. We will be accepting applications until 10th March 2026, 11:59 PM GMT.

title: Funnel Builder & Paid Traffic Specialist (Part Time – Remote)
description:

 & Instagram)

Additional Tasks

REQUIRED SKILLS

NICE TO HAVE

WORK STYLE

Reliable

This role focuses on execution rather than strategy.



HOURS AND SALARY



Part Time



20 hours per week



Salary:

Long-term opportunity with potential for increased hours.



HOW TO APPLY

Links to 3 funnels or landing pages you have built



Screenshot of a Meta Ads campaign you have managed

A short message describing your funnel experience



Applications without examples will not be considered.

What makes a landing page convert well?

PowerHouse



Applications that do not include this will be ignored.

title: Social Media Engager
description:
**Company/Organization: **Digital Products Creators**



**Location:** Virtual Position



IN ORDER TO APPLY PLEASE SEND A VIDEO TELLING US YOUR EXPRIENCE AS A SOCIAL MEDIA MANAGER AND WHY WE SHOULD HIRE YOU AND HOW WILL YOU BE AN ASSET TO OUR COMPANY. MUST BE 100% COMMITTED AND CANNOT HAVE SEVERAL FREELANCE POSITIONS.

We are a dynamic and influential public figure seeking a dedicated and creative Social Media Manager to join our team. We're looking for a skilled individual to manage and grow our online presence across various social media platforms.



**Job Description: **



As our Social Media Manager, you'll play a pivotal role in shaping and executing the social media strategy for Digital Product Creators. You'll be responsible for curating engaging content, fostering meaningful connections with our audience, and maintaining the integrity and authenticity of our brand. You will be responsible for managing four
 Groups.



**Responsibilities:**



- Develop and execute a comprehensive social media strategy aligned with the Digital Product Creators Brand.

- Create original and captivating content (posts, stories, videos, etc.) that resonates with our audience while maintaining the figure's unique voice.

- Engage with our audience across social media channels, responding to comments, messages, and inquiries in a timely and authentic manner.

- Cultivate a strong community and foster meaningful interactions to enhance our brand's presence.

- Manage the figure's public image and uphold consistency in messaging, tone, and visual identity.

- Monitor social media trends, analyze performance metrics, and generate reports with actionable insights to optimize strategies.

- Identify and leverage strategic partnerships and collaborations to expand our reach and influence.

- Actively comment on posts and engage with followers.

- Respond to direct messages promptly and professionally.

- Foster a sense of community and connection online.

- Collaborate with the team to create engaging content.



**Requirements:**



- 3 years of proven experience managing social media for public figures, celebrities, or influential personalities.

- A deep understanding of various social media platforms, trends, and best practices.

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills with the ability to emulate the figure's voice and tone.

- Strong creative thinking and content creation abilities.

- Proficiency in social media analytics tools and the ability to derive actionable insights.

- Exceptional interpersonal skills and the ability to handle sensitive information with discretion.



Join us in shaping the digital presence of the Digital Products Creators. Looking to start someone right away.

title: E-commerce Dispute & Customer Protection Specialist (Shopify)
description:
We operate and scale multiple fashion ecommerce dropshipping brands on Shopify, promoted organically on TikTok.



Our business is growing, and we are looking for someone reliable and structured who can help manage disputes, chargebacks, and customer reputation protection, while also coordinating operational issues with suppliers.



This role focuses heavily on protecting the business from payment disputes and negative reviews, while ensuring operational problems with suppliers are resolved quickly and correctly.



This is a hands-on operational role, not a strategy role.



Main Responsibilities



Disputes & Chargebacks



-Respond to PayPal or card disputes

-Prepare evidence and documentation

-Communicate with customers when needed

-Make decisions on refunds or replacements when appropriate

-Help reduce dispute rates over time



Trustpilot & Reputation



-Monitor Trustpilot reviews

-Respond professionally to negative reviews

-Help resolve customer complaints

-Work toward turning negative reviews into updated or removed reviews



Supplier Coordination



-Communicate with Chinese suppliers when operational problems affect customers

-Resolve issues related to wrong sizes, stock availability, or delays

-Follow up with suppliers to ensure orders are fulfilled correctly

-Make sure tracking numbers are added correctly in Shopify



Invoice Verification



-Request supplier invoices when needed

-Carefully verify invoices line by line

-Identify errors or inconsistencies

-Resolve discrepancies with suppliers



Operational Tracking



-Maintain operational Google Sheets

-Track dispute cases and resolutions

-Update daily finance tracking sheets when required



Requirements



-Experience handling customer complaints or disputes

-Experience in ecommerce operations or dropshipping

-Strong attention to detail

-Comfortable working with Google Sheets

-Strong written English

-Calm and professional when dealing with difficult situations



Bonus



-Fashion ecommerce experience



Salary



-$6 per hour

-Long-term remote role

-Opportunity to grow into a larger operations leadership role as we expand



HOW TO APPLY (PLEASE READ CAREFULLY)



To apply, please follow these steps:



1) Change your application subject to:

“I want to protect your operations D”



2) Short Written Introduction (4–6 sentences)



Briefly explain:



-Your ecommerce experience

-Your experience handling customer complaints or disputes



3) Send your CV



4) Send a Loom video (3–5 minutes)



In your Loom, please answer the following:



Scenario 1 — Supplier Problem



A supplier tells you after an order has been placed that the customer’s ordered size is not available.



Example:

The customer ordered Size S, but the supplier says the factory only has Chinese sizes from M to XXL.



Explain:



-How you would communicate with the supplier

-How you would handle the situation with the customer

-What steps you would take to prevent this problem from happening again

-What changes you would make to the product page or supplier process



Scenario 2 — Payment Dispute



A customer opens a payment dispute claiming they never received their order, but tracking shows the package is still in transit.



How would you handle this situation?



Explain:



-What steps you take

-What evidence you provide

-How you communicate with the payment processor



Scenario 3 — Trustpilot Review



A customer leaves a 1-star Trustpilot review saying their order is late and the brand is a scam.



Explain:



-How you would respond publicly

-How you would resolve the issue

-What steps you would take to encourage the customer to update or remove the review.



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Accounting & Order Operations Specialist
description:
Accounting & Order Operations Specialist

=======================================



About Monoblocc

---------------



Monoblocc is a Hong Kong-based direct-to-consumer hardware brand that designs and sells premium monitor-mounted workspace accessories.



We sell globally through Shopify and fulfill through JD Logistics in the US and Spaceship from Hong Kong.



We are a small founder-led company. This is not a role where you disappear into a big team. You will own a critical part of the back office and work directly with the CEO.



What this role is

-----------------



We are hiring someone to own the day-to-day back-office work across two connected areas:



- Order operations

- Accounting / bookkeeping execution



This is an accounting-led operations role. Month-end close, reconciliations, and bookkeeping accuracy are core responsibilities.



This role exists because in our business, orders and accounting are tightly linked.



Refunds affect the books.

Inventory affects accounting.

Pre-orders affect liabilities.

Logistics mistakes create both customer issues and financial issues.



We do not need a front-line customer support agent.

We do not need a strategist who wants to redesign the business every week.



We need someone reliable, detail-oriented, and calm under pressure who can keep things accurate, moving, and under control.



What you will do

----------------



Order operations / back-office execution



- Review back-office Intercom tickets and execute the required actions

- Process approved refunds and cancellations in Shopify

- Make administrative order changes where needed

- Prepare, clean, and upload order files for fulfillment partners

- Push orders into JD Logistics where automation does not handle it correctly

- Monitor tracking sync issues and follow up on failures

- Help resolve order exceptions such as lost parcels, stolen packages, warehouse issues, or billing mismatches

- Handle structured order exception cases such as approved substitutions or order admin changes using templates and clear internal rules

- Keep internal logs accurate and up to date



Accounting / bookkeeping execution



- Maintain clean bookkeeping records in Xero

- Reconcile payment processors, payouts, and bank activity

- Process supplier invoices and other routine accounting entries

- Support month-end close

- Help maintain inventory-related records and COGS updates

- Support pre-order liability and revenue recognition workflows

- Check that refunds, cancellations, and order changes are correctly reflected in the books

- Help prepare files and support documentation for recurring grant and administrative submissions



Exception handling / control work



- Notice when something looks wrong and investigate it

- Follow up with JD Logistics or other vendors when invoices, charges, or order handling do not make sense

- Escalate issues clearly and quickly to the CEO

- Help improve SOPs, checklists, and workflow reliability

- Validate automation outputs and flag errors when systems do not behave correctly



What this role is not

---------------------



- Not front-line customer service

- Not product support

- Not supply chain planning

- Not batch planning

- Not factory negotiation

- Not a pure analyst role

- Not a software builder role



You may send occasional structured template messages for order exceptions, but the relationship-heavy customer communication stays with the CEO.



Who will do well in this role

-----------------------------



- You are highly detail-oriented

- You like keeping records accurate and clean

- You are comfortable with repetitive administrative work

- You do not ignore issues when something looks off

- You follow through until things are closed out properly

- You are organized and calm when several small problems happen at once

- You are comfortable working in a business where processes continue to improve over time

- You are not looking for a social customer support role

- You are not bored by reconciliation, admin work, or cleanup work



This role is a good fit for someone who enjoys bookkeeping, ecommerce operations, reconciliations, spreadsheets, exception handling, and process discipline.



Required skills / experience

----------------------------



- Experience with bookkeeping or accounting support

- Strong Excel or Google Sheets skills

- Strong attention to detail

- Experience with ecommerce admin work, order handling, or operations support

- Ability to work with structured SOPs and also handle exceptions

- Good written English

- Comfortable learning systems and following checklists



Strongly preferred

------------------



- Xero experience

- Shopify experience

- A2X experience

- Intercom experience

- Experience with logistics or fulfillment workflows

- Experience reconciling payouts, refunds, and operational data across systems



Tools you may work with

-----------------------



- Shopify

- Xero

- A2X

- Intercom

- JD Logistics systems

- Google Sheets / Excel

- Gmail and shared internal documentation



Working with the CEO

--------------------



You will report directly to the CEO, who is a CPA and closely involved in operations and finance.



You will get support, context, and fast decisions, but you will also be expected to take ownership of your area and keep things moving.



Why this role matters

---------------------



This role is about making sure the back office works.



That means:



- orders do not get stuck

- refunds do not fall through the cracks

- uploads happen correctly

- reconciliations are clean

- the books close properly

- errors are noticed early

- operational mess does not quietly build up in the background



If you do this role well, you become a key part of how the company runs.



Compensation and details

------------------------



- Full-time

- Remote

- PHP 48,000 to 60,000 per month depending on experience

- Philippines preferred

- We are a Hong Kong-based company, and Hong Kong and the Philippines are on the same time zone

- Long-term role for the right person



Growth path

-----------



As we automate more routine admin work, this role can grow into more ownership of:



- exception handling

- controls

- reconciliation oversight

- workflow reliability

- SOP ownership

- validation of automations and systems outputs



This is not a dead-end data entry role. The long-term path is toward owning the reliability of the back office.



How to apply

------------



Please
 your application to 
 with:



- your resume

- a link to your OnlineJobs.ph profile

- subject line: Accounting & Order Operations Specialist Application



In your
, please answer these short questions:



- When can you start?

- What hours are you usually available in Philippine time?

- Are you available for regular daytime overlap with Hong Kong time?

- What monthly compensation are you looking for in PHP?

title: Social Media Manager to manage a Public Figure in US Platforms
description:
First things first: You MUST submit a short video introducing yourself and explaining why you’re the perfect fit. No video = no review.



Ohhh we’re not hiring an employee… we’re hiring a **brand driver**. Let’s make this feel magnetic. If you love fast-paced environments, bold brands, viral 
nts, and turning content into conversations — this is your role. We’re looking for a **high-energy, creative powerhouse** to become the Lead Social Media Manager for a U.S.-based public figure. This is not a “clock in, clock out” job. This is a build-something-big role.



You won’t just post content.

You’ll help drive the movement.



What You’ll Be Doing (Daily 
ntum)



* Posting 2–3 pieces of content daily

* Running and organizing the content calendar like a CEO

* Engaging with the audience (comments, DMs, conversations)

* Reading insights and analytics to spot what’s working

* Adjusting strategy based on performance (we move smart, not random)

* Leading social media execution across platforms

* Helping the brand stay visible, relevant, and powerful

* Must have great english skills

* Must have great Canva Skills

*Must know how to work ChatGPT



You Must Love Data + Creativity



We want someone who:



* Gets excited looking at insights and analytics

* Understands engagement rates, reach, saves, and conversions

* Can explain what the numbers mean and how to improve them

* Thinks strategically, not emotionally, about content performance



This Role Is Fast, Fun, and High-Expectation



You’ll thrive here if you:



* Have BIG energy

* Move with urgency

* Love structure + creativity

* Have strong work ethic and follow through

* Can handle a demanding environment without getting overwhelmed

* Take ownership instead of waiting to be told what to do

* Want to grow with a public brand



This is a leadership role. You are the social media engine.



What We’re Looking For



* Proven experience managing personal brands or public figures

* Strong caption writing + content instincts

* Experience using scheduling tools

* Ability to read and interpret social media insights

* Clear communicator

* Highly organized

* Must have a self-starter mindset



If you want to build, grow, and be part of something impactful with a public figure brand — submit your video and resume. Let’s build something powerful.

title: Marketing
description:
Notalis Notary and Apostille Services is seeking a Marketing Specialist with experience in the notary industry to help expand our client base and strengthen our online presence. The ideal candidate will focus on building relationships with immigration companies, attorney offices, and other professional organizations that frequently require apostille services. This role will also be responsible for managing and growing our social media platforms through consistent content creation and engagement.

Business Development & Outreach



Identify and target immigration companies, law firms, paralegal offices, and document preparation services that need apostille services.



Develop partnerships with attorney offices and immigration professionals.



Conduct outreach through
 campaigns, phone calls, networking, and in-person visits when applicable.



Create marketing strategies to increase apostille service referrals.



Track leads and partnership opportunities.



Social Media Management



Manage company social media accounts (Instagram,
, LinkedIn, etc.).



Create and publish at least 3 posts per week promoting services, educational content, and industry updates.



Develop engaging marketing content including graphics, short videos, and informational posts.



Respond to messages and comments professionally.



Monitor analytics and adjust strategies to improve reach and engagement.



Content Creation & Branding



Develop promotional content related to:



Apostille services



Notary services



Immigration document support



Business partnerships



Assist with marketing materials such as flyers,
 campaigns, and digital advertisements.



Maintain brand consistency across all platforms.



Qualifications



Experience in the notary, apostille, or document services industry required



Strong understanding of apostille services and document authentication processes



Experience marketing to law firms, immigration consultants, or legal professionals



Social media management and content creation experience



Knowledge of platforms such as Canva, Instagram,
, LinkedIn, and Google Business



Strong communication and networking skills



Self-motivated and able to work independently



Preferred Skills



Experience with digital marketing tools



Experience running social media ads



Knowledge of SEO and local business marketing



Graphic design skills for marketing materials

title: Accounting Supervisor
description:
Supervise and monitor daily accounting activities, including accounts payable, accounts receivable, and general ledger



Review and ensure accuracy of financial statements, reports, and schedules



Ensure compliance with accounting standards and company policies



Assist in budget preparation, cash flow monitoring, and financial analysis



Coordinate with external auditors, banks, and government agencies



Ensure timely filing of tax returns and statutory reports



Develop and implement effective accounting procedures and internal controls



Train, guide, and evaluate accounting staff



Perform other accounting and finance-related duties as assigned



Qualifications



Bachelor’s Degree in Accountancy, Accounting Technology, or Finance



CPA is an advantage



With at least 1 years of relevant accounting experience, including supervisory role



Strong knowledge of accounting principles, taxation, and financial reporting



Proficient in accounting software and MS Excel



Strong analytical, leadership, and communication skills



Detail-oriented and able to meet deadlines
